name: Trump Train News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znucuiaasiv1ntg81r06hhjfirff0qppp37aq1qo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj60oj4cth2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9i55r6j6gc8cglsh454uett1lvqb0d9ug9q64h8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj60oj4cth2bs).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm97jik8g62j8oht33apsgcvnq4u42r4fd1m3aco_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj60oj4cth2bs)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl82heberhkhdie5qrcu1cd9c6k6trte8bjjgi7g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj60oj4cth2bs)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Lost my Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
body:
This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z105v14snvueccftmoer8dpe0ekqh1jkdkrblgh0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj64o35chh2bs)

Friend --

I wish things would have gone a different way...

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **
| **Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**
---

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for our help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp1gnej3djf6vgp8873o3cpoea7bdvjspo8fh5vg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj64o35chh2bs "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv5clngt53vqu6t50pdva92uvsq1851hkcdr1apo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj64o35chh2bs)
---
God bless you, and God bless America.

**Mayra Flores**
America First Candidate
Texas Congressional District 34

|
---
| Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress
---
PO BOX 341027
Austin, TX 78734

Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: American Action News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq7giah25eos7o3825timlksh8r31o1qh914famg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6aor4c3h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrk3tl0cfut14o6r2e2ruej9ml8brq9fatqjcfo0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6aor4c3h2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52nbd9afd0s91qchlhfmsp85j56up6ev304noag_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6aor4c3h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zigge5o85kj9cqearf4g06e44t439reqvua1li0o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6aor4c3h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhjvgkuhg13ubskvf6ub00lksql8haks0n4r6ql0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6aor4c3h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2mala62p3i6ppo4vr7a5iltl71l5re38vemhkj0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68ob1c9g61oh1k8gn48n24hhm9o33cpim6p30s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc52emrm9bujbl0lmbpiduhufi60attgefp3kbmg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6aor4c3h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg4kniuv05j6rct6l0qo83mgtmstaoqg0mv9cbt8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6aor4c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: This J6 news will make your jaw drop
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z78cj78e7oseij3frdgbqqav1adqbf5bcbrl66no_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6eob1chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z905en2csid5i2idtj6n0q2vh3apc6t67ktoekg8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6eob1chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1pkidd27456hl47uvj4hcp8fajrktko4hgr9mf8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj6eob1chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a9b51c3e380431c944fcbf49d03a6ae&_e=WS_ing8DPylnEu6tiyx6OxYX0pKZte_f9rFzk_8-vH8mNLw5acbnIm0Wtx7vXGw3BgjY14RJf3RxFXxxqFXBqmiRP6CPhv3mSq_jWO5ElQvux-cddfyE_WsYvjFGpBvymue6dc7Wkk7CeitBvpoNeG4TdLtxUPLBG_EAx5w_G_SKdW236qBM3mBF0WVt2Mc7jMRCdpJPwnFS2qaKOoytj8xZGWi2lyG8S463MvOnifRz3Ns2e0UQeziLWR0RKoBG_MhEZIedl8aX1bdz4k4J5YDrqz_V3zeMbDV6Gg9CBcr5fjvNXTnGOAc4Y1jXqKKJ2-RLYX4bFZKJEN5LFqgPwl_rMgr79dypql0Fm0As4U5fY256QOJLiFyh7AqzWgXeFCIiFXzGBGGuQ6usdImB-M_ItuChv6NeL56QP1rSBA8%3D).

Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a9b51c3e380431c944fcbf49d03a6ae&_e=WS_ing8DPylnEu6tiyx6OxYX0pKZte_f9rFzk_8-vH8mNLw5acbnIm0Wtx7vXGw3BgjY14RJf3RxFXxxqFXBqmiRP6CPhv3mSq_jWO5ElQvux-cddfyE_WsYvjFGpBvymue6dc7Wkk7CeitBvpoNeG4TdLtxUPLBG_EAx5w_G_SKdW236qBM3mBF0WVt2Mc7jMRCdpJPwnFS2qaKOoytj8xZGWi2lyG8S463MvOnifRz3Ns2e0UQeziLWR0RKoBG_MhEZIedl8aX1bdz4k4J5cJwm3RyyFQP00o4aVlK65VDT2ENHCljR37kpVqB5IwI5_KwYZwy1ZZai1ZJ98kB9MEml39tnl_mSJcVZzc_FSt_a7tRHWPmLt4iNihjemcRlqy8wLa03w2KGcwpKN6w8GfKasUOPHcP7GOBl5a4MRk%3D)**

When you send in your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale sponsors several educational outreach efforts--including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus, and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and homeschoolers--to teach citizens about the meaning of the Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of liberty.

Your gift of at least $15--or even $25, $35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE ACTION--will help us to expand these educational initiatives that are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of government funding.

So please complete your **National Referendum on the Administrative State** and consider giving your most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

**P.S.** I look forward to receiving your opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that you can support our work.

So please complete the **National Referendum on the Administrative State** using this secure link:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8a9b51c3e380431c944fcbf49d03a6ae&_e=WS_ing8DPylnEu6tiyx6OxYX0pKZte_f9rFzk_8-vH8mNLw5acbnIm0Wtx7vXGw3BgjY14RJf3RxFXxxqFXBqmiRP6CPhv3mSq_jWO5ElQvux-cddfyE_WsYvjFGpBvymue6dc7Wkk7CeitBvpoNeG4TdLtxUPLBG_EAx5w_G_SKdW236qBM3mBF0WVt2Mc7jMRCdpJPwnFS2qaKOoytj8xZGWi2lyG8S463MvOnifRz3Ns2e0UQeziLWR0RKoBG_MhEZIedl8aX1bdz4k4J5T8pfn5OkKiyML2mWeNsjjOFnuvrO54nlgO3ANLFx5RDlp_cAC9cCTwrqFqrEB6H-RIeuCcP43o-cvuCwOWKwLfIWWAp71vBt2e-ZKKkWzHneYzfzyahCBBApo4SRdavzOaO1ZeWPBTK9UahEGlM5Qw%3D)**

As soon as you respond, we will begin your FREE lifetime subscription to _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication through postal mail.

Educating millions about the Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your commitment to liberty.

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c636e1777965454799fa1c0b11831be1&_e=Nr5QSg3kc7Xd0ScFEmgT-c2MXwBqafrXHi5ivm96LxtZGOK1RXx8UUI1GxyvxUjRJBeUrYz7U-I9-7ffBSmoRkRcMvi8uk680fs6qLufhWK73AY08R4B_sDRm61_m3IOek7f5Yp0KXasHjoB4M4vf-m5d9BbZrqlYtqStxS_9PhWOoTFOhgdpH3Govvmz1hPlz4EMbABiD033EDDJA9WzEJs0U9JieOPDUGJkEJO-7nAvDbByeXPvwRAKcYTxQPsfrheyRWfAYvk6QN8Zje9GWiCU2yJKrWqxgEHwWEJdlJiHmYmammxhkctseHnn1X5bCVvYwHYmFI5MQnP0fyH_rwGFpqW0yj9paf8y0vBukTbSdZS1juI8Y6O2A206UhJLb9rdAxVQzFZAbej_A3LWQ%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c636e1777965454799fa1c0b11831be1&_e=Nr5QSg3kc7Xd0ScFEmgT-c2MXwBqafrXHi5ivm96LxtZGOK1RXx8UUI1GxyvxUjRJBeUrYz7U-I9-7ffBSmoRkRcMvi8uk680fs6qLufhWK73AY08R4B_sDRm61_m3IOek7f5Yp0KXasHjoB4M4vf-m5d9BbZrqlYtqStxS_9PhWOoTFOhgdpH3Govvmz1hPlz4EMbABiD033EDDJA9WzEJs0U9JieOPDUGJkEJO-7nAvDbByeXPvwRAKcYTxQPsCrPMH934S1Ur49iRRnRYUlBbBWf29iVNr8mMifmFd6vUTk4EXSxLudgp4IhWYIXmj26Y79g4SVFGHq9Co3k0z5ZYtcPycrju2CipVIMNQUWEMmKVkJDpS-eHavbbCiqs8cRT8sTTel73HorrQ0Ppwg%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c636e1777965454799fa1c0b11831be1&_e=Nr5QSg3kc7Xd0ScFEmgT-c2MXwBqafrXHi5ivm96LxtZGOK1RXx8UUI1GxyvxUjRJBeUrYz7U-I9-7ffBSmoRkRcMvi8uk680fs6qLufhWK73AY08R4B_sDRm61_m3IOek7f5Yp0KXasHjoB4M4vf-m5d9BbZrqlYtqStxS_9PhWOoTFOhgdpH3Govvmz1hPlz4EMbABiD033EDDJA9WzEJs0U9JieOPDUGJkEJO-7nAvDbByeXPvwRAKcYTxQPszYQDedZO4hKXgvgl7FKDhN4cqJHe4WmaXvI6wsVaTbXYf43FVxzX6H8Dm5_V8BXZ9p5NQrY0yHQpeaRjr8kjVKcJmRjJPwOelyRk-FcbYgoZbhxudeJEdGFS_ZwTA-BwosJZbaf3YxdjoGG15t6z3w%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c636e1777965454799fa1c0b11831be1&_e=Nr5QSg3kc7Xd0ScFEmgT-c2MXwBqafrXHi5ivm96LxtZGOK1RXx8UUI1GxyvxUjRJBeUrYz7U-I9-7ffBSmoRkRcMvi8uk680fs6qLufhWK73AY08R4B_sDRm61_m3IOek7f5Yp0KXasHjoB4M4vf-m5d9BbZrqlYtqStxS_9PhWOoTFOhgdpH3Govvmz1hPlz4EMbABiD033EDDJA9WzEJs0U9JieOPDUGJkEJO-7nAvDbByeXPvwRAKcYTxQPs-aMEPwCYvP0KR3ENHTXl9sEr5AtF2bcGBEYcnihCwpto_URGlIASE1JVSdRArEdylxLFcRcZco0vpaXNpu88hrZQ9kUD3lH0qDwRl7S46GN-BN_sWuvH19kh1F5NA7atVRuBKuR6-h0Vu8IvJ0RAJw%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c636e1777965454799fa1c0b11831be1&_e=Nr5QSg3kc7Xd0ScFEmgT-c2MXwBqafrXHi5ivm96LxtZGOK1RXx8UUI1GxyvxUjRJBeUrYz7U-I9-7ffBSmoRkRcMvi8uk680fs6qLufhWK73AY08R4B_sDRm61_m3IOek7f5Yp0KXasHjoB4M4vf-m5d9BbZrqlYtqStxS_9PhWOoTFOhgdpH3Govvmz1hPlz4EMbABiD033EDDJA9WzEJs0U9JieOPDUGJkEJO-7nAvDbByeXPvwRAKcYTxQPsW9shWumWCPEyAAzxYppmQsl1Pa7stNmmhNuJfPSQqPoKR0NRlTMLHT1gevkSGphjLcvIUIsnwF5xsZcC5b19rdzMACAnaoMFosuRWs1C_QZ1lwys9M0F_pDgD9u49NBnI-uRLtTs1Fn60Nz-CZZT9w%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=c636e1777965454799fa1c0b11831be1&_t=jTkQReyFVhjb2tcR8JaY6FEfuPf0_YKUow-LEFTfgX24-aS4dXoBFJxUZF9QYHDnlVo38bVXiSYxXTUuBkEVF6_lSK93GUTUSkxncwcxjUHHmVsp7E8GPbqUxzO6dVg4AeLJlrTGMcgQqDJ9kJb25Us42NK5am8YnJwqjvTU7HU%3D)

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d63d4242ab634818a792591c733e77d7&_e=ilVfBF3w7Xt63YiICZ8m1xEW2rAJXAS3zMWM7_V4DT3oW5xHr02ZPpin9U2wsptYBzdPSahkMaGliWA5b8CsZM4poFB6m8hZEmoQQmIx6eBvWlLJKWAJeBmNii22PNRBhgYBFx3ZuvW4sRASPBPK7zDJTqsEhZxvM0zKL0OIAdV2qiX_QtEX0xemNTmrLOGV64GFq6ugitfL3BaaOT598Fb5-DmpxvDb_LH0hCd74ZmC6alHtBWWCiF58egsLnb_HbTo_rVa2a3CHf2k9wkhLYDkHdxDwSbj-ENWDbzQ1PthTckUKPczqUzTS3m9pNVxrMxOC7wSVbMku0iVMEL5CExxtHpBuu5AVXB2bi7riwQE0ujfcRLwOxi8H5or6XmMWJmEf6G_c-h3fF3tdalcNE8N1km9E9JvI-e3wINidXUaogJDN47wXyddJpQzyoCOZ-KI2Ly0u8k8iqvIxjOqNxb6HaNSMf71LfSUlT3KMUk%3D)
* * *
---
Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

My opponent hired a twisted left-wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me. The liberal journalists called me a "white nationalist Latina" and a "self-hating Latina."

To sum it up- the woke liberals in America showed their true colors.

They truly hate free-thinking Hispanic women who don't buy what their party is selling.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives them completely nuts.

But they'll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won't stop until they permanently destroy me. They're leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d63d4242ab634818a792591c733e77d7&_e=ilVfBF3w7Xt63YiICZ8m1xEW2rAJXAS3zMWM7_V4DT3oW5xHr02ZPpin9U2wsptYBzdPSahkMaGliWA5b8CsZM4poFB6m8hZEmoQQmIx6eBvWlLJKWAJeBmNii22PNRBhgYBFx3ZuvW4sRASPBPK7zDJTqsEhZxvM0zKL0OIAdV2qiX_QtEX0xemNTmrLOGV64GFq6ugitfL3BaaOT598Fb5-DmpxvDb_LH0hCd74ZmC6alHtBWWCiF58egsLnb_HbTo_rVa2a3CHf2k9wkhLYDkHdxDwSbj-ENWDbzQ1PthTckUKPczqUzTS3m9pNVxrMxOC7wSVbMku0iVMEL5CKnk5ja9EDVEfen0ZfVWbxRvKg998eMYIj6AsqwiA19z7Lwl0RY9stbTQwSh3RXf2O0ygNmAH1F1A8VSaRl0w49IbnhKB6jPdiClGF2se4KTyTk6I--JEHadulRUHz_8w2u1NlPoKQe5pvq5Kb6pUnY%3D)
---

Look, I immigrated to America when I was 6 and grew up working in the fields. I know the value of a hard earned dollar so I wouldn't ask you to donate if it truly wasn't important.

_**But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING. **_

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d63d4242ab634818a792591c733e77d7&_e=ilVfBF3w7Xt63YiICZ8m1xEW2rAJXAS3zMWM7_V4DT3oW5xHr02ZPpin9U2wsptYBzdPSahkMaGliWA5b8CsZM4poFB6m8hZEmoQQmIx6eBvWlLJKWAJeBmNii22PNRBhgYBFx3ZuvW4sRASPBPK7zDJTqsEhZxvM0zKL0OIAdV2qiX_QtEX0xemNTmrLOGV64GFq6ugitfL3BaaOT598Fb5-DmpxvDb_LH0hCd74ZmC6alHtBWWCiF58egsLnb_HbTo_rVa2a3CHf2k9wkhLYDkHdxDwSbj-ENWDbzQ1PthTckUKPczqUzTS3m9pNVxrMxOC7wSVbMku0iVMEL5CB57ZUo6rQfn255cd3Hj-WdmejBt23z33woJa3IdXpIWLVyuMKU6aFdXCXe7vUITbdvw7_BuxYX8W_1b4AAAbNo_d98bQ0po80C0rqtfQUXxTv0wZSLP0gwEu-L4YGla0L2jSxG4Oiq4nTfTtp5LuAI%3D)

So if you can, and only if you can, please consider chipping in a few bucks today. I would be forever grateful to earn the backing & support of a great patriot like you!

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl0eeln7mc9tg61val9vc9ljuo07gdhmrh465k80_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj69oj6cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhlihqnhhubuftoe7lkne4o7hgtlu727ij34281o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj69oj6cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3q5ri34b1tdf803srdnaj2ccu6da9gv0nm9928o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj69oj6cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7kac7bfbk3npu7a9fkd5gg8sh0jheihpcjfer7g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdj69oj6cjh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbmiih80o7gepgsf8nhur1j3atn08r6carfsuj5g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm0p32chh2bs)

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

name: Full Mag News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd5278dc67ef4ce5818a436ec08d24ad&_e=7cNNA18p42fHdqMmXjH2APMKLaapc_4WwFy-AfM2BOnvUiOBFrWYUnRgp_lgR4itnkOgBSX733qUkwYgTFxQXm7tAkwb1dI_c40LZkGTQz6lo9BHQJjgPITXRESqPel8_ymBFvU5X8VqTTTEwGwrxJPVt1JbC2m7j8EUlNiUY_2AsjtyOYSMpQ8EhNFQqZD_ceFUQF8oLo9eDq2n7hlE-WVmGnZo9tTzEdd4PNqLw59VOW1rKHBUdlLkXXNRecYZktiFqiH4I9E5_QOeZAoW-7-mc9sNQ9jFiW-EUCjLo-5xCMqIALCX3MfuEPFcYIat2nGJNWmtLCva8kXeWGl0TUAHXKNnSNPd4k7SirBOpuYZEGiQA5BxWN89YCwakKxtIo-reD-o0Iq36JOmxfXMUWHKGgExqWpewvl5f_3EbZU%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd5278dc67ef4ce5818a436ec08d24ad&_e=7cNNA18p42fHdqMmXjH2APMKLaapc_4WwFy-AfM2BOnvUiOBFrWYUnRgp_lgR4itnkOgBSX733qUkwYgTFxQXm7tAkwb1dI_c40LZkGTQz6lo9BHQJjgPITXRESqPel8_ymBFvU5X8VqTTTEwGwrxJPVt1JbC2m7j8EUlNiUY_2AsjtyOYSMpQ8EhNFQqZD_ceFUQF8oLo9eDq2n7hlE-WVmGnZo9tTzEdd4PNqLw59VOW1rKHBUdlLkXXNRecYZktiFqiH4I9E5_QOeZAoW-z7AUwJXg8eMb3pw4W-nzdRJUu_57GBvYE3sXRUEeWiWzoe5nXdzumNgBjmjEmwbl-1G6Y42sd-tkTu7VzaKDanOdqluUv34gteHAQSaDuY-aeDUsw6chyITgF9_SaLqV9_TxbJ7avqWwfu4D11gATA%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd5278dc67ef4ce5818a436ec08d24ad&_e=7cNNA18p42fHdqMmXjH2APMKLaapc_4WwFy-AfM2BOnvUiOBFrWYUnRgp_lgR4itnkOgBSX733qUkwYgTFxQXm7tAkwb1dI_c40LZkGTQz6lo9BHQJjgPITXRESqPel8_ymBFvU5X8VqTTTEwGwrxJPVt1JbC2m7j8EUlNiUY_2AsjtyOYSMpQ8EhNFQqZD_ceFUQF8oLo9eDq2n7hlE-WVmGnZo9tTzEdd4PNqLw59VOW1rKHBUdlLkXXNRecYZktiFqiH4I9E5_QOeZAoW--p_vl0Mbec0x-3mqKdpqajGAQFRvJg7TS_VzFnkp_ET-nL8N2DcVhb6AnP_WrcwlADzgfdEU6fJluORVePbPF1GEM35VAT5lbfDyZkwZrtmnRxNGYzlIoxAUWB8CYAgSLg3ILxeDTXtyXEE2oWMnlg%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ac63d21371f45638fc0daf2e189bc8e&_e=gFama0ek8TCIjMQ5SLXXFtxj1l0jofQMSCVi8zc3mKUpRlJxV9YAPNvGKqxYdREgIadY7PFpZZJoqdM_SbsEsKBZ9yz8h8uym7wHWHnY-fQWa8y59iprjGMYNzN0RJEOWNrfIaLnYgXTiQaWKHdCivNhL28w-GqqZnvuLcA0y8X7b4IEmc9_J852bwMIwy_zzD09lg05Lhx6nLMedxZg_aO9PbifCgB5GL6QtMLjoW2EpmSi8XbpXXRCzqZoZKc5qUlK723HkThwJThXuuNaAA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ac63d21371f45638fc0daf2e189bc8e&_e=gFama0ek8TCIjMQ5SLXXFtxj1l0jofQMSCVi8zc3mKUpRlJxV9YAPNvGKqxYdREgIadY7PFpZZJoqdM_SbsEsKBZ9yz8h8uym7wHWHnY-fQWa8y59iprjGMYNzN0RJEORvdEFRquuTcjjmrTj7JImrp_g6w0o7DEfPTZWApQJXxoJ-ndPboGo1fIVyFKDbBONXsPaHbQPyuroyRz3JCcZUAWlz9iinYExXE_YVhGNcSXPB7iNuKW1L8dT80R_m_r1l5ZwfkJ9gW2CLJesLrU-A%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ac63d21371f45638fc0daf2e189bc8e&_e=gFama0ek8TCIjMQ5SLXXFtxj1l0jofQMSCVi8zc3mKUpRlJxV9YAPNvGKqxYdREgIadY7PFpZZJoqdM_SbsEsKBZ9yz8h8uym7wHWHnY-fQWa8y59iprjGMYNzN0RJEOsY3CfUdsvOPn9sCfD8ThkgHoyoiZCK4b52AE12snRmg4IoyAaAFnSoNFVLGELMyEHgdM2bWQwO5mMwp2ox6ikpRPGiB0drNBCy7fHMsUYXFGlx68JKJBUJjqIguQps_feFidYm-krmdvfIiB6HGLxA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ac63d21371f45638fc0daf2e189bc8e&_e=gFama0ek8TCIjMQ5SLXXFtxj1l0jofQMSCVi8zc3mKUpRlJxV9YAPNvGKqxYdREgIadY7PFpZZJoqdM_SbsEsKBZ9yz8h8uym7wHWHnY-fQWa8y59iprjGMYNzN0RJEOX4IHHUH_9X1xnHqVL9uFINFW2bJ-hRe-7XiVLoGloPoc9-gxEtvs9_BQwgn2hSwvInemRsKhDkKuvY5N4OijRisNKhHwvtpOTTW_Tiw0FvNqaER8okt2-q5S0MMqh7nfeyll15vQ6vFSSzUcRE02FQ%3D%3D)

Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff75de50a2124595a2075c7105e2e361&_e=fB1-yNRGYhAbZTY5D3H3tKTcCJRSu-kxjgYViMSyqdj7H17M1TVxKgcpIgpHZ4WhA7zLrwMBpjuo0ZeQXH9-kfyZxHMxF5TzjbJi8e37H8Bkctc6K8FrN_s-6rVPpIKWom4NmcDf7tqJdfAjpL_VvKdbvVc6AN5V7w2eT6XtxFD-3BQTEqZHHDC0Q--fIzRMWpArDYop3ImxBjfHOj0U0gfgqZwQ4sSXjl4LL4K91glcwvbjnx_1VWGQNzVmDn8IEJvh8L5Ia9qI-rks0w6-8iH0oyfYh8JM1bzGQxVQVAbX5Iay1FnUK8_xDr8NYHwsdeFcGoEFBWUf9bDJ0TKt3RX5uqZhH7i7nz4FRhE_qvmSYJl2KRJt9hnPPCCiOQMjI6CGs4QRTJzxzyo2e-HkgLnb2pErfaisE5aLW-6tjrVnqxpwstWYz7d7NzGRGkZg) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff75de50a2124595a2075c7105e2e361&_e=fB1-yNRGYhAbZTY5D3H3tKTcCJRSu-kxjgYViMSyqdj7H17M1TVxKgcpIgpHZ4WhA7zLrwMBpjuo0ZeQXH9-kfyZxHMxF5TzjbJi8e37H8Bkctc6K8FrN_s-6rVPpIKWom4NmcDf7tqJdfAjpL_VvKdbvVc6AN5V7w2eT6XtxFD-3BQTEqZHHDC0Q--fIzRMWpArDYop3ImxBjfHOj0U0gfgqZwQ4sSXjl4LL4K91glcwvbjnx_1VWGQNzVmDn8IEJvh8L5Ia9qI-rks0w6-8iH0oyfYh8JM1bzGQxVQVAbygvvDnnk0ZNmdHFajJZD5o5V874yp43Jgr5hB9F7bGedbm-F7Zs6Xt5vKPSAU-WswfEcT3TJxb3qoMyrjtsV1Va3IxbVhB3D1x7H7z2V_621tfvK-wxWPmlQHy7M1GJ1MKXNyYDY6HAxPc_0mioGu)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff75de50a2124595a2075c7105e2e361&_e=fB1-yNRGYhAbZTY5D3H3tKTcCJRSu-kxjgYViMSyqdj7H17M1TVxKgcpIgpHZ4WhA7zLrwMBpjuo0ZeQXH9-kfyZxHMxF5TzjbJi8e37H8Bkctc6K8FrN_s-6rVPpIKWom4NmcDf7tqJdfAjpL_VvKdbvVc6AN5V7w2eT6XtxFD-3BQTEqZHHDC0Q--fIzRMWpArDYop3ImxBjfHOj0U0gfgqZwQ4sSXjl4LL4K91glcwvbjnx_1VWGQNzVmDn8IEJvh8L5Ia9qI-rks0w6-8iH0oyfYh8JM1bzGQxVQVAaQUTct7wY8flhyfBJnLGlIfI1OBtOjSud-ix0Faety_xDCA8d4XuodFu15D2eoQqIDN7dlCY5uLhJONd1itNZxfqwQB2_Y63E7Au7FMYRebGaFnejJcnozqHiGPCwLJnyTiBHSivbX6KLGE6KMOBCm)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff75de50a2124595a2075c7105e2e361&_e=fB1-yNRGYhAbZTY5D3H3tKTcCJRSu-kxjgYViMSyqdj7H17M1TVxKgcpIgpHZ4WhA7zLrwMBpjuo0ZeQXH9-kfyZxHMxF5TzjbJi8e37H8Bkctc6K8FrN_s-6rVPpIKWom4NmcDf7tqJdfAjpL_VvKdbvVc6AN5V7w2eT6XtxFD-3BQTEqZHHDC0Q--fIzRMWpArDYop3ImxBjfHOj0U0gfgqZwQ4sSXjl4LL4K91glcwvbjnx_1VWGQNzVmDn8IEJvh8L5Ia9qI-rks0w6-8iH0oyfYh8JM1bzGQxVQVAYQC23-haNFQzuSZ4TQk8DTaixKPf0gnPlhkoyLJSOX8oThkLvcPM4Cdk62oES3fHMx82l901rt7kmKrXc-DAo8ph1MxjrTgkw06zFSPLd6_lgbryeJ5OqMqzJmiK3raWc28z_0G8NO_6lmYY86sKm6) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff75de50a2124595a2075c7105e2e361&_e=fB1-yNRGYhAbZTY5D3H3tKTcCJRSu-kxjgYViMSyqdj7H17M1TVxKgcpIgpHZ4WhA7zLrwMBpjuo0ZeQXH9-kfyZxHMxF5TzjbJi8e37H8Bkctc6K8FrN_s-6rVPpIKWom4NmcDf7tqJdfAjpL_VvKdbvVc6AN5V7w2eT6XtxFD-3BQTEqZHHDC0Q--fIzRMWpArDYop3ImxBjfHOj0U0gfgqZwQ4sSXjl4LL4K91glcwvbjnx_1VWGQNzVmDn8IEJvh8L5Ia9qI-rks0w6-8iH0oyfYh8JM1bzGQxVQVAYFaWawrHMbQOjHbUjzQc-ZzYJyW96nIYOB81upGx9pH9Fgq5sbyvBdyL8PKEUfdpqdOeqSQ17qeTwKS7sI7DYkKFfMdx4Gb70r6omGMm92mYl93paoJWJ1T8bjaa8p-PhjI85zU_F_xJ6EtWvdKrb9)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff75de50a2124595a2075c7105e2e361&_e=fB1-yNRGYhAbZTY5D3H3tKTcCJRSu-kxjgYViMSyqdj7H17M1TVxKgcpIgpHZ4WhA7zLrwMBpjuo0ZeQXH9-kfyZxHMxF5TzjbJi8e37H8Bkctc6K8FrN_s-6rVPpIKWom4NmcDf7tqJdfAjpL_VvKdbvVc6AN5V7w2eT6XtxFD-3BQTEqZHHDC0Q--fIzRMWpArDYop3ImxBjfHOj0U0gfgqZwQ4sSXjl4LL4K91glcwvbjnx_1VWGQNzVmDn8IEJvh8L5Ia9qI-rks0w6-8iH0oyfYh8JM1bzGQxVQVAZWNkYcpyMrHLv4_YCMEkfKyRnedPBmdiPgwdzs9MsQW5ZHuW37WQncZtRDRlt5aLvEtTwNNC2WHOnYSNUabQ51RaCOk-ihGur2ZNtmD098nb6n1SJNL1TV13zUlSJ-moAaUNT0f3itZDmTP6pSKnDP) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z79fe8t942k370u70063lidjbgsrdtbi02m4cfog_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm4o72cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zf1a1t87avl5tfeib63db65s3a7boedbdmu6f4eg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm4o72cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgg2gmjtbqarnqltj2lhos5o63rkqq6qf23k3d6o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm4o72cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: BREAKING: Republicans pass censure resolution
body:
MAGA Republicans officially passed their resolution to censure me.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab1b4c4a-4750-4a3c-a7d1-1715555c05e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Last month, Kevin McCarthy took up the resolution attacking me for holding Trump accountable. After Trump threatened a primary challenge against any Republican who refused to vote for it, MAGA Republicans officially passed their resolution to censure me. Why? Because I upheld my oath of office and held Donald Trump accountable for his many abuses of power. [They will never silence me — not now and not ever — but I need your help to fight back. If you can, split an urgent $10 contribution to Blue Amp Action and our campaign right now to help us respond to this unprecedented political attack and show the strength of our campaign.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8821bd80-f6f7-4361-b070-218222d7744b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc6e59df-a168-44a6-ad53-1b1db0312d80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We face many pressing challenges as a country — affordable housing, access to health care, creating jobs, and so much more. Instead of addressing any of these challenges, Kevin McCarthy chose to take up this MAGA effort to distract from Donald Trump’s legal problems. They will never stop doing his bidding. We've already known that the GOP is completely unhinged and beholden to Donald Trump. With his call now to imprison me and primary any Republican who didn’t vote to censure me, Trump is telling the entire Republican Party that they must seek retribution against me politically and do whatever they can to prevent me from being elected to the Senate. This is not just a political stunt to rile up the MAGA base — it’s an attack on all accountability and constitutional oversight. But make no mistake: If they thought this was going to deter me from holding Trump and his accomplices accountable or delivering real results for California and our nation, they thought wrong. I will not stop my fight to put truth and our democracy first — even if it means standing up to a twice-impeached ex-president and his lackeys. [With Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans ramping up their attacks against me, I’m going to need you by my side more than ever. Will you split a grassroots donation of $10 to help Blue Amp Action and me stand up to the GOP’s attacks?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T210161ad-fad7-4777-bf88-fa4baec44f9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---
| | | MAGA Republicans may have voted to censure me, but I will always use my voice to hold them accountable. No matter what political retribution they throw at me next. Let’s work together to push back against these attacks on our democracy. Thank you, — Adam

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf34bbc2-3ed8-4922-9414-627a1ff969a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Stop the slaughter of wolves before it’s too late
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **The first Colorado wolf pups in 80 years are dead. Help their pack and the planet: Donate $27 now and help us reach our $3,100 goal.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902985?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902986?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902987?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902988?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Mangled fur.
Limp bodies.
Three young wolves, bloody and lifeless.
These were some of Colorado’s _**first wild-born wolf pups in more than 80 years.**_ Protected by the state, they were a symbol of hope for repopulation efforts. But wolves aren’t bound by state lines. The second they set their tiny paws onto Wyoming soil, they became fair game to trophy hunters. Sure enough, **bloodthirsty trophy hunters SHOT and KILLED them near the Wyoming border.** [**Friend, how long will we let vicious hunters decimate America’s wildlife? Donate $27 now and help us reach our $3,100 goal to help protect wolves and the planet! **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902989?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Now, these vicious hunters and Big Polluters are fighting back against vital protections for wolves. If wolves aren’t protected, hunters could kill them with free rein. Big Polluters could take over their lands for mining and logging. The consequences for wolves and the planet could be disastrous, Friend. __But it’s not too late to stop their plans.__ Thanks to members like you, we can still make real change happen and protect wolves and the planet before the loss is too great!
**Don’t let greedy interests line their pockets at the expense of vulnerable wolves and the planet. Donate $27 now!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902985?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902986?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902987?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902988?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
As soon as the Trump administration cut federal protections for gray wolves, trophy hunters went on a _killing spree._ **Hundreds of wolves were murdered in a matter of days!** Colorado conservationists are working against the odds to do the right thing for wolves and the forests they call home. But Colorado’s wolves can be LEGALLY tortured and killed as soon as they cross state lines.
It gets worse, Friend: trophy hunters are killing off wolves in more violent ways than you can imagine. In states like Montana, Idaho, and Wyoming, hunters use tactics like **dynamiting mama wolves in their dens** as they nurse their pups. They set steel traps, leaving wolves to spend their last hours **bleeding out in a futile attempt to escape.**
Not even wolves in Yellowstone are safe from the pattern. **The park recently lost a record high of 25 wolves, leaving only 89 behind.** Yet _the states that border Yellowstone still have limited safeguards_ to keep gray wolves safe from vicious trophy hunters and their inhumane practices!
As you read this, trophy hunters and Big Oil lobbies are pushing against protections for these precious creatures, hoping to kill them for sport and invade their habitats for the sake of corporate greed. Their actions have contributed to the gutting of the Endangered Species Act and protections for wolves, bears, and other vulnerable species -- and now, only __**6,000 wolves remain in the lower 48 states.**__ The time to act is now, while there are still wolves left to save!
**Help stop the slaughter before it’s too late. Rush your $27 donation now to help us reach our $3,100 goal for wolves and the planet.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902985?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902986?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902987?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902988?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Believe it or not, wolves are vital to the ecosystems they live in. They help keep elk and deer populations in check, allowing other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, the remains of their kills redistribute nutrients and feed scavengers. They truly are a keystone species!
That’s why each death of this iconic species is a big deal. Since a Trump-era rule rolled back federal protections for gray wolves, the trophy hunting lobby has pushed for even more cruel and inhumane laws throughout wolves’ natural habitats. And even worse, **the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service could reinstate federal protections for these creatures -- but has still failed to do so!**
We can’t stand aside while our wolves are under attack. If even young pups aren’t safe from brutal hunters, this majestic species won’t stand a chance. Friends of the Earth is fighting back to end the bloody violence against our last surviving wolf packs. That means we’re fighting with everything we have to protect the Endangered Species Act. The ESA allows us to shield endangered and threatened species from senseless violence and also block destructive industries like Big Oil, logging and factory farming from destroying vital habitats for profits.
But we’re up against the powerful hunting lobby and their big industry allies, and we urgently need the help of activists like you to make sure we hit our crucial $3,100 goal. Please, Friend: if just 1 of every 8 people reading this makes a $27 membership gift, we can reach our goal and help save wolves and the planet before time is up. Will you make your membership contribution today?
**These hunting practices can’t continue. Donate $27 and help us reach our $3,100 goal to save wolves and the planet.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902985?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902986?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902987?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1902988?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Raena Garcia
Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|
##### Contact Us:
Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](http://foe.org/about-us/contact/)
---
##### Email Preferences:
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/subscribe?campaignpageurl=https%3A%2F%2Faction.foe.org%2Fpage%2F2555%2Fsubscriptions%2F1%3Fea.broadcast.id%3D250132&ea.campaigner.email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC)

name: Dan Kildee
subject: Hey, I know it’s early, but I need to reach you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| I know it’s early, but I need to reach you.

Having strength in numbers is critical for our 2024 success. Because of redistricting, we’re going to continue as a “top target” for National Republicans this election cycle.

And now that they’ve launched yet another misleading attack against my record in Congress, hitting our goal is even more critical, because it determines our ability to fight back with the truth.

**_[I’ve counted on grassroots supporters like you to help my team through some pretty big moments for my campaign in the past. Can I count on you again? Click here to help my team raise the last $4,500 we need online before Monday night.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67228186/419040151/-630682683?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230729_FR_1.4_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmVhODQ0NS0wMzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kIXzlJ7cCwm55l-zgYh2z31v2-t1OQ-ocLqEOksni88=)_**

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/supportdan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67228187/419040152/-630682683?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230729_FR_1.4_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmVhODQ0NS0wMzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kIXzlJ7cCwm55l-zgYh2z31v2-t1OQ-ocLqEOksni88=)_**

Thank you for all you do,

Dan

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Thirty years advancing the conservative cause - update from Mississippi’s favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11570954?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**What were you doing thirty years ago? **

In August 1993, a younger looking Bill Clinton had recently moved into the White House. Whitney Houston’s “I will always love you” was topping the charts. John Grisham’s novel, _The Firm_ , had been made into a recently released movie, alongside the original _Jurassic Park_.
---
|
---
| Personally, I had just graduated from university, and spent August ‘93 with a pilot friend flying around France in an old Piper Cub.

**Much more important, August 1993 was the month that a small group of intrepid conservatives established the first office of Mississippi Family Council. This was the organization that was to become the Mississippi Center for Public Policy.**

For three decades, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy has been advancing the cause of liberty. **We are committed to Mississippi for the long haul.**

**Here are some of the Mississippi Center for Public Policy’s big wins:**

* **Tax cuts:** In 2022, we helped deliver Mississippi’s largest ever tax cut, reducing the state income tax to a flat 4 percent.
* **Anti-woke:** Last year, we authored a new law to combat Critical Race Theory in the classroom.
* **Cut red tape:** In 2021, we helped lead efforts to introduce a universal occupational licensing law, which has helped deregulate labor markets by removing onerous red tape.
* **School Choice:** In 2013, we helped pass a law to allow Charter Schools in our state, and we have been fierce advocates for education freedom.
* **Mississippi Justice Institute:** Our legal arm has won over a dozen cases in defense of individual freedom.

**__There is so much more that needs to be done – and we need a sense of urgency and energy to make it happen!__**

The past thirty years has seen some remarkable economic growth across many southern states. Georgia and Tennessee have really taken off. Texas and Florida have become business and commercial centers to rival, if not eclipse, California or Chicago.

Mississippi can become part of this southern success story – but that will only happen once we adopt the unapologetically free market approach found elsewhere

**_Instead of cutting the income tax to 4 percent, we need to eliminate it as Tennessee and Texas have. _**

**_Instead of a handful of Charter Schools, we need to give every family in our state a legal right to control their child’s share of education tax dollars, as Arkansas is doing from 2025._**

**_Rather than expect federal subsidies to generate wealth via economic development, we need to remove the tax and regulatory hurdles that keep business investment on the other side of the state line._**

I am super excited that the Mississippi Center for Public Policy is thirty years old.** But I am even more excited about the prospect of us really taking on and changing some of the fundamental things that hold back our state.**

Have a wonderful weekend!

---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e1ba2a845b&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **_Ps. Our Fall Speaker Series is starting to take shape. Have a look at some of the brilliant speakers coming to Mississippi [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f3bcd401ad&e=5703353baa) and make a note of the dates in your calendar. _**
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=13c4ca28e2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=13c4ca28e2).

subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea8123c1a88f40718500fc550c8e4787&_e=MX39rWOo_lcb366vho_qYfSCwAzo5MzCZ948_JThu5vUfqStvgEL5iNpoH-2r40tY7rDX_JNKCzSCOUSAmHHA6c3i7_Q5VarL5KL7uqr6Kv7P6pqVScQDrMXdDWmK8CzGhAJgiVqptmSUP6Go4G4RlBLhkwZpvHOdeRv0308dW7MOiMmSnHOBswCTNzOvk72phCY8T3_nBqwbeCQLOBqbjWOW5qARFyqQryhw0uZLlZ21QJtKuZc0t5WKMSAvyw9MdQG4wrMXjaY6ARwtaXr0DGJrB7DtctOvXIxbBnclqTa_FjOe3P7AHCp2gapNjI3I40SvboJ--jRMw69CKyMLX3_4kuxHOA7v8SF4-RqyLYDDJ-YE5iWiXuxdegtvAjZbpRf98y8QsJf_II37-Mj5yv9g-FvGi9deYy_DshFIcHCHwtjanf5HRXjSF7P0z4A) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea8123c1a88f40718500fc550c8e4787&_e=MX39rWOo_lcb366vho_qYfSCwAzo5MzCZ948_JThu5vUfqStvgEL5iNpoH-2r40tY7rDX_JNKCzSCOUSAmHHA6c3i7_Q5VarL5KL7uqr6Kv7P6pqVScQDrMXdDWmK8CzGhAJgiVqptmSUP6Go4G4RlBLhkwZpvHOdeRv0308dW7MOiMmSnHOBswCTNzOvk72phCY8T3_nBqwbeCQLOBqbjWOW5qARFyqQryhw0uZLlZ21QJtKuZc0t5WKMSAvyw9MdQG4wrMXjaY6ARwtaXr0DGJrB7DtctOvXIxbBnclqSd3I6pQ9l_Tz1Ul3YWg7foh_KC0_UE7_Ro4sEUe91nNpCFhRQJTi7EtRZX51Zz6EMd7lJB8VAnn0IqpWhqo0Wp5kAuN8z-Nupqm15rTW-tGLX9Ve8NCMyMV9sL66aOCznv1kZPj1aomRVR1jNxL1bm)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea8123c1a88f40718500fc550c8e4787&_e=MX39rWOo_lcb366vho_qYfSCwAzo5MzCZ948_JThu5vUfqStvgEL5iNpoH-2r40tY7rDX_JNKCzSCOUSAmHHA6c3i7_Q5VarL5KL7uqr6Kv7P6pqVScQDrMXdDWmK8CzGhAJgiVqptmSUP6Go4G4RlBLhkwZpvHOdeRv0308dW7MOiMmSnHOBswCTNzOvk72phCY8T3_nBqwbeCQLOBqbjWOW5qARFyqQryhw0uZLlZ21QJtKuZc0t5WKMSAvyw9MdQG4wrMXjaY6ARwtaXr0DGJrB7DtctOvXIxbBnclqRFrm-2f9L1bnDcs7IUSJTtGVEY9dNUKxrZzHbKQfflhldkidwoI9W6MVYYInD80RQh81BV1IGjN0CazIec4Pa88faJZdW3PhGK_gZorCV6hKtkkpXM-58BvzfWsoupySFRXNB-tuN3LhlKOJZfrHRo)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea8123c1a88f40718500fc550c8e4787&_e=MX39rWOo_lcb366vho_qYfSCwAzo5MzCZ948_JThu5vUfqStvgEL5iNpoH-2r40tY7rDX_JNKCzSCOUSAmHHA6c3i7_Q5VarL5KL7uqr6Kv7P6pqVScQDrMXdDWmK8CzGhAJgiVqptmSUP6Go4G4RlBLhkwZpvHOdeRv0308dW7MOiMmSnHOBswCTNzOvk72phCY8T3_nBqwbeCQLOBqbjWOW5qARFyqQryhw0uZLlZ21QJtKuZc0t5WKMSAvyw9MdQG4wrMXjaY6ARwtaXr0DGJrB7DtctOvXIxbBnclqSNqZqtIduIw5BkqW6v6LpXv6bFA4UnnzIgtLKgGbGZP3WVHoE3vQPmbZg49g6KSvDRassbprBrggbhMcZ5xI6trMn3yfylwBAsvzLIYa366vnGxiC3zUi_3ksQ-gp3-Pj7UTa8pXSV32td06Zu14L8) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ea8123c1a88f40718500fc550c8e4787&_e=MX39rWOo_lcb366vho_qYfSCwAzo5MzCZ948_JThu5vUfqStvgEL5iNpoH-2r40tY7rDX_JNKCzSCOUSAmHHA6c3i7_Q5VarL5KL7uqr6Kv7P6pqVScQDrMXdDWmK8CzGhAJgiVqptmSUP6Go4G4RlBLhkwZpvHOdeRv0308dW7MOiMmSnHOBswCTNzOvk72phCY8T3_nBqwbeCQLOBqbjWOW5qARFyqQryhw0uZLlZ21QJtKuZc0t5WKMSAvyw9MdQG4wrMXjaY6ARwtaXr0DGJrB7DtctOvXIxbBnclqTdsR_TZR_8kNQpaItoGofSSZlgoX3CtszwjaxonXZuQKEQmUfBmSkv2NLqdhUZF1NYzEc1gglAtX-ltqJFtmzlSiWlWyzz3ordpfkZ16vpPku1CQLag53lCE6bRmX-JFXyY-H4uixVoEM780AzXx7T)"** on DVD today.
