clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06a10165b8ed439d8a2838eaed2c9320&_e=wADQCTwFYebk4stW831FBxBxnRGt0xx3s3Q_fcSiUEBpKKmBOARitDqZNa9A4M_icv-Wrgaw71-L2Liv2gxsDYueo48UKmdDG-BHl8kMUCHap70tm7nr9lAwwi8VWM0_wTbAHsBTDsY--fkGaKk7L4DILEPoduc56vLjCbbK3LfG8KT1FEk47O2GmL72_ThL8u6w_EW9Wzryk2go4b8MLKWPUkprNO_HIfWAPBh0nmRu4LnrJQKPQZxkCusT2UqfefsBJZK403qzJ7HhwPyiUuoR84340oXNI9mu8d9joViwG9XE9mwwTi0veRdetfFKSkuIBjc2JE0FzrDwp3DnHCTAW48owSyHpiNzWvqxLsc0dh4LSE3D0PGiUAusyqnQZnusaBqGIIToSN88F-7WQ10bRU53lQV-Wa4Kjn9It0xqvWpNsB90-HCNUAppf1agFyzej4fm6j4uxGjEVVu1eNARua4cGC9swz7C_X_N2Jg%3D)

Friend --

I wish things would have gone a different way...

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. **
| **Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**
---

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for our help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06a10165b8ed439d8a2838eaed2c9320&_e=wADQCTwFYebk4stW831FBxBxnRGt0xx3s3Q_fcSiUEBpKKmBOARitDqZNa9A4M_icv-Wrgaw71-L2Liv2gxsDYueo48UKmdDG-BHl8kMUCHap70tm7nr9lAwwi8VWM0_wTbAHsBTDsY--fkGaKk7L4DILEPoduc56vLjCbbK3LfG8KT1FEk47O2GmL72_ThL8u6w_EW9Wzryk2go4b8MLKWPUkprNO_HIfWAPBh0nmRu4LnrJQKPQZxkCusT2UqfefsBJZK403qzJ7HhwPyiUuoR84340oXNI9mu8d9joViwG9XE9mwwTi0veRdetfFKRfsuWgmtFLsy8TrKUfHeB7Gm0mVYHjkaSayn5J452Fkivx7QHjDnpSfAQdL0Hy3pUXQF5685P5hJ0_drv1aRgInhwGP6MdW6O_p3W_rQMGXalExP33Ka7LD1EWgzB1bAtYnp4ThhGxdObQRs-8Fe4U40-yVULEORLIpx8DHh2Ow%3D "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06a10165b8ed439d8a2838eaed2c9320&_e=wADQCTwFYebk4stW831FBxBxnRGt0xx3s3Q_fcSiUEBpKKmBOARitDqZNa9A4M_icv-Wrgaw71-L2Liv2gxsDYueo48UKmdDG-BHl8kMUCHap70tm7nr9lAwwi8VWM0_wTbAHsBTDsY--fkGaKk7L4DILEPoduc56vLjCbbK3LfG8KT1FEk47O2GmL72_ThL8u6w_EW9Wzryk2go4b8MLKWPUkprNO_HIfWAPBh0nmRu4LnrJQKPQZxkCusT2UqfefsBJZK403qzJ7HhwPyiUuoR84340oXNI9mu8d9joViwG9XE9mwwTi0veRdetfFKV_FgrxOi7omeJWJVENfJu7QzaXfhKNCfTNhqngmlUKDHs_7_PPmNI9AO13lE79lGQJyJmnkKRcMnST_ceAeow15IZzNuLpAFgC73o3EDi-V0VrZeiMC5L4bBMq4dcLunELHgY2Y1av16Pe5Q3NsBx6AXzf131RFdWa62e5BuYvc%3D)

clean_body: This is probably the hardest email I've ever written. | | | | | | | Friend -- I wish things would have gone a different way... This is probably the hardest email I've ever written. I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation. After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, and I had to concede my race. | Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control. Everyone expected me to just walk away - but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up. I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again. The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up. My stomach is in knots - the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do). That 's why I'm humbly asking for our help: "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?" I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work. The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me. The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. Forever. I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out: | | | God bless you, and God bless America. Mayra Flores America First Candidate Texas Congressional District 34 | | Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress PO BOX 341027 Austin, TX 78734 Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlfoig488ca6v7sejpv5n2u8scc5nmlc5m4757g0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm6ob1clh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfvrmembdjs8uj6mrk2herdd77kabsmtb953v8k0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm6ob1clh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znsub4cduidep578qc0m94sglop7qjo4uht7sa9g_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm6ob1clh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8gf5jep2fgaotidf311uvqc4o2b68l998kqq908_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm6ob1clh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z96rhe3sqim6uad2uo6dvpim56pvamk4rgel1f1o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm6ob1clh2bs)

Kash Patel

---|---|---
The prevailing consensus among most Mississippians, and arguably the general south, is that Mississippi is a very stable red state because we have a Republican supermajority. We are the heart of the Bible Belt. The truth is, we are not. In fact, regarding Mississippi legislation, we are a deep purple state. There is clearly one disturbing reason why. In 1979, the Mississippi Supreme Court decision in the _Brown v. Stone_ case ruled that a religious exemption was unconstitutional.[[i]](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0b401f64-e589-40f7-9f0d-697d9345c536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) For 44 years, Mississippi's children attending school have had to be vaccinated with the full pediatric vaccination schedule. Furthermore, Mississippi's vaccine laws continued to violate _The Religious Freedom Restoration Act of 2014_ by the most restrictive means.[[ii]](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/82a4bb4a-3c59-4997-abef-d93cb1de6f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With the Supreme Court ruling in place from 1979, Mississippi families were catapulted back to tyranny and usurpations - the same type of tyranny of which the American Founders warned us. Most of the organized work to restore medical and religious freedom came from incredibly gifted parents and advocates who understood that the family was the first institution designed by God and that government does not grant rights to citizens; it secures them and is of the people, for the people, and by the people. These families understood well what the U.S. Constitution's Ninth and Tenth Amendments meant. These families co-founded Mississippi Parents for Vaccine Rights and Medical Freedom, and they worked for well over a decade in an impeccably organized manner to effect change through the legislative process, gaining armies of families along the journey.
For almost 14 years, the so-called conservative leadership in Mississippi has failed, and miserably so. Through bicameral legislative attempts, over 23 bills have been advocated for through the Mississippi legislature, only to die on the calendar or in committee. These bills all sought religious or medical freedoms for Mississippi children and families. This super-majority Republican legislature killed every one of these life-giving, principled bills.
Clearly, this is a huge hot-button issue. And there are many that rebut and argue the recent Federal ruling that has set a precedent for the nation. The haters have certainly arisen with their rhetoric about all the "humanity killing, anti-vax, nutjob quacks." We see it. We read it. And even these lightweight, misaligned, self-proclaimed conservative outlets propagate ignorance. We will not stop appealing to reason with objective truth and hard-core facts time and time again until there is no one left to hear. It is our duty, and we gladly take up the banner.
With deep conviction and an appeal to reason tempered through the art of argument, we list eight of the most urgent points to submit for your consideration regarding the topic. We do so for the sake of truth. An utmost priority when forming core values and convictions is to have a holistic perspective when discussing a matter, especially a topic that is undeniably charged. Consider the following:
1) Forty-four states permit their citizens to educate their children in the school system while also allowing religious objections to mandated childhood vaccinations. Until the recent Mississippi federal court order, Mississippi was a radical outlier. One of the very few states that suppressed religious freedoms in the vaccination arena. California and New York are amongst the remaining five states that have eradicated religious freedom in the childhood vaccination arena. Again, Mississippi has now joined the super-majority of states that respect religious freedom. The sky is not going to fall.
2) Many Mississippians have profound objections to abortion, and several of the required vaccines were developed using the chopped-up body parts of normally developing children. For example, in just one study related to the development of vaccines, at least seventy-six normally developing babies were aborted, and while keeping the fetuses alive to harvest their body parts, nearly every body part was chopped up into little cubes to culture viruses on, including their tongues, livers, intestines, pituitary glands, kidneys, and hearts. Here is a [link](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bc7acb14-e3f8-4382-88a0-e70c2db4e179?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the deposition of Dr. Stanley Plotkin--referred to as the "Godfather of vaccines"\--where he candidly discusses working with mutilated body parts of normally developing babies in furtherance of his vaccination research.[[iii]](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d0fddb7d-0932-4c81-8a9b-c20b5a969500?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
3) Also, many required vaccines under Mississippi law contain genetic and cellular material derived from aborted fetuses - materials that are injected directly into children's bodies as a condition of receiving an education in Mississippi. This is plainly stated on the package inserts for several of the required vaccines. For example, [according to CDC documents](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/003c962c-c12e-4ee9-9743-2988a0c05b11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "WI-38 human diploid lung fibroblasts" is listed as an ingredient of the MMR vaccine, and "MRC-5 human diploid cells including DNA & protein" is listed as an ingredient of the Varicella (Chicken Pox) vaccine.[[iv]](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3c1d68e4-7063-42b1-b471-c352117f4deb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
4) There are some families in Mississippi, although they are admittedly very few, that have profound religious objections to injecting these materials into their children's bodies, although the Pope and evangelical denominations say they endorse the practice.
5) Whether or not the mandated vaccines are "safe and effective" are irrelevant to families' religious objections to participating in abortion (or to any other religious objection to vaccination). However, it must be noted that in the childhood vaccination arena, "safe" is a relative term. In 1986, Congress gave vaccine manufacturers complete and total liability protection from vaccine injuries (primarily because they were about to be sued into bankruptcy due to vaccine injuries). The National Childhood Vaccine Injury Act of 1986 was passed. In other words, since 1986, you cannot sue a vaccine manufacturer if your child is injured by a vaccine. Rather, since 1986, taxpayers, instead of the pharmaceutical companies, have paid out billions of dollars to the families of vaccine-injured children in what is called the "vaccine court" (in Washington, D.C.). It is, therefore, disingenuous to argue that the mandated vaccines are undisputedly "safe." Like all pharmaceutical products, there is a risk profile. However, for childhood vaccines--the only pharmaceutical product that virtually the entire U.S. population is mandated to take--there is much less incentive now for vaccine manufacturers to make a safer product because of the 1986 Act. Why would they make a safer product if taxpayers foot the bill for vaccine injuries? Paying for further safety research, especially research that may reveal safety issues of past products, is simply a bad business decision under the current system. The companies are not evil for continuing the current system, they are just making good business decisions.
6) Since the National Childhood Vaccination Injury Act of 1986 was passed, the number of required vaccines has exploded. Again, it is just a good business model. The more liability-free products that are mandated onto the population, the better. Prior to the Act, when liability for injuries was attached to the manufacturers, there were only a select few vaccines required for school. Consequently, many, if not most, of the teachers in the school system born before 1986 have not received all of the currently required vaccines. This has been the case for almost 40 years now. And again, the sky has not fallen.
7) Mississippi has one of the highest vaccination rates in the country (around 99%). If the vaccines are truly protective, the entire debate about the purported dangers of allowing families to exercise their religious beliefs revolves around a tiny fraction of unvaccinated children. If the products are truly effective, how is allowing an unvaccinated child to receive a formal education going to endanger the 99% of vaccinated children in school?
8) American Jurisprudence is founded on the Decalogue, the Ten Commandments. It is the Higher Moral Law of God. God's Law is objective, not subjective. The Higher Moral Law of God is the cornerstone of our nation. We do not force our beliefs on anyone, nor should we. It is what makes our Constitutional Republic unique and special. However, The Right of Conscience is the most sacred of inalienable rights, and a person's conscience is what drives their core values, morals, ethics, and religion. By founding intent, we are pillared and structured as a nation to fiercely protect the Right of Conscience for every American citizen. The government, under no circumstance, has the Constitutional authority to usurp power or rule over an individual's conscience. It is the ultimate governmental violation. The government exists of the people, by the people, and for the people. Otherwise, you have tyranny. We need to restore liberty and freedom to our nation per the Ninth and Tenth Amendments.
Because the legislative route failed year in and year out to uphold the Constitution of the United States and to protect the inalienable rights of every citizen, especially of our vulnerable children, ICAN's attorneys, headed by Aaron Siri, Esq., clinched one of the most monumental court cases in history in April of 2023. A federal judge issued a preliminary injunction that required Mississippi to provide religious exemptions to families, especially those who would like their children to be able to attend school without one or more of the vaccines on the state's pediatric vaccine schedule. By July 15, 2023, the Mississippi Department of Health had a deadline to provide Mississippi citizens an exemption avenue for their children to be able to attend school. In the time between, the Court issued a _39-page[Memorandum Opinion and Order](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9e79a76a-1be9-4754-beee-6b6697536f1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ to expound on the ruling and the reason for the ruling. Many Mississippi families are already filling the appointment slots at the health departments to fill out the necessary paperwork. Do be patient; many of the workers have just learned of the federal ruling. It will take some time to get the kinks ironed out, but the process will smooth out soon.
You simply cannot be in good American Constitutional standing and favor secularism over faith and the conduct that flows out of a person's deeply seeded religious convictions as a result of that faith. It is the antithesis of the American Founding. After 44 years of egregiously unconstitutional usurpations by modern-day tyrants standing against the Higher Moral Law of God, Mississippi families tasted freedom. But the work is not over. There are five other states still adversely affected by tyrannical legislative oppression that need to be set free. The precedent is set. We implore you to join the fight and share the information you have learned. We ask that you plug into groups such as https://icandecide.org/ to stay caught up on the legal team's efforts around the nation. This could very well be your state next.
In the fight for Mississippi's freedom, it would have been so easy to give up and go home. It is a testament to the resolve of faith-filled, educated families in this state. It is a testament to the profound importance of Constitutional courts and judges. It is a testament to the passion that burns in every one of us who long to be free and have liberty the way God intended. It is a testament to the endurance of the American pioneering spirit, which makes people venture into the unknown and uncharted and unsettled territories to claim something worthy. In the same spirit, we Mississippi families are warriors who are willing to put in the time to pray through and act on the demolition work that needs to be done to bring strongholds down, and we will always, always work to advance the troop movement.
"Sacred duty is ours; results are God's."-John Q. Adams
_Rebecca Chaney is the Director for Restore Liberty Mississippi, and she sits on the board for the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. She is a lifetime Patriot Academy Constitution Coach and has hosted Biblical Citizenship and Constitutional classes since 2020. She has helped to start these classes all across the state of Mississippi. She is a homeschool Mom of seven years to her son and daughter. You can read more of her work at_[https://substack.com/@rebeccachaney](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/10f9983f-818d-48a1-a89e-29b3ff26387a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _and_[www.restore-liberty.org](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6c46cf58-f068-4b2a-8cac-add08bb01730?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

And again, the sky has not fallen. 7) Mississippi has one of the highest vaccination rates in the country (around 99%). If the vaccines are truly protective, the entire debate about the purported dangers of allowing families to exercise their religious beliefs revolves around a tiny fraction of unvaccinated children. If the products are truly effective, how is allowing an unvaccinated child to receive a formal education going to endanger the 99% of vaccinated children in school? 8) American Jurisprudence is founded on the Decalogue, the Ten Commandments. It is the Higher Moral Law of God. God's Law is objective, not subjective. The Higher Moral Law of God is the cornerstone of our nation. We do not force our beliefs on anyone, nor should we. It is what makes our Constitutional Republic unique and special. However, The Right of Conscience is the most sacred of inalienable rights, and a person's conscience is what drives their core values, morals, ethics, and religion. By founding intent, we are pillared and structured as a nation to fiercely protect the Right of Conscience for every American citizen. The government, under no circumstance, has the Constitutional authority to usurp power or rule over an individual's conscience. It is the ultimate governmental violation. The government exists of the people, by the people, and for the people. Otherwise, you have tyranny. We need to restore liberty and freedom to our nation per the Ninth and Tenth Amendments. Because the legislative route failed year in and year out to uphold the Constitution of the United States and to protect the inalienable rights of every citizen, especially of our vulnerable children, ICAN's attorneys, headed by Aaron Siri, Esq., clinched one of the most monumental court cases in history in April of 2023. A federal judge issued a preliminary injunction that required Mississippi to provide religious exemptions to families, especially those who would like their children to be able to attend school without one or more of the vaccines on the state's pediatric vaccine schedule. By July 15, 2023, the Mississippi Department of Health had a deadline to provide Mississippi citizens an exemption avenue for their children to be able to attend school. In the time between, the Court issued a 39-page to expound on the ruling and the reason for the ruling. Many Mississippi families are already filling the appointment slots at the health departments to fill out the necessary paperwork. Do be patient; many of the workers have just learned of the federal ruling. It will take some time to get the kinks ironed out, but the process will smooth out soon. You simply cannot be in good American Constitutional standing and favor secularism over faith and the conduct that flows out of a person's deeply seeded religious convictions as a result of that faith. It is the antithesis of the American Founding. After 44 years of egregiously unconstitutional usurpations by modern-day tyrants standing against the Higher Moral Law of God, Mississippi families tasted freedom. But the work is not over. There are five other states still adversely affected by tyrannical legislative oppression that need to be set free. The precedent is set. We implore you to join the fight and share the information you have learned. We ask that you plug into groups such as to stay caught up on the legal team's efforts around the nation. This could very well be your state next. In the fight for Mississippi's freedom, it would have been so easy to give up and go home. It is a testament to the resolve of faith-filled, educated families in this state. It is a testament to the profound importance of Constitutional courts and judges. It is a testament to the passion that burns in every one of us who long to be free and have liberty the way God intended. It is a testament to the endurance of the American pioneering spirit, which makes people venture into the unknown and uncharted and unsettled territories to claim something worthy. In the same spirit, we Mississippi families are warriors who are willing to put in the time to pray through and act on the demolition work that needs to be done to bring strongholds down, and we will always, always work to advance the troop movement. "Sacred duty is ours; results are God's."-John Q. Adams Rebecca Chaney is the Director for Restore Liberty Mississippi, and she sits on the board for the Mississippi Freedom Caucus. She is a lifetime Patriot Academy Constitution Coach and has hosted Biblical Citizenship and Constitutional classes since 2020. She has helped to start these classes all across the state of Mississippi. She is a homeschool Mom of seven years to her son and daughter. You can read more of her work at and [[i]]() [[ii]]() [[iii]]() [[iv]]() Thanks for reading The Spirit and The Letter ! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work. ? | | | | | | | | Originally posted on | | | | Yarborough Chaney ---|---|--- | ? Civil Stewardship from a Biblical Worldview (C) 2023 Dana Criswell 530 George St., Suite 200, Jackson, MS ? ?

name: Mayra Flores
subject: I was attacked by a pervert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra Flores for Congress
body:
Please see my full statement

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zprppapea9cr6odb3i9ktq6d1uc1idqv3rfojb3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm1oj6cjh2bs)
* * *
---
Friend,

After we delivered the historic upset to Biden & Pelosi in the TX-34 special election last summer, the liberal media & woke Democrats immediately sunk to disgusting lows to defeat me in the November midterms.

My opponent hired a twisted left-wing pervert to attack me & sexually degrade me. The liberal journalists called me a "white nationalist Latina" and a "self-hating Latina."

To sum it up- the woke liberals in America showed their true colors.

They truly hate free-thinking Hispanic women who don't buy what their party is selling.

My existence, my story, and my firm adherence to the values of God, Family, Country drives them completely nuts.

But they'll spend, say, and do whatever it takes to punish me for not falling in line & they won't stop until they permanently destroy me. They're leaving no stone unturned in this election & the polls are already tied- making it the closest race in America right now & your support today will give us the extra inch to take the lead & never look back.

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpi57fcjgh4lpkscq47c91v2ko08h81k7lfr5qbg_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm1oj6cjh2bs)
---

Look, I immigrated to America when I was 6 and grew up working in the fields. I know the value of a hard earned dollar so I wouldn't ask you to donate if it truly wasn't important.

_**But everything is on the line in this election & I mean EVERYTHING. **_

[**SUPPORT MAYRA FLORES**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7teu68fl3edmtcepq8t8hliebc8jrc511a995d0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdgm1oj6cjh2bs)
---

So if you can, and only if you can, please consider chipping in a few bucks today. I would be forever grateful to earn the backing & support of a great patriot like you!

name: Casey HQ
subject: Falling behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=383%2E552475%2EWVdxUE)
Peter,
We have some bad news: as of today, **our fundraising has started to slow down.**
Our team is working overtime to raise as much as possible to help keep Bob Casey in the Senate. Pennsylvania is critical to holding our Senate majority, so the stakes are too high to leave anything to chance.
We can’t afford to slow down — and we’re relying on our grassroots supporters to get us back on track today.
[**Senate control is on the line, so we’re asking folks on our team to pitch in your first contribution today so we can close our fundraising gap. Can we count on your support?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230729-1?refcode=em20230729-1&refcode2=383_552475_WVdxUE&akid=383%2E552475%2EWVdxUE)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230729-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230729-1&refcode2=383_552475_WVdxUE&akid=383%2E552475%2EWVdxUE)**
We always knew Pennsylvania was going to be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country — that’s why it’s critical to ensure we’re prepared for everything the GOP will throw our way.
Most campaigns experience slower fundraising over the summer months, but it is critical we pick up the pace and close the gap before our end-of-month deadline.
**[We’re humbly asking if you’ll help us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal by making a contribution today. We’re relying on your support, Peter.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230729-1?refcode=em20230729-1&refcode2=383_552475_WVdxUE&akid=383%2E552475%2EWVdxUE)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230729-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230729-1&refcode2=383_552475_WVdxUE&akid=383%2E552475%2EWVdxUE)**
Thank you,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=383%2E552475%2EWVdxUE)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=383%2E552475%2EWVdxUE)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

body:

Unfortunately, that means we’re in the middle of the summer fundraising slump that Democrats typically see in the off-year of an election cycle.

Peter, we have a plan to get back on track — recruit 50 grassroots donors who can step up for Madeleine ahead of our July monthly deadline. **[Can we count on you to be one of those donors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67230249/419046272/268484999?amount=25&refcode=07292023_md_eom_fr_2&refcode2=376f92d7-0f2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzZmOTJkNy0wZjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqorW5Lg45VSz3eGHj8NuCTDaewETVTfkAW5hJfgoZw=)**

I’ve included Mad’s message – forwarded below – so you can hear her perspective on the summer, her opponents in the race for PA-04, and more.

We appreciate you and your continued support!

Cole **Begin forwarded message:**
> Peter, I wanted to give you a quick update on where things stand here in PA-04:
> * With less than a year left until the Pennsylvania primary, there are already three candidates in the race – a Republican, another Democrat, and me.
> * We are in the middle of the summer fundraising slump we historically see in the off-year of an election cycle.
>
We know that the pace will pick up right after Labor Day, and because of that, we have limited time to make up for these slower summer months.
>

> I’m doing everything I can to build the resources we’ll need for the upcoming cycle. _And with GOP congressional leaders ignoring the real needs and challenges we face, we cannot afford to ease up._

Peter, if you’re able,[I hope you might consider chipping in ahead of our end-of-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67230261/419046281/268484999?amount=25&refcode=07292023_md_eom_fr_2&refcode2=376f92d7-0f2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzZmOTJkNy0wZjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqorW5Lg45VSz3eGHj8NuCTDaewETVTfkAW5hJfgoZw=)**

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82756f80ad024dafbfff3c4d63202e69&_e=4OVvv_DXFrFMyTEi4VxpznbyzwqL6ZXERnyxn03ttMh-viMx2CKJXI8fn5bmyaoAtujyGEX49tLRo3dTbuzCBnCIaQ3W7xoIbWUBQngVfptqQBTG4ecLqW5ZHcRaaD3N5RDxDiZu42Mwj8d4wJ_VbN2SPXk4nAkUWEIY7LbN1cA_gTJ5A78KoX0V6BHWpSG6IYyR3Q66syhDKZUOMwBpKBLfUQRSsJYgH7jE9hTI1O6WDYXWtUxOfsOKisXrvkAzSCuv1JHYrWAqhpcizKaqtA%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82756f80ad024dafbfff3c4d63202e69&_e=4OVvv_DXFrFMyTEi4VxpznbyzwqL6ZXERnyxn03ttMh-viMx2CKJXI8fn5bmyaoAtujyGEX49tLRo3dTbuzCBnCIaQ3W7xoIbWUBQngVfptqQBTG4ecLqW5ZHcRaaD3N0rHDZxZIaPgo-IjT3-Zg6SOJaWBdHfPyxUjiMLNAojxKVOxock_xS5yya_vHjLfGdAavzLuJnVbr8sAjhAFtHwwKs4XhYUZJA5Y9cXa2_sZO0RZIFrYIS5YBqdEg13X-S6YNxUGHEWLrxE6p9kFgYw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82756f80ad024dafbfff3c4d63202e69&_e=4OVvv_DXFrFMyTEi4VxpznbyzwqL6ZXERnyxn03ttMh-viMx2CKJXI8fn5bmyaoAtujyGEX49tLRo3dTbuzCBnCIaQ3W7xoIbWUBQngVfptqQBTG4ecLqW5ZHcRaaD3NfxeR1qx2v36j3J-UA-Zv_2eZqZOtqU4ncPQHX7PDJXvIoqXomLKiopyXGaDjBFmN2S0vqxk8vs-aMkO6L53iWRefbxx5Y7dbHqi9sKZAQ6ekjczIRc7XRrZealiW2gCJcPRnZwFSImImrb8udtDE8A%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82756f80ad024dafbfff3c4d63202e69&_e=4OVvv_DXFrFMyTEi4VxpznbyzwqL6ZXERnyxn03ttMh-viMx2CKJXI8fn5bmyaoAtujyGEX49tLRo3dTbuzCBnCIaQ3W7xoIbWUBQngVfptqQBTG4ecLqW5ZHcRaaD3NwIqcWNvAtHK-4qX3PxyOGSxgyuMFLkPuH_SZzdjDDujlZLIwI0Ni2R2UjNdkL1eQf7PE2MhxNlAeA_G4o9jUEDLl33RJ-CCAQ0JYm2EIl_c49gYdGm2S90Iah5-iui73fyWKaCI_pzu3m5WEAuBLcQ%3D%3D)

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=82756f80ad024dafbfff3c4d63202e69&_e=4OVvv_DXFrFMyTEi4VxpznbyzwqL6ZXERnyxn03ttMh-viMx2CKJXI8fn5bmyaoAtujyGEX49tLRo3dTbuzCBnCIaQ3W7xoIbWUBQngVfptqQBTG4ecLqW5ZHcRaaD3NaHbyLsgYdHg7kDRpK2XGuHVNQIbW1hEoQ3hQshjFnNhJ1JBLQ_3Pe3P1p9FHvZP2qX0qkJHpblhktLY_x5Sx0FvOR441vZC-B7bXUs6gwjOzg0hzZrYkEgrLA6AP_B3MMz6ufArkDbTR6gwNsmvOIA%3D%3D)

Please hurry.

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45d46d39cfb340b79ac86b520f529ef7&_e=b4OhClVYc4n3-ugBVXZ7bVoQFlQ77YNNGNSVKEvg_GculT4e5FyAI7iBUotvW_XS24ZmKa1bZFPY53a2km0zgUbUNOSNnI--s-z6mVwmYkwlVVsF2DIgwQRyrRoG9GDybZI3afV9rxAfEoPAGzlJZ8XR5RngufjH3W9-8aQ9s_UsiYrs1-oZNgGuZ8UScIislyGdrIjVKs0HgvLgWATWbx9e2GT5pk5WWj-Fm7SORV9flLc-6JpOX9bgE4xZGru2e5ao_xdhRKz1XUeO_VhYN-WHFuB_NKvLDI6_IeWBlczjFJqvuk92xZiQbi3vDGCjFH6SupuJbbW6l6D2ftxHK32uxKA6P8vGiovsJ-Vq5863BDlk6ztyl8Nfa_HRFFfhZCxQ8fkB3pGO2V0-5yp-DDbzrKViKAjJv1uXh52_ii0%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45d46d39cfb340b79ac86b520f529ef7&_e=b4OhClVYc4n3-ugBVXZ7bVoQFlQ77YNNGNSVKEvg_GculT4e5FyAI7iBUotvW_XS24ZmKa1bZFPY53a2km0zgUbUNOSNnI--s-z6mVwmYkwlVVsF2DIgwQRyrRoG9GDybZI3afV9rxAfEoPAGzlJZ8XR5RngufjH3W9-8aQ9s_UsiYrs1-oZNgGuZ8UScIislyGdrIjVKs0HgvLgWATWbx9e2GT5pk5WWj-Fm7SORV9flLc-6JpOX9bgE4xZGru2e5ao_xdhRKz1XUeO_VhYN8AZYkaeVYNawvAFzY7ZgRA78sBsWwzAWN_X3sCEitX7aAZFvDivtY_hcp1iEiA4LyZM2iklMrI2-WjM4_9mW9CvFosKuSyk8plWzFVY3fTNqbFO6EikuGApe8ZtBNz8bEAe5RcT_Z94CtqT3OU1Ycg%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45d46d39cfb340b79ac86b520f529ef7&_e=b4OhClVYc4n3-ugBVXZ7bVoQFlQ77YNNGNSVKEvg_GculT4e5FyAI7iBUotvW_XS24ZmKa1bZFPY53a2km0zgUbUNOSNnI--s-z6mVwmYkwlVVsF2DIgwQRyrRoG9GDybZI3afV9rxAfEoPAGzlJZ8XR5RngufjH3W9-8aQ9s_UsiYrs1-oZNgGuZ8UScIislyGdrIjVKs0HgvLgWATWbx9e2GT5pk5WWj-Fm7SORV9flLc-6JpOX9bgE4xZGru2e5ao_xdhRKz1XUeO_VhYN-0Jj7vlTWlIf3TqKBlHg8uKT5vUCwH_05yJvMx1BquS2uAb7MB7G85Mo261HZTl7ZJpwGTjZZxu-o2aWuubACpAorgGXwFN2_r6Dax_Ni42KL8wS-bwuOkkelMTAa5r-cN4uFB__X7wpfaXo1Dx7hw%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

| | | Fellow conservative, I went on Fox News to call out Joe Biden and his corrupt son, Hunter Biden.

What we are seeing is two standards of justice in America. One for Americans, and another for anyone with the last name Biden.

Joe Biden is making it perfectly clear that the rules and laws of this country do NOT apply to him and his family.

**WE MUST ALL DENOUNCE THIS AND PUSH FOR ACCOUNTABILITY.**

You see, Democrats have a Majority in the Senate, and they will vote down anything Republicans propose to hold Joe Biden accountable. This is why the 2024 Senate elections are incredibly important.

Join me in demanding Joe Biden and his family be held accountable and help me **TAKE BACK A REPUBLICAN MAJORITY IN THE SENATE.**

This is very important and I need you by my side.
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thank you in advance for your first $3 donation, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I want you to know how important you are to this campaign.

Hey there, Peter.
I want you to know how important you are to this campaign.
When I think about my most important supporters, I don’t think about the ones who are the biggest donors.
I think about the people who were there when I needed them most. So far more than 100,000 people have contributed to either my House or Senate campaigns.
But now that we’re almost at the end of the month, and July fundraising has slowed significantly, I need you more than ever.
Out of all the people who have supported all of my campaigns less than 5% have made a contribution.
Today, I am humbly asking you to join them:
[**Can you please make your first online $3 contribution to my Senate campaign? Help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal and keep a Democrat in Arizona’s Senate seat.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230729-1-f&t=1&akid=849%2E734936%2E1sJYc4)

name: Team Daniels
subject: In Case You Missed It - FW: A clear and present danger
body:
www.danielsforcongress.org [www.danielsforcongress.org]
Dear Friend,
We wanted to make sure you didn't miss this email from Shamaine. Since 2022, we've been telling everyone that Scott Perry is dangerous. In the email below, Shamaine explains how Perry is holding the National Defense Authorization Act hostage to his extreme, culture war agenda.
Why is this important? Because it demonstrates that Perry will do anything, including jeopardizing our national security, to energize his extreme base, increase his own power, and promote a radical agenda that is out of step with his district and the country.
We CANNOT allow Perry to continue to serve in Congress, but we can't defeat him without YOUR help.
Can you pitch-in $25, $50, $100 or more to support our campaign and help us defeat Scott Perry? CLICK here to donate now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
We are coming to the end of our July fundraising challenge. Contributions made before midnight on Monday will be matched by a handful of generous donors, IF we reach our goal of $15,000.
Help us reach that goal by making a contribution today and double the impact of you contribution! Donate now by CLICKING HERE. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
On behalf of the entire Daniels For Congress team, Thank you for your ongoing support!
Begin Forwarded message
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
As part of our July fundraising challenge, we’re making it clear to everyone that Scott Perry is the most dangerous member of Congress. First up, why Scott Perry is a threat to our national security.
If you already understand how dangerous Perry is, and you agree that we MUST defeat him next year, CLICK HERE to make a contribution to help us reach our fundraising challenge goal and our donors will match your contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Scott Perry and his Freedom Caucus have turned the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA), which has always enjoyed bipartisan consensus about the need to fund our military, into a battlefield in his culture war. Now, vital defense spending has become a vicious partisan debate, and Perry has promised not to back down from his extremist stance. Check out the video to hear it in his own words.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e-EKAGJiXHk [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e-EKAGJiXHk]
Using national security as red meat for his radical base is unacceptable. Our military needs to be concerned about the actual battlefield, not Perry’s culture war. Donate now to help us defeat Perry. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
Each year, the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA) authorizes funding levels and provides authority for the U.S. military and other critical defense priorities, ensuring America's forces have the training, equipment, and resources they need to carry out their missions.
it's no wonder why it has always enjoyed broad, bipartisan support, that is until Perry decided to use it as a bargaining chip to push his extreme agenda.
We cannot tolerate members of Congress who jeopardize the safety and security of our nation in the name of extremism. That’s why you need to click here to make a donation to help us defeat Scott Perry. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
So let me ask you, Do you believe we can afford to allow Perry to continue to serve in Congress?
Click here to make a contribution to our campaign today, and we will defeat Perry TOGETHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
In our next installment, we will tell you about the ways Scott Perry has threatened our economic security. In the meantime, stay tuned to the upcoming debate over passage of the NDAA as Perry and his extremist cronies try to hold the House, the Senate and our country hostage to their radical beliefs.
With Gratitude,
Shamaine
P.S. If you missed my announcement video, you can check it out below.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lQXcyDlej8Y]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdemail2023]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/99379/images/PaidForByDanielsForCongressB.jpg]
Daniels For Congress
P.O. Box 60654
Harrisburg, PA 17106

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I just introduced a bipartisan bill to create a Digital Consumer Protection Commission. Read more:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Congress has been too slow, it lacks the tech expertise, and armies of Big Tech lobbyists have been able to pick off individual efforts easier than shooting fish in a barrel. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254546/419124504/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15S_POL_E_20230729_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQ5ZTg3Yy0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC8p3cBzgf_7xxdeyN0q14nVSEVEHsxmMf7R2oIRzTQ=&emci=8d49e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=9249e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
It’s a pattern we’ve seen over and over again throughout American history: A big new industry rises up, and Congress creates a new federal agency to regulate it — to protect people from new harms while still preserving innovation. In 1887, the Interstate Commerce Commission took on railroads. In 1934, the Federal Communications Commission took on radio (and then television). In 1975, the Nuclear Regulatory Commission took on nuclear power. So here’s the way I see it: it’s time for a nimble, adaptable, new agency with expertise, resources, and authority to take on Big Tech. Congress has been too slow, it lacks the tech expertise, and armies of Big Tech lobbyists have been able to pick off individual efforts easier than shooting fish in a barrel. **So I just introduced a bipartisan bill to create a Digital Consumer Protection Commission. This independent regulator would keep an eye on the nation’s biggest tech companies, like Meta, Google, and Amazon — to prevent online harm, promote free speech and competition, guard Americans’ privacy and protect national security.** [**If you agree that Big Tech companies need proper oversight, add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of the Digital Consumer Protection Commission Act — we’re going to have to fight side by side to get this done and rein in giant tech companies.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254547/419124505/-263765054?refcode=EMZ15S_POL_E_20230729_V1S2&ms=EMZ15S_POL_E_20230729_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQ5ZTg3Yy0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC8p3cBzgf_7xxdeyN0q14nVSEVEHsxmMf7R2oIRzTQ=&emci=8d49e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=9249e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254548/419124506/-263765054?refcode=EMZ15S_POL_E_20230729_V1S2&ms=EMZ15S_POL_E_20230729_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQ5ZTg3Yy0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC8p3cBzgf_7xxdeyN0q14nVSEVEHsxmMf7R2oIRzTQ=&emci=8d49e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=9249e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

The digital revolution has given us amazing new opportunities, but it’s come with a real dark side.
Giant digital platforms have created new ways to spread the sexual abuse and exploitation of children, human trafficking, drug trafficking, and bullying — while promoting eating disorders, addictive behaviors, and teen suicide.
A few Big Tech companies are stomping out potential new rivals with anti-competitive practices, including running the very platforms that they also operate on (looking at you, Google) (and you too, Amazon).
And Big Tech has vacuumed up our personal data, leaving it vulnerable to being stolen and usually leaving us in the dark about how it’s being used.
Enough is enough. It’s time to rein in Big Tech. Meaningful change is structural change — and that’s what this new commission would deliver.
[**Do you agree our government must protect the freedom of the American people from the ever-changing whims of these powerful companies and their unaccountable CEOs? Add your name to say you support this bill — it’s important to show this commission has strong support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254549/419124507/-263765054?refcode=EMZ15S_POL_E_20230729_V1S2&ms=EMZ15S_POL_E_20230729_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQ5ZTg3Yy0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cC8p3cBzgf_7xxdeyN0q14nVSEVEHsxmMf7R2oIRzTQ=&emci=8d49e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=9249e87c-342e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

clean_body: Congress has been too slow, it lacks the tech expertise, and armies of Big Tech lobbyists have been able to pick off individual efforts easier than shooting fish in a barrel. | | | It’s a pattern we’ve seen over and over again throughout American history: A big new industry rises up, and Congress creates a new federal agency to regulate it — to protect people from new harms while still preserving innovation. In 1887, the Interstate Commerce Commission took on railroads. In 1934, the Federal Communications Commission took on radio (and then television). In 1975, the Nuclear Regulatory Commission took on nuclear power. So here’s the way I see it: it’s time for a nimble, adaptable, new agency with expertise, resources, and authority to take on Big Tech. Congress has been too slow, it lacks the tech expertise, and armies of Big Tech lobbyists have been able to pick off individual efforts easier than shooting fish in a barrel. So I just introduced a bipartisan bill to create a Digital Consumer Protection Commission. This independent regulator would keep an eye on the nation’s biggest tech companies, like Meta, Google, and Amazon — to prevent online harm, promote free speech and competition, guard Americans’ privacy and protect national security. | The digital revolution has given us amazing new opportunities, but it’s come with a real dark side. Giant digital platforms have created new ways to spread the sexual abuse and exploitation of children, human trafficking, drug trafficking, and bullying — while promoting eating disorders, addictive behaviors, and teen suicide. A few Big Tech companies are stomping out potential new rivals with anti-competitive practices, including running the very platforms that they also operate on (looking at you, Google) (and you too, Amazon). And Big Tech has vacuumed up our personal data, leaving it vulnerable to being stolen and usually leaving us in the dark about how it’s being used. Enough is enough. It’s time to rein in Big Tech. Meaningful change is structural change — and that’s what this new commission would deliver. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

| | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=134e4b32bb&e=84ee529f47)
---
Follow the money, friend. You’ll see the trail of cash exchanged between NIH scientists and researchers at the Wuhan Institute of Virology in the beginning of 2020. Email after email shows these very scientists acknowledged COVID likely began from a lab leak – _and they purposefully lied and covered up this knowledge._ **All of this comes back to the lead virologist:****Dr. Fauci.** He called the idea of a lab leak a conspiracy theory. In private, he acknowledged that is likely how COVID originated. **_But he was more concerned with losing his flow of cash for gain-of-function research than he was about the health and safety of millions of Americans._** It’s time we hold Dr. Fauci accountable for inflicting this deadly virus on the world and working so hard to cover up his tracks. **That’s why I’ve referred him to the DOJ for prosecution.** [**Donate $9 in the next hour to stand with me as we continue this fight to undo the COVID cover-up and hold Dr. Fauci accountable. >>**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=c9d92096cb&e=84ee529f47)

Hi there,

As a dedicated supporter of our conservative cause, your grassroots donation can make a tremendous impact. With your generous contribution we can build a formidable campaign, engage with voters, and win the hearts and minds of Americans.

**_The 2024 election presents a critical crossroad for our nation. We have the opportunity to chart a course towards limited government, individual liberties, and a thriving economy. But to achieve this vision, we need your help._**

By contributing today, you'll send a powerful message to the Radical Left and confirm the fact that conservatives will never stop fighting for what they believe in.

From New York's 11th District to the entire nation, Congresswoman Malliotakis believes that expanding economic opportunities, securing the border, supporting military and law enforcement, and eradicating crime will benefit ALL Americans.

We need to keep conservatives like Nicole Malliotakis in Washington, D.C., holding the government accountable and **combatting the radical liberal agenda.**

**Your generosity will help us secure victory in 2024 and ensure that America remains the land of freedom and opportunity for generations to come.**

**[Thank you for your continued support and dedication to our cause. Together, let's pave the way to a brighter conservative future.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=a1166092a736492bb314c32a74a89c55&_e=jJeUAN2TxgTrgUe992t7VsYwFHAWlTG0evjPBzQfbYFNwHTZNjCKLhBFcTEnNAU7MCTZWiDatvxlEjYWcCqPUiHKqFQ3ACZI5aR5DWPLr2XmKjVgcTQegw6-8hY26TXMacc4vOBDExQk8B_cfOxTjOLRia2LnQqOd5SlFEr6ctRWe8M3sEwzcKfyXMViNZiJc9PDHDaSE0y9FivqSG--jenWehs2iMk5k_5jXk0leXaaT_FyA3JPetqjVHPGaIskzSaQGk7nNshCLqXHXPo0z9sObkC-4MiC36CSzpZLv6WBdjPQPJ4kDG--EiJCSJ6q)**

With your generous contribution we can build a formidable campaign, engage with voters, and win the hearts and minds of Americans. The 2024 election presents a critical crossroad for our nation. We have the opportunity to chart a course towards limited government, individual liberties, and a thriving economy. But to achieve this vision, we need your help. By contributing today, you'll send a powerful message to the Radical Left and confirm the fact that conservatives will never stop fighting for what they believe in. From New York's 11th District to the entire nation, Congresswoman Malliotakis believes that expanding economic opportunities, securing the border, supporting military and law enforcement, and eradicating crime will benefit ALL Americans. We need to keep conservatives like Nicole Malliotakis in Washington, D.C., holding the government accountable and combatting the radical liberal agenda. Your generosity will help us secure victory in 2024 and ensure that America remains the land of freedom and opportunity for generations to come. Thank you, Macauley, Team Malliotakis | A No-Nonsense Leader for Congress. * Congresswoman Malliotakis is the daughter of immigrants, her father from Greece and her mother a Cuban exile of the Castro dictatorship. Pennsylvanians deserve a reflective state legislature that prioritizes the needs of the community.

| Team,

**It’s official:** Thanks in part to our hard work, Democrats currently hold a 480,000 voter registration advantage over Republicans in the Commonwealth.

In 2022, during our first full year of operations, we collected 20,000 voter registration forms, helped flip Pennsylvania's State House for the first time in more than a decade, and helped expand our U.S. Senate majority in the tight races in Pennsylvania AND Georgia.

**_We are here because Pennsylvanians deserve a reflective state legislature that prioritizes the needs of the community. But the work is not over yet._**

This November, we have an opportunity to elect local officials and statewide appellate court judges, including a new PA Supreme Court justice who will defend us from the far-right’s plans to disenfranchise voters and suppress votes. But first, this September, we will have the opportunity to maintain our hard-earned control of the state House.

body:

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=881151ba1a9241d9aa641eb581e315bd&_e=Dl7k1m-pEiZSm8PeO_d3GydvUv7dNvLH7KFrwx2Y7rdMvHV8qTha-PQmLBS3wUuNgcIubWDkdad8cN2qyNMY9Wy9sIhducdCndfUW7W0cuKOWwGYH-STmS_Qj8MyOxedrh9GVEo4Nsmz3f3caC5iOIyHU87zZ6OeF-VfFKIAkciMFdsSjjVp-3wjn6zeu6GG_I83ST6vFdMYLuw95wW1JXuclG9hKwu8k2XZj1ccX-lyxXi80uqE3g8HBDWfvv6CItm9DBJeKp6I1xE0PoZle9swoTYeg80xOvviR5BeCPVN9Rm8QbS0JHAaH0n9j5otfBAq3pqF1G7hxNVda0f90e7xK_Tak5sH_JKHjQLm6WFbO0P0I79Dgq1Z3kkadF95JJjkiIepdTBEthtoBYzLfQ%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=881151ba1a9241d9aa641eb581e315bd&_e=Dl7k1m-pEiZSm8PeO_d3GydvUv7dNvLH7KFrwx2Y7rdMvHV8qTha-PQmLBS3wUuNgcIubWDkdad8cN2qyNMY9Wy9sIhducdCndfUW7W0cuKOWwGYH-STmS_Qj8MyOxedrh9GVEo4Nsmz3f3caC5iOIyHU87zZ6OeF-VfFKIAkciMFdsSjjVp-3wjn6zeu6GG_I83ST6vFdMYLuw95wW1JXuclG9hKwu8k2XZj1ccX-lyxXi80uqE3g8HBDWfvv6CuhlEkpH-Sx3bjGhvF6WJ7EAjcqg6Fsxmcb_IWaxBVu7qCxTpAAyiG1RoPRRl8_uasXNe75kNLfgsGWl1eTF0WBzBgy4RO8fMtKi7vdhoZ3vEjSk3HraFMT7dLgTlCjGVuACz5P4_NCVj30_b12_jog%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=881151ba1a9241d9aa641eb581e315bd&_e=Dl7k1m-pEiZSm8PeO_d3GydvUv7dNvLH7KFrwx2Y7rdMvHV8qTha-PQmLBS3wUuNgcIubWDkdad8cN2qyNMY9Wy9sIhducdCndfUW7W0cuKOWwGYH-STmS_Qj8MyOxedrh9GVEo4Nsmz3f3caC5iOIyHU87zZ6OeF-VfFKIAkciMFdsSjjVp-3wjn6zeu6GG_I83ST6vFdMYLuw95wW1JXuclG9hKwu8k2XZj1ccX-lyxXi80uqE3g8HBDWfvv6CknAnG-3sL7Gyr6V_GYxNkkBK-TB-xwmZmW8S88F-o1QTTFOWj7fDskqRImHIlCtPe27NR9HNMSvH47O9a5UkuDQNPhGtLfAQUFSDa11NoRFq2zrs3zxGBA3HIofJbEBAL1lmCeheiwcGS4r2RK-rMQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=881151ba1a9241d9aa641eb581e315bd&_e=Dl7k1m-pEiZSm8PeO_d3GydvUv7dNvLH7KFrwx2Y7rdMvHV8qTha-PQmLBS3wUuNgcIubWDkdad8cN2qyNMY9Wy9sIhducdCndfUW7W0cuKOWwGYH-STmS_Qj8MyOxedrh9GVEo4Nsmz3f3caC5iOIyHU87zZ6OeF-VfFKIAkciMFdsSjjVp-3wjn6zeu6GG_I83ST6vFdMYLuw95wW1JXuclG9hKwu8k2XZj1ccX-lyxXi80uqE3g8HBDWfvv6CSqKPmImAY5WyhvkBL0aad8ivRn_WIztfrXklU323Ss0ZafUu7K9330l0t0zFn0l_Yz74g7LAshQE5o8QNfvwc6TlIEYkshDj2kD6XBUiCAmciXGEj71O81MOyp7fujJnYN80vc53551YGKeMMTYUMg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

I'm reaching out today to talk about my son, Andy.

I grew up in Dawson Springs – a community that is so typical of many of the other rural towns in Kentucky. It was there I learned about the importance of caring about and taking care of each other. These are the Kentucky values I passed along to my children, and I'm so proud of who they've grown up to be.

Andy has brought the Kentucky values he grew up with into the governor's office and has fought every day for Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth. He's done a heck of a job as governor, and he's committed to moving our Commonwealth forward. But he needs our help to win this tough race in just a few months.

I couldn't be more proud of Andy. He's always put partisan politics aside in order to do what's right for Kentuckians – and he's made great progress. Since coming to office, Andy has helped create thousands of new jobs, invested in our Commonwealth's infrastructure, expanded access to affordable health care, and helped communities recover from devastating natural disasters.

But the next few months won't be easy. Election experts are calling this the most competitive race in the nation this year, and dark money groups are once again spending big to defeat Andy. If Andy's going to win this November and continue making progress for Kentucky, he needs all of us by his side.

clean_body: I'm reaching out today to talk about my son, Andy. = Hey Peter – Governor Steve Beshear here. I'm reaching out today to talk about my son, Andy. I grew up in Dawson Springs – a community that is so typical of many of the other rural towns in Kentucky. It was there I learned about the importance of caring about and taking care of each other. These are the Kentucky values I passed along to my children, and I'm so proud of who they've grown up to be. Andy has brought the Kentucky values he grew up with into the governor's office and has fought every day for Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth. He's done a heck of a job as governor, and he's committed to moving our Commonwealth forward. But he needs our help to win this tough race in just a few months. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- I couldn't be more proud of Andy. He's always put partisan politics aside in order to do what's right for Kentuckians – and he's made great progress. Since coming to office, Andy has helped create thousands of new jobs, invested in our Commonwealth's infrastructure, expanded access to affordable health care, and helped communities recover from devastating natural disasters. But the next few months won't be easy. Election experts are calling this the most competitive race in the nation this year, and dark money groups are once again spending big to defeat Andy. If Andy's going to win this November and continue making progress for Kentucky, he needs all of us by his side. = Thank you, Steve Beshear Former Governor of Kentucky | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

name: Tara McGowan, Courier Newsroom
subject: Got a minute, Peter?
body:
Here’s what you need to know:
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1297%2E120351%2EYWHErZ)
Hey Peter, it’s Tara — Founder and Publisher of Courier Newsroom.
In a moment, I’ll share how you can help us fight back against our country’s growing information crisis — and explain why this work is more important than ever.
**But if you’re short on time, here’s what you need to know:**
At Courier Newsroom, we’re fighting bad information by providing local news to the communities that need it most. Our dedicated reporters are covering everything from extremist groups like Moms for Liberty to upcoming local and state elections.
**This kind of news is essential, so we don’t hide it behind paywalls or subscription fees.**
[**Instead, we rely on the generous support of grassroots donors like you, which leads me to an important question: will you chip in $5 to help us reach our $15,000 July goal so we can keep our news stories free and accessible?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230729?refcode=em20230729&amount=5&refcode2=1297_120351_YWHErZ&akid=1297%2E120351%2EYWHErZ)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230729?refcode=em20230729&amount=5&refcode2=1297_120351_YWHErZ&akid=1297%2E120351%2EYWHErZ)**
Over the past few months alone, our news teams have had their hands full. **Here’s a quick look at what they’ve been working on:**
* In Pennsylvania, our team at _The Keystone_ set their sights on Moms for Liberty, exposing their misinformation-fueled agenda and underscoring how they’re impacting our communities.

* In Virginia, our reporters at _Dogwood_ ensured readers knew exactly what was at stake in their recent state primary election and how they could cast their ballot.

* In Iowa, our team at _Iowa Starting Line_ has been diligently following the Governor’s tireless efforts to pass an extreme abortion ban.

As we get deeper into the 2024 election cycle, you can bet that our reporters will have even more leads to chase, bad actors to hold accountable, and bad information to debunk.
**To ensure they have the resources they need, we have to reach our $15,000 fundraising goal before July ends. So I’m asking one more time:**
[**Will you chip in $5 to support our newsrooms and fight back against disinformation?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230729?refcode=em20230729&amount=5&refcode2=1297_120351_YWHErZ&akid=1297%2E120351%2EYWHErZ)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230729?refcode=em20230729&amount=5&refcode2=1297_120351_YWHErZ&akid=1297%2E120351%2EYWHErZ)**
Thanks so much,
Tara McGowan
_Founder & Publisher_
_Courier Newsroom_
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1297_120351_YWHErZ&akid=1297%2E120351%2EYWHErZ)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1297%2E120351%2EYWHErZ)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032
