name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: GAINING STEAM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
When I entered this race, I had never run for office before. I didn't have years of campaigning under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my campaign.
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWp3EixDNa)
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)
Fellow American,

When I entered this race, I had never run for office before. I didn't have years of campaigning under my belt, or a list of political donors to help support my campaign.

I bet most grassroots conservatives only knew my name from _Fox News_ appearances.

But now, 4 months after announcing my campaign for President of the United States, I am climbing in the polls - _even polling ahead of a former Vice President, a sitting U.S. Senator, and multiple governors._

I am proud of the outsider campaign we are running. In addition to the millions my family has personally invested, **[I am counting on folks like YOU to make sure we have what it takes to continue to build on this momentum!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)**
**[Can I count on you to step up- even if it's just $1 or $5?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)**

| [** RUSH $1 ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074325:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)
---

[** RUSH $5 ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074326:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)
---

[** RUSH ANOTHER AMOUNT ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)
---

As the first millennial to run for the GOP nomination, I want to foster national pride among young Americans. I want to restore the values that make America great: faith, family, patriotism, and hard work.

We need a PRIME spot on the debate stage to discuss this with voters across the country, and these poll numbers are KEY. But I really need help securing new donors. **[Fellow American, please help however you can to make sure we continue to take on the Washington elites.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** CHIP IN NOW ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62074324:Wp3EixDNa:m:1:2532013465:E9457D599B6D689323B8802B4637B2F8:r)

---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. For more information . | mailto:unsub-72629793553-echo3-2F11E67EACB53D3D0154E5A713F5004C@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings []()**

Friend, I tend to go against the grain of public opinion. I am not the darling of the political elite, and have never claimed or wanted to be. **I know who I stand for and what I stand for, and on these points, I will never compromise.** In case you haven't yet noticed, the legacy media despises this. The radical Left is used to controlling lives and using the media to get their way. Meanwhile, I am more concerned with protecting the people I serve and restoring the state of this country that our Founding Fathers envisioned. That's why I stand up every day. I know that no matter how many attacks are waged at me and my campaign, I am over the target, and my work for the American people will not be stopped by the political elites working with the legacy media to keep me from upending the corruption across Washington.
---
| | [Stand up with me](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=fd89e1dcb20e4b4c82e5966bebec6c36&_e=dfkA8rUnYmEXYOv2iSbBgVq2V8PGNcJHeLKmo4CkczA40LcOF-w17E-4ism7HV3YoGRJDp4Ora8AVRpTwdEi60iG9MCKHJNDaUJz-i3IsSkLQtBk_9ofGwK1feD3kBl_jJw8Rof0k4HoHgZ7OMrRyVfSg407yXY9wXfPHp3--xhnEuo2ISSmP5o8trHDFLXW3w8y82s81oQdOYNL1m4apLp5Ca29Hya4-qnMu4Ps0QXTpBTjilAxDDskzuJQyHQzMqPoXxq4JeFYNsS8-Wre4b4MrWCfd1prFb4cnrKMCKo_J4OWoOvruYDysCsL9ituYPZAF4lU1BbdnE25qqk-Xjq_Xsj7ar-5C6pnTLbN7i7EvAZOfhpkH-elSJtBcz8y0R7k4C22PMNPkUfIdf6Z9UBI-BNO2MVWU0lqlLXDcVd2pitBBHkUW3DxbPcbP4vP)
---
I know that Americans are sick and tired of electing politicians who make promises while they're campaigning and fail to deliver on them when they get in office. _I am tired of this too._ I am fighting for hardworking Americans, because I've watched, I've listened, and I have a clear vision of where to take our country. **The United States of America deserves to see real leadership at the helm once again, and I believe I am the man for the job.** In 2024, there will be a new sheriff in town, and I have one message for the DC elites, the media, the political class, and the radical Left: **buckle up. ** The attacks will only intensify from here, Friend. As this month comes to a close, we near a pivotal moment for the race: the first GOP debate in August. As we prepare for this, I need your help. We need to start August out at the same pace as we did July so we can stay ahead in this race and over the target. Achieving this has never been more critical. **I know that Biden 's economy has made it difficult to prioritize putting resources toward anything other than gas in the car, groceries in the pantry, and food in front of your kids. That's why I'm humbly requesting your help. I would never ask this of you if it weren't this important, and I need you to know that even the smallest donations go so far on this campaign. Your support NEVER goes to waste._[If you can chip in any amount, will you join me?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=fd89e1dcb20e4b4c82e5966bebec6c36&_e=dfkA8rUnYmEXYOv2iSbBgVq2V8PGNcJHeLKmo4CkczA40LcOF-w17E-4ism7HV3YoGRJDp4Ora8AVRpTwdEi60iG9MCKHJNDaUJz-i3IsSkLQtBk_9ofGwK1feD3kBl_jJw8Rof0k4HoHgZ7OMrRyVfSg407yXY9wXfPHp3--xhnEuo2ISSmP5o8trHDFLXW3w8y82s81oQdOYNL1m4apLp5Ca29Hya4-qnMu4Ps0QXTpBTjilAxDDskzuJQyHQzMqPoXxq4JeFYNsS8-Wre4b4MrWCfd1prFb4cnrKMCKp1u2XAyi7n7cOct1X2t3U4Ksdc2IzPaJC1LvDneKOeSKvN63PrGF2qySAAlHw59IRqMSd7hvEMpxJwjkODOsjZjwZ0zV_2460BoMzVUs3hUhckR2ZxtH2EoDjeAJgP0EY3TCetoMOV1ikxwsYYeVDh "If you can chip in any amount, will you join me?")_**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

That's why I'm humbly requesting your help. I would never ask this of you if it weren't this important, and I need you to know that even the smallest donations go so far on this campaign. Your support NEVER goes to waste. "If you can chip in any amount, will you join me?" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | I need your support going into the next stage of this campaign. It doesn't slow down from here, we are just getting started, and I need you fighting with me. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). name: Diana
subject: I don't see your response... -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because President Biden is _officially_ running for re-election and polls show him statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 129 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14394?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230729-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230729-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11359%2E9716520%2EZVR_PS)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/14394?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230729-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230729-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11359%2E9716520%2EZVR_PS)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/14394?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230729-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230729-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=11359%2E9716520%2EZVR_PS)
---

Thank you for your input,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. | Hi, I’m on the phone with Cinde and she wants to make sure you’re caught up.

**_Then:_** Kelly Ayotte, an anti-abortion extremist, got in the race, launching her campaign by denying that the state's abortion ban was a real ban.

name: Zak Malamed
subject: Two big factors to consider
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am writing this between events so I will get right to the point.
#
Hi, it’s Zak Malamed. I have a few minutes between campaign events, so I will get right to the point.
**July is slow. It is notoriously one of the hardest months to fundraise in.** Still, this month and this quarter are _essential_ for establishing our campaign’s viability.
We are coming up on our end-of-month deadline, which will help us evaluate our potential for the quarter and project our ability to grow our voter outreach program. We had a strong showing in the first quarter, but it is crucial that we keep it up if we want to build a campaign that can **defeat George Santos and flip NY-03 blue.**
[**If everyone reading this pitches in $11 before midnight on Monday, we will surpass our goal for July. Will you help us get there by making a donation now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230729?amount=11&refcode=em20230729&refcode2=348_8507_BdNjXm&akid=348%2E8507%2EBdNjXm)
Even though the first quarter went well, there are **two big factors** to consider here:
1. In the primary, our competitors have loaned their campaigns a lot of their own money and they have the resources to lend themselves even more. **Showing grassroots strength will help our campaign stand out.**
2. In the general election, Republicans are going to spend big to try to defend this seat (and their House majority). **This could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and we need to be prepared.**

Our deadline is 11:59pm on Monday, so if you can, please pitch in $11 or any amount today to help us reach our goal. **Here’s a secure link for you:** [**secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230729**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230729?amount=11&refcode=em20230729)
Thank you,
Zak
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=348%2E8507%2EBdNjXm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=348%2E8507%2EBdNjXm)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: We like to be honest with you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We know $5 or $10 doesn't seem like the kind of money that can make a difference in a world of super PACs and dark money special interest groups. But we're here to tell you that it can, and it does.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=387%2E791427%2EqbRbrA)

Friends —
Unlike some of Ilhan's colleagues in Washington, we like to be honest with you when sending these kind of emails.
That's why we wanted to reach out this morning to share a simple truth:
If everyone who receives _this_ email contributed $5 to Ilhan and our grassroots movement today, we'd CRUSH our fundraising goals for the rest of the quarter and be well on our way to fully funding the kind of campaign that's able to fight back and WIN in 2024. It wouldn't even be close.
But another honest truth is... not everyone can chip in every time we ask. We absolutely understand that.
That fact makes it even more important that you contribute if you can. Not just for Ilhan and our campaign, but for the grassroots movement of people nationwide counting on your $5 to add on to theirs.
We know $5 or $10 doesn't seem like the kind of money that can make a difference in a world of super PACs and dark money special interest groups. But we're here to tell you that it can, and it does.
**[So please: Can you make a $3 contribution to stand with Ilhan Omar and our people-powered campaign for Congress today?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july23.iXCXH5&refcode=em230729-1-t2&t=2&akid=387%2E791427%2EqbRbrA)**

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: We have a slight problem.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
Friends -
We have a _slight_ problem.
Yesterday, I was reviewing our movement’s fundraising results with my team, when I came across this number: $14.33.
$14.33 is our current average donation on ActBlue, down from $20.21 last month.
Our average contribution has dropped _considerably_. And while it may not seem like a lot, it explains why we’re not on track to hit our goal right now. That would be a critical setback for the rest of the quarter.
So with 2 days left in the month, we have 2 ways to get back on track:
1\. A large influx of donations from this team to make up lost ground
OR
2\. This team gives slightly more than they normally would to help close the gap.
Normally when we ask people to make their first online donation to our PAC, we ask for $3. But today we're going to ask you for $10. Because the truth is that we rely on the response to emails like this one to help fund our movement.
[**Can you please make a $10 contribution to The Long Run today? We need to have a big day today to stay on track to reach our goals before July ends.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.p2zS7g&refcode=em230729-1-t2&t=1&akid=4693%2E196590%2EfpQPVl)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.3F7id7&amount=10&refcode=em230729-1-t2&t=2&akid=4693%2E196590%2EfpQPVl)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-jul23.3F7id7&refcode=em230729-1-t2&t=3&akid=4693%2E196590%2EfpQPVl)**
---
We know this is a big ask, and we understand that not everyone is able to give today.
But if you're someone who can afford it, we hope you'll consider contributing to stand with our movement. Or perhaps contribute on behalf of someone else who would like to, but doesn't have the means to do so right now.
Thank you in advance for your $10 contribution. Our movement relies on folks like you.
Mandela

name: Allyson Damikolas
subject: We’re building momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Allyson for Congress
body:
Hey, friends. I wanted to update you on how my campaign for Congress is going.

Since I launched this campaign, we’ve raised well over $150,000 - much of that is due to support from folks like you, friends.

We’re also reaching more voters across the district and making our case directly about the issues impacting our residents the most.

Thanks to your support, this campaign is building the grassroots momentum we need for a successful run.

Today, I need your continued help. Young Kim has won her last 2 elections, and every dollar – especially the early ones – will go a long way toward defeating her. My campaign has less than 72 hours to go to meet our July end-of-month fundraising goal by July 31st.

Can you contribute whatever you are able to today and help us flip this seat and take back a Democratic majority?

DONATE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_email_2023q3?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.07.29_B1_EOM1_friendsandfamilylist

Thank you so much for your help. It truly means everything to me.

– Allyson

name: HER Time
subject: Money is the reason we’ll win or lose the House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up in just two days and we’re counting on your support. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67240904/419086731/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230729_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODkyZDNhNWEtMWUyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EIDG7cWCwiPOtBJkLJSVtNY4qvNsKYN1Bpm44F1nnng=)
---
Peter, We all know by now that women running for office are facing an uphill battle. They’re subject to harassment online and even physical threats against themselves and their families. They’re faced with double standards and sexist questions. And they’re severely underfunded. Women raise only about 75% of their male counterparts, on average. That _matters._ Because in 90% of House races, **the candidate who spends more wins. ** Listen, we have an end-of-month fundraising deadline coming up in just two days. And we don’t ask for your money just because. We ask you to chip in because **money is the reason we will win or lose the House in 2024. They’re subject to harassment online and even physical threats against themselves and their families. They’re faced with double standards and sexist questions. And they’re severely underfunded. Women raise only about 75% of their male counterparts, on average. That matters. Because in 90% of House races, the candidate who spends more wins. ## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: | | | | 2nd place in recent polls, this is a huge jump. | Friend – recent polling has put Chris Christie in 2nd place for the Republican Nomination for President. Clearly, this is a man America wants to see on the debate stage so that he can hold Donald Trump accountable for his lies. But if the Republican National Committee ups the donor requirement to 60,000 unique donors to appear in the 2nd and 3rd debates – Chris Christie still has some work to do before his spot on stage is solidified. | | | | | | Thank you, Tell It Like It Is PAC | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America. | [PAID FOR BY TELL IT LIKE IT IS PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. TELLITLIKEITISPAC.COM]() Contributions to Chris Christie for President, Inc. are not tax deductible. Tell It Like It Is PAC Alerts 3804 Wilson Blvd, Arlington, VA 22203 = \- =

name: Jon Tester via Alex-Padilla.com

body:
Did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?

Hi friend — we wanted to share this message from Senator Jon Tester of Montana. He’s facing what’s likely going to be one of the closest Senate races in the country, so we hope you’ll take a minute to read his update, and then [**pitch in $5 or $10 to help win Montana and hold our Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-tester-july23.FQZOyN&refcode=em230729-1-30&t=1&akid=1446%2E159979%2EzAK-G4)** _\- Team Padilla._
* * *

Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?
**JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%**
This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will have to fight like hell to make it happen.
[**Will you step up today and split a contribution between Alex Padilla and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-tester-july23.FQZOyN&refcode=em230729-1-30&t=2&akid=1446%2E159979%2EzAK-G4)**

We’re fully transparent with our grassroots team, and we’ll never shame you for not being able to donate. No matter if you give $1, $100, or just your time, you’re part of our team. Right now, if you can afford it, we need your help. I wouldn’t be reaching out to you if it wasn’t 100% necessary, Peter, but these goals are important. As we approach this deadline, we have to consider what the future of campaign looks like if we miss our goal. In these early stages, it’s critical to show up strong and establish ourselves as the strongest candidate possible to take on our Democrat incumbent. And if we miss this goal, the Left is already starting out ahead of us. This deadline is real, and we need real help to meet it. Thank you, Morgan Digital Director Team Cao | I came to America with little besides the clothes on my back.But with faith, dedication, and hard work, my family and I made it in America. I’m running for Senate to defend the American Dream that gave me everything.The Left is on a war path against the values that make us the greatest country on Earth. I didn’t put my life on the line defending those values in Special Operations in the Navy to let the Left destroy them. We are fueled by grassroots patriots like you. Even just a dollar or two makes all the difference.Thank you for standing with us! -CAPT Hung Cao Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Cao for VirginiaPO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134

Friend,

We are reaching out to you with a Public Service Announcement.

As you may know, the Iowa State Fair is just around the corner, and it will be filled to the brim with presidential hopefuls and political operatives trying their hardest to get out their message and reach as many voters as they can.

**The Iowa State Fair is ground zero for first-in-the-nation presidential caucuses in January.**

**The Iowa State Fair could very well shape the front runners in the 2024 election.**

This is an opportunity for presidential candidates to share their vision for the future and connect with voters in this CRUCIAL battleground state.

[**_We are less than a month away until opening day of the Iowa State Fair. We want to know what you think. As of this moment, who has your support in the GOP Primary?_**](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=0ff2b6fd4b1742cb90ac35d7c2de554c&_e=EjtyT8wk4aU9pcvt1vSja4ufIces4WM-PRsQKcVSl1NIbayVYit3a2MEANozrt6S79CbsVSJx68_0zsoamg2EEaYZbldUb_qwWwVlpVirrpAJ4NUIjPLwQUW6c-67T36KOW-atrW4JlPxMVHvQiX31Bu9TVR-lfcEsBhvk1f-1BZsWUjL1r52yZLQL18lCiTaKxwW9ePg2b31t-qPiJKO5JDWAwoeOfuWU1K2QW6yKZvjwW-t-mLQ3YbU7TPFhEeM6tbQqc7C7r9OfdsETf3H7b5qFXNB2WT5bPLKJmRTsQ%3D)

body:
While Derek is busy working in Congress to fight for the folks in our district and state, he's counting on our support to power this campaign and take back our House majority in 2024.

I wanted to make sure you didn't miss yesterday's note!

While Derek is busy working in Congress to fight for the folks in our district and state, he's counting on our support to power this campaign and take back our House majority in 2024.

We ran the numbers, and if 197 people chip in before tomorrow morning, we'll be well on our way to reaching our $25,000 end-of-month goal! **[Will you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to help us hit this crucial goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67241733/419090456/688272239?refcode=em23_230729_EOM2K_fnd_gq_act___KSTK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230729_EOM2K_fnd_gq_act___KSTK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=709b1e9b-202e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA5YjFlOWItMjAyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=npgyvUe0-wB_ZGKeTLNoxt_kPHsCMfMySSHqb5IzqYs=)**

Subject: What's next this summer! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67241735/419090459/688272239?refcode=em23_230729_EOM2K_fnd_gq_act___KSTK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230729_EOM2K_fnd_gq_act___KSTK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=709b1e9b-202e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA5YjFlOWItMjAyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=npgyvUe0-wB_ZGKeTLNoxt_kPHsCMfMySSHqb5IzqYs=)
Peter, Derek's had a busy summer in Congress, and we want to make sure you're fully looped in on the progress he's bringing to our region:

**☀️ Derek welcomed Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg to the Evergreen State to celebrate a game-changing federal grant that will replace a 48-year-old public breakwater along the Port Orchard waterfront.

☀️ He helped secure crucial funding for the Jamestown S’Klallam Tribe to replace the Big Quilcene River bridge on Linger Longer Road.

☀️ The House included Derek's legislation, the Servicemembers Mental Health Improvement Act, in the National Defense Authorization Act — a milestone in the effort to help servicemembers receive the support they need.**

_And this was only in July, Peter!_ Derek is proud to fight for our region every single day. But as we head into the second half of 2023, we need to start preparing for the upcoming election — and that's where you come in.

We set an ambitious $25,000 goal before the end-of-month deadline, and we're counting on your support to cross the finish line.

**[Will you chip in $10 — or whatever you can — to help Derek finish July strong? Your donation will help us build the resources we need to power Derek's campaign forward and retake the House majority in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67241737/419090461/688272239?refcode=em23_230729_EOM2K_fnd_gq_act___KSTK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230729_EOM2K_fnd_gq_act___KSTK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=709b1e9b-202e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzA5YjFlOWItMjAyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=npgyvUe0-wB_ZGKeTLNoxt_kPHsCMfMySSHqb5IzqYs=)**

Thank you,

Kilmer HQ

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.

I wanted to make sure you didn't miss yesterday's note! While Derek is busy working in Congress to fight for the folks in our district and state, he's counting on our support to power this campaign and take back our House majority in 2024. We ran the numbers, and if 197 people chip in before tomorrow morning, we'll be well on our way to reaching our $25,000 end-of-month goal! = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Kilmer HQ Date: Thurs, Jul 27, 2023 Subject: What's next this summer! = Peter, Derek's had a busy summer in Congress, and we want to make sure you're fully looped in on the progress he's bringing to our region: ☀️ Derek welcomed Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg to the Evergreen State to celebrate a game-changing federal grant that will replace a 48-year-old public breakwater along the Port Orchard waterfront. ☀️ He helped secure crucial funding for the Jamestown S’Klallam Tribe to replace the Big Quilcene River bridge on Linger Longer Road. ☀️ The House included Derek's legislation, the Servicemembers Mental Health Improvement Act, in the National Defense Authorization Act — a milestone in the effort to help servicemembers receive the support they need. And this was only in July, Peter! Derek is proud to fight for our region every single day. But as we head into the second half of 2023, we need to start preparing for the upcoming election — and that's where you come in. We set an ambitious $25,000 goal before the end-of-month deadline, and we're counting on your support to cross the finish line. = Thank you, Kilmer HQ Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign. = = Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer People for Derek Kilmer PO Box 1381 Tacoma, WA 98402 United States Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot. | =

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: ICYMI: We're Hosting a Yard Sign Party for Jerri Green on Aug. 3!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
July 29, 2023
Dear friend,
In case you missed our previous email, we want to remind you of TVP's upcoming yard sign party for Memphis City Council candidate Jerri Green.
We're thrilled to support Jerri Green, who is running for Memphis City Council District 2 (Cordova and East Memphis). Jerri's decades-long commitment to advocating for the most vulnerable in our community is just the kind of leadership we need on the Memphis City Council.
Join us for the Yard Sign Pickup Party next Thursday, August 3, from 5:30 to 7 pm , as we introduce Jerri to residents of Cordova and East Memphis. Come hear about her inspiring vision for our city and show your support for bringing common sense back to the City Council. RSVP for the event by clicking here. [https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty]
https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty [https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty]
RSVP FOR OUR YARD SIGN PARTY FOR JERRI GREEN [https://bit.ly/tvpgreenparty]
Your continued support means the world to us. With your support, we can continue to back outstanding candidates like Jerri and work towards building the city and state we all dream of. If you'd like to help make this happen, please click here to contribute. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thanks for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Sandra Wilson
subject: My son is running to be the next Governor of Louisiana
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
And I know he’ll make all of us proud.

Hi Peter, My name is Sandra Wilson, and my son Shawn is running to be your next Governor. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67241768/419090551/368366008?refcode=ea.749b1e9b-202e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.749b1e9b-202e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ5YjFlOWItMjAyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=diArVppQRkUWL-FVHSk9khwT6x7eD3ocEhXGaqW2kLE=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67241770/419090554/368366008?refcode=ea.749b1e9b-202e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ms=ea.749b1e9b-202e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzQ5YjFlOWItMjAyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=diArVppQRkUWL-FVHSk9khwT6x7eD3ocEhXGaqW2kLE=)** As a longtime Algiers resident, I know Louisiana has its fair share of challenges. And as Shawn’s mother, I know my son is the right man for the job. That’s because I raised him with the values that any mother would want their son to have: integrity, determination, and a willingness to help others. I saw those traits shine as he spent his career fighting for Louisianans, moving from one role to the next on his path to becoming Secretary of Transportation and Development. Along the way, he would always talk about his passion for making a difference for the people around us — and deep down I know that’s why he felt the call to run for governor. But I’m writing to you today because Shawn can’t win this race by himself. Yes, he has a great campaign team working with him, but he’ll need grassroots Democrats like you and me doing our part, too. So I have a favor to ask of you, Peter: **_[Will you please chip in any amount today to help Shawn win the governorship and build bridges to progress in Louisiana? I know he’s counting on all of us, so it would mean the world to clean_body: And I know he’ll make all of us proud. Hi Peter, My name is Sandra Wilson, and my son Shawn is running to be your next Governor. = = As a longtime Algiers resident, I know Louisiana has its fair share of challenges. And as Shawn’s mother, I know my son is the right man for the job. That’s because I raised him with the values that any mother would want their son to have: integrity, determination, and a willingness to help others. I saw those traits shine as he spent his career fighting for Louisianans, moving from one role to the next on his path to becoming Secretary of Transportation and Development. Along the way, he would always talk about his passion for making a difference for the people around us — and deep down I know that’s why he felt the call to run for governor. But I’m writing to you today because Shawn can’t win this race by himself. Yes, he has a great campaign team working with him, but he’ll need grassroots Democrats like you and me doing our part, too. So I have a favor to ask of you, Peter: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much, Sandra Wilson = = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. body:
This is one of the worst summer fundraising slumps we’ve seen.
#

Team -
We’ll be direct: This is one of the worst summer fundraising slumps we’ve ever seen.
We get it—right now is a busy time of year, and making a contribution to a PAC may not be the first thing on your mind. But in order for us to continue saving lives, we can’t fall short when it comes to our fundraising.
With Monday’s July fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, we’re hoping today is the day you make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC.
[**So please: Will you pitch in $3 today to help us beat the summer slump and reach our July goals? name: Team Jayapal
subject: We know it's the weekend, so we'll keep this short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila is counting on us to show up and show out for our grassroots progressive movement, especially during slower summer fundraising months like July.
#
Peter, we know it's the weekend, so we'll make this quick!
Yesterday, we shared with you the start of our end of July fundraising push to raise $15,000 before midnight on Monday. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we've made a massive impact on our goal and are now just $9,125 away from our goal.
We know this might sound like a daunting number but we did some math, and if 4 people from your area are able to chip in $3 or more, we'll be well underway to closing this gap.
Pramila is counting on us to show up and show out for our grassroots progressive movement, especially during slower summer fundraising months like July. **[Can we count on you to be one of the supporters we need from 18326 to chip in $3 or more today to help us close the gap?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42797?refcode=em20230729-2748&t=1&akid=2748%2E420207%2E8G9TsY)**
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42797?refcode=em20230729-2748&t=20&akid=2748%2E420207%2E8G9TsY)**
Thank you for your continued faith and support in our movement.
Together,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230729-2748-footer&t=21&refcode2=2748_420207_8G9TsY&akid=2748%2E420207%2E8G9TsY)**

subject: Did you see this Politico headline, friend?

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Friend,
_**AS I’VE SAID ALL ALONG: IT WAS SABOTAGE!**_
New documents obtained through a FOIA request made by the _Daily Signal_ reveal that the Obama Administration coordinated an effort to _**“torpedo”**_ our incoming administration.
And among the bad actors referenced in the documents is...

This once again confirms that the Deep State tried to sabotage our presidency.
But it also proves that these Marxist Democrats don’t care about doing what’s best for our country.
**They were even willing to _risk_ weakening our nation in an attempt to hurt their political opposition.**
In the eyes of the Democrats, voters like you are nothing but a pawn in their never-ending quest for power.
_I could NEVER imagine trying to put our country in harm’s way to score political points._
Friend, when I tell you that I love America, I mean it.
_**And you absolutely better believe it, because I wouldn’t risk a LIFETIME IN JAIL as an innocent man unless I truly loved our nation and would do anything to save it! **_
America First isn’t just a campaign slogan. I truly _believe_ in it.
**And in 2024, we will PROVE that an _overwhelming_ SILENT MAJORITY of Americans also believes that our nation must be put first once again.**
If you’re doing poorly due to the sinister crook currently occupying the White House, then just hit the back button and go about your day.

In the eyes of the Democrats, voters like you are nothing but a pawn in their never-ending quest for power. I could NEVER imagine trying to put our country in harm’s way to score political points. Friend, when I tell you that I love America, I mean it. And you absolutely better believe it, because I wouldn’t risk a LIFETIME IN JAIL as an innocent man unless I truly loved our nation and would do anything to save it! America First isn’t just a campaign slogan. I truly believe in it. And in 2024, we will PROVE that an overwhelming SILENT MAJORITY of Americans also believes that our nation must be put first once again. If you’re doing poorly due to the sinister crook currently occupying the White House, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if you can contribute, I assure you there will be more plots of sabotage concocted by the Deep State between now and Election Day 2024, making your support vital to saving our nation. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America. 1. OH-01 has already _been deemed a_ _pure toss up race_ __ by leading non-partisan election forecasters.

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: John Fetterman
subject: They’re trying to flip PA red 🔴 😧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country.
#
Derek,
It’s an honor to stand up for PA families in the Senate with my friend Bob Casey. **But Mitch McConnell and the GOP are doing everything they can to defeat him and flip PA red next year. 😧**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49725?refcode=em20230729-8481&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8481%2E434096%2EiY-7P8)
Just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country. Saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to reelecting Bob Casey, and all eyes will be on the Keystone State.
**[If we’re gonna keep the Senate blue, we need to come together to help Bob win this race. Please, split a contribution between our campaigns today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230729-1?refcode=em20230729-1-8481&refcode2=8481_434096_iY-7P8&akid=8481%2E434096%2EiY-7P8)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230729-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230729-8481&refcode2=8481_434096_iY-7P8&akid=8481%2E434096%2EiY-7P8)**
With support from all 67 counties, we built a people-powered team that made history in 2022. But PA will still be very, very close — and we don’t want to feel the way we did in 2016 when the GOP won our state.
That’s going to take work, and it will take grassroots support from folks like you, Derek. **[So if you can, please split a donation of $5 (or whatever makes sense for you right now) between me and Bob Casey so we can continue representing Pennsylvania together in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230729-1?refcode=em20230729-1-8481&refcode2=8481_434096_iY-7P8&akid=8481%2E434096%2EiY-7P8)**
Appreciate you all!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230729-8481-footer&t=2&refcode2=8481_434096_iY-7P8&akid=8481%2E434096%2EiY-7P8)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=8481%2E434096%2EiY-7P8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8481%2E434096%2EiY-7P8)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

But Mitch McConnell and the GOP are doing everything they can to defeat him and flip PA red next year. 😧 Just like last year, CNN is rating Pennsylvania one of the closest Senate races in the country. Saving our razor-thin Democratic majority could all come down to reelecting Bob Casey, and all eyes will be on the Keystone State. With support from all 67 counties, we built a people-powered team that made history in 2022. name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1hq01k090jf4qlmnpu7m2mdgob9p86qb213uio_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdimeoj4cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zov5rslc9dibcdqah186k1e2e2v3jklftrg4h6b0_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdimeoj4cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjgpq78pqdl3uc9efh94ski7i8dmf2ndk2s1ev6o_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdimeoj4cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

name: Jon Tester
subject: NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?
JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%
This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will have to fight like hell to make it happen.
Will you step up today and split a contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.
And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts. Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will come.
Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us build up as much small-dollar support as possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national Republicans throw our way. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.
—Jon

_\----- Original Message from Gretchen Whitmer, July 28, 2023 -----_
****
Guess what?
It's that time of the year again — Shark Week has arrived!
If you don’t know, I'm pretty passionate about Shark Week. Saying "It's Shark Week" fires me up every single day because every week is Shark Week when you're a Michigander.
It means you roll up your sleeves and you get things done. And like a shark, you don’t stop swimming. So while Michigan may only have freshwater, we definitely have our sharks.
No matter the challenges that come our way, we face them head-on and work together to build a bright future for everyone.
So, as we dive into this year's Shark Week, let's remember that the true spirit of this celebration lies in our collective hunger for progress, our unwavering determination, and our relentless drive to fight like hell — _together_.
Swimming forward with you,
Gretchen
P.S. Luckily, we don't need to worry when we're out on the water. One of the things that makes our lakes Great is that they're 🦈-free. Go enjoy this Pure Michigan summer! ;)

Sorry to be emailing you on a Saturday, but we hope you know we wouldn’t unless it was really important. **We wanted to remind you that our July fundraising deadline is on Monday.**
Meeting our fundraising goal is really important — even in an odd year like this one. name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6e5jr1v5v8fmnnrfnsvfl37mddq2ar43bls0n18_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdim9o30cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrd5jldqu9p0mra5nr8lor3duel325hoh45i7gn8_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdim9o30cjh2bs) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl3k9ble6oejk5lrsplb9ltsbil7injap62i5ifo_rp22sh2s8i66p70cdim9o30cjh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: It all adds up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’re reaching out today.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27305%2E3422442%2Ew_Iylz)
Derek,
As a campaign powered by small dollar donors, your support is the reason we’re able to send texts, place TV ads, and plan events so Katie can reach voters across the great state of California.
But our July fundraising deadline is coming up on Monday, and we need to have a strong showing if we’re going to demonstrate the true power of our campaign.
**That’s why we’re reaching out to see if you can make your very first donation of $5 today.**
[**Click here to make your first donation of $5 to send Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAJ29_2_NON_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27305_3422442_w_Iylz&akid=27305%2E3422442%2Ew_Iylz)
[**Click here to contribute a different amount—anything you can afford to donate will make a difference.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-2?refcode=EMAJ29_2_NON_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27305_3422442_w_Iylz&akid=27305%2E3422442%2Ew_Iylz)
Throughout her career, Katie has advocated for consumers at every level—from holding Big Banks accountable following the 2008 mortgage crisis, to introducing a bill to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.
Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept any corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money—she doesn’t want their checks. **That’s why making your first donation today will mean so much to us.**
**[So, please consider making your first donation of $5, or whatever you can afford, today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAJ29_2_NON_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27305_3422442_w_Iylz&akid=27305%2E3422442%2Ew_Iylz)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-2?refcode=EMAJ29_2_NON_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27305_3422442_w_Iylz&akid=27305%2E3422442%2Ew_Iylz)**
Thank you again, Derek.
—Katie Porter for California

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. clean_body: We’re reaching out today. Derek, As a campaign powered by small dollar donors, your support is the reason we’re able to send texts, place TV ads, and plan events so Katie can reach voters across the great state of California. But our July fundraising deadline is coming up on Monday, and we need to have a strong showing if we’re going to demonstrate the true power of our campaign. That’s why we’re reaching out to see if you can make your very first donation of $5 today. Throughout her career, Katie has advocated for consumers at every level—from holding Big Banks accountable following the 2008 mortgage crisis, to introducing a bill to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks. Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept any corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money—she doesn’t want their checks. That’s why making your first donation today will mean so much to us. Thank you again, Derek. —Katie Porter for California Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

Peter,

We know Mike wrote to you the other day to let you know about the strong fundraising numbers from his opponents and our need to keep pace.

The Democrats’ far-left donors want to take back the House - and to do that they need to win NY-17 - and we simply can’t allow that to happen. If we want to keep pace, we have to make July, the first month of the quarter, a huge success.

So we sat down with Mike and we came up with a plan.

If we can raise $75,000 in the next 48 HOURS Mike will be able to authorize a DOUBLE-MATCH on all contributions, effectively guaranteeing that we hit our goal.

clean_body: | | | | The Democrats aren’t stopping, so neither can we... | Peter, We know Mike wrote to you the other day to let you know about the strong fundraising numbers from his opponents and our need to keep pace. The Democrats’ far-left donors want to take back the House - and to do that they need to win NY-17 - and we simply can’t allow that to happen. If we want to keep pace, we have to make July, the first month of the quarter, a huge success. So we sat down with Mike and we came up with a plan. If we can raise $75,000 in the next 48 HOURS Mike will be able to authorize a DOUBLE-MATCH on all contributions, effectively guaranteeing that we hit our goal. | | | | | Thank you, Team Lawler | | | | | | Mike Lawler is a Republican running for reelection in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. Cuomo Bridge”. Proudly send the message that you want the bridge restored as the Tappan Zee. | Are you interested in staying up-to-date on Mike Lawler's reelection battle? Don't miss out on the latest news and updates from his campaign! By texting "Lawler" to 85007, you can receive regular updates on Mike's campaign, upcoming events, and important news about the race. Text "Lawler" to 85007 today and join the fight for a brighter future for New York! Do you know someone who would be interested in supporting Mike Lawler’s reelection campaign for Congress? Don't keep it to yourself! Spread the word and remind your friends and family to join the fight for America’s future. Simply forward this message to five of your friends or family members who you think would be interested in staying up-to-date with Mike's campaign. FORWARD THIS EMAIL As we get closer to the 2024 election, Mike Lawler is more motivated than ever to continue our journey toward a better future for all New Yorkers. To stay up-to-date with our latest news and events, we encourage you to text "Lawler" to 85007 and follow us on social media, where we share updates, thoughts, and news about our progress. You can also opt others in by providing their email address and we will send them regular updates and important news about the campaign. | go.txting.io/7jAGfc Let's work together to ensure that Mike Lawler has the support he needs to make a real difference for New York! | | | | | \- =
