body:
I don’t want to have a legacy of encouraging lawlessness | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c152e702ffca/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13563091?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=4d00fa09be&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| Each member of Congress represents the voices of approximately 761,179 Americans.

We’ve seen the impact of having elected officials who are soft on crime at the local and state level. We suffered through the lawlessness after members of Congress egged on ‘peaceful’ protests when it suited their political aims.

While elected officials were supposed to be creating laws that keep a nation safe, they resorted to taking advantage of our emotions like pawns on a chess board. Now we are dealing with the aftermath. {First Name/Friend}, where are those instigators now, and where are we?
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=a36fba1585&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| _**For the second year in a row, Washington has seen a surge in homicides and violent crimes, while at the same time police staffing has reached the lowest levels ever in our state history**_.

We **CANNOT** continue in this direction! Civil order and the Rule of Law must be the cornerstone of our self-governance.

**When I serve as your Congresswoman** , I will support local and state officials in upholding our laws by standing against the lawlessness that brings chaos, destruction and heartbreak into our communities.

You will never find me engaging in ploys of race-baiting and sowing division to score political points! **But, it is absolutely CRUCIAL to have your support in facing the DC Cartel that stoops to such manipulative schemes.**

[**Can I count on you to chip in $15, $25 or $50 today to show how determined we are to reestablish law and order in Washington?**](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=5b2c7462bf&e=0e51d1e991)

clean_body: | | Team, this is huge! Nebraskans just launched their ballot measure to secure sick leave for all workers. Now, they’re laser-focused on gathering the signatures they need to put universal paid sick leave on the ballot in 2024. This is just the first crucial step to deliver the benefits that Nebraska workers deserve. We're ready to help our friends at Paid Sick Leave for Nebraskans get the job done. = = Too many Nebraskans are having to choose between their health and their paycheck. Whether it’s working a shift with a fever or juggling a sick child’s needs while on the clock, this is the reality of thousands of Nebraska workers who receive zero paid sick leave benefits. It’s unacceptable, and our friends on the ground are standing up and demanding better for Nebraskans. Friend, Because of my advocacy for Palestinian rights, pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC have targeted me—and other colleagues who speak up for human rights. They want to maintain the unjust status quo, and they’re threatened by the shift in U.S. public opinion in support of Palestinian liberation. **To stifle our movement’s growing power, AIPAC and its affiliated PACs spent over $40 million in last year’s political races to defeat progressive Democratic candidates who are sympathetic to Palestinians’ human rights. They bully my colleagues to go silent or support rhetoric that dehumanizes Palestinians.** Pro-Trump billionaires donated millions to these PACs in order to shape the Democratic Party in primaries and attack Democrats in general elections. AIPAC also hosted Donald Trump at their annual conference, and the group keeps endorsing insurrectionist Republicans who voted to overturn the will of the American people in 2020’s election. **Clearly, AIPAC is not only anti-Palestinian, but also anti-democracy and anti-progressive. It is out of alignment with many of us who are fighting for working families. Democratic candidates should refuse financial support or endorsements from pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC or its connected PACs.** [**Please sign now to tell Democratic candidates: Reject support from anti-Palestinian AIPAC and its network of PACs.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnx33n5YcIhdR-lzWWWEiK05zb2sHAhI05soXH5k77N4kpN-O9tEF4g1mnewA2jS0P9-XIcRXtm2yi7t46tWPcBOBAz2QmVFBwoa8eVCTtujG2s4OJ5zqppEmFRuGtrQyZgRwP5t9r1aocZ785Gf9nkplxfvDYEWCflAamgr30sGKW6xNpe5Hj-9FnUrDUyTZJ_QE9hNe08nlCC6MZvvxPucQTRbyOyJfSU5WjaJtkX3o3X73z62BudlQRC2_Yuoiq5-UxlDXUZy101P679TpmbOktNvtUNoJtpF4RQaxyp5twQChP05TIzCsb_koZQISNeideo9-Zp5rQNPIKB2kmxvySvVwMHY5E3E0vi5q_6nj73FAIFm5-6I0POGbJ9c1juyAD3lHkqiy4s-gegSe3RYcObz8bbY9mQmiSxMUNM6pleYBD7g9OHkqITMWk-6rg1BFIk2XfnVhKhgQOAVHf7_OSXcW3u8fo6wO-W3bnyAvHZ1fsDt2zKjVsQNbI4e3Hrdhqs1oAx1bXzcKeg5uZNPOo4vaK7Uv0w6AhMMTmPuKPsWMyw7GF1q_vBQ8veJ9E/3ya/MlRbPO4LRVK17URrWBcfjA/h1/uWzPvzKKoka0BIImgKfKQ_M_cIWXmH5WD-YxXKkRQQ8) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnx33n5YcIhdR-lzWWWEiK05zb2sHAhI05soXH5k77N4kpN-O9tEF4g1mnewA2jS0P9-XIcRXtm2yi7t46tWPcBOBAz2QmVFBwoa8eVCTtujG2s4OJ5zqppEmFRuGtrQyZgRwP5t9r1aocZ785Gf9nkplxfvDYEWCflAamgr30sGKW6xNpe5Hj-9FnUrDUyTZJ_QE9hNe08nlCC6MZvvxPucQTRbyOyJfSU5WjaJtkX3kl-4PVRtglWzQjzgEfo4NY6dw_Sl_LGRmGpPevnQ0luk62sU9SjGL0q0vXXL8QzwZlahNAqj5tlQxSQSo6W23-wi6Iu0jjWsCIgiPKaCReAJl22ywuGCGd27sYIdvLvQyQGbOmgyhIiiDxALzdLwQbObYKPpWqr1FvAo7OzGtM89DDmSz_n4t2U_O87gGbtJBaB7Rsn6KMyOvYXRZjvCRTl5MLKIMG9yG3YGKlDRWOZfySdIFX6bSXOTa6IFPdWYsk-rxrMHFKYMy0b34F1ljB5LF9ar7e4S594G3ul5Z8qdbV6T6qWJ_XTXugLn38GOlGz9utQErbcePEPMaRrgbo/3ya/MlRbPO4LRVK17URrWBcfjA/h2/Y-ngOyKFeQU1prmhL2P-rQFovAM6UaBpfpFE_farvvE)

Democratic voters have shown in recent polls that they sympathize with Palestinians and do not want their taxpayer dollars to support the Israeli government’s human rights abuses.

Like all human beings, Palestinians deserve to live and thrive. When pro-apartheid organizations and Members of Congress try to silence me or other progressive women of color speaking up for Palestinians’ rights, they’re trying to maintain the unjust status quo that treats the Palestinian people as less than human.
As the far-right apartheid government in Israel is escalating attacks on Palestinians—backed by billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars—we need more Democrats who are willing to join me in taking on the status quo and standing up for human rights for all people, including Palestinians.
[**Please sign now to tell Democratic candidates running for election or re-election in 2024: Do not take money from AIPAC PAC or its network of PACs (the United Democracy Project and Democratic Majority for Israel). They bully my colleagues to go silent or support rhetoric that dehumanizes Palestinians. Pro-Trump billionaires donated millions to these PACs in order to shape the Democratic Party in primaries and attack Democrats in general elections. AIPAC also hosted Donald Trump at their annual conference, and the group keeps endorsing insurrectionist Republicans who voted to overturn the will of the American people in 2020’s election. Clearly, AIPAC is not only anti-Palestinian, but also anti-democracy and anti-progressive. It is out of alignment with many of us who are fighting for working families. Democratic candidates should refuse financial support or endorsements from pro-apartheid groups like AIPAC or its connected PACs. | Democratic voters have shown in recent polls that they sympathize with Palestinians and do not want their taxpayer dollars to support the Israeli government’s human rights abuses. Like all human beings, Palestinians deserve to live and thrive. When pro-apartheid organizations and Members of Congress try to silence me or other progressive women of color speaking up for Palestinians’ rights, they’re trying to maintain the unjust status quo that treats the Palestinian people as less than human. As the far-right apartheid government in Israel is escalating attacks on Palestinians—backed by billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars—we need more Democrats who are willing to join me in taking on the status quo and standing up for human rights for all people, including Palestinians. Thank you for taking action in solidarity with oppressed people. Together, we’re fighting for human rights for all people, with no exceptions. In service, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Not your typical Senate campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| If there’s one thing you need to know about our Senate race, it’s that MAGA Republicans see no greater threat to their power than yours truly.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3172%2E5257348%2EKVl1Ee)
Derek, if there’s one thing you need to know about our Senate race, it’s that **MAGA Republicans see no greater threat to their power than yours truly.**
Just look at how they’ve reacted in the last six months since we announced this campaign:
As soon as Kevin McCarthy had scraped by in the Speaker election — with a bare minimum number of votes after his _fifteenth_ humiliating attempt — **he removed me as the top Democrat on the Intelligence Committee.**
McCarthy is so weak that his chief antagonists in the Speaker’s race — like Matt Gaetz and Anna Paulina Luna — have hijacked floor proceedings time and again to target me even further with political attacks.
**Introducing legislation to bar me from receiving classified information.**
**Censuring me in political retaliation for investigating and impeaching Donald Trump.**
**Even trying to fine me $16 million.**
And Trump himself continues to attack me too. Including calling me out by name in an exclusive sit-down interview with _Fox News_ last week, _and expressing his hope that I will not be elected to the Senate._
Why do they continue to make me the target of their attacks?
Because time and again, when Trump has violated the law and abused his power by...
* Soliciting and using Russian help in the 2016 election
* Leveraging his office and U.S. military aid to Ukraine to get Zelenskyy to smear Joe Biden
* Inciting the deadly insurrection to stop the peaceful transfer of power on January 6

**...I’ve stood up again and again to say it isn’t okay. It’s criminal.**
Investigating foreign interference in our elections. Impeaching him for abusing his oath of office. Speaking the truth about what Trump knew and did on January 6.
**MAGA Republicans do not want to see Californians elect me to represent them in the Senate, because no one has stood up to Trump and his cronies as often and as effectively as I have. For _years._**
They aren’t going to stop attacking me or our campaign. And very often I’m going to need your help to respond. That’s why I’m asking:
**[Will you chip in $10 or any amount to my Senate campaign today to help us respond to Trump and MAGA Republicans’ attacks and keep up the fight for our democracy and an economy that works for all?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=july2023_abs_em.luhYnl&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230729_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3172%2E5257348%2EKVl1Ee)**

name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: This is a big deal, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Friend, my team and I have been busy attending events and meeting Hoosiers across the state!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
This is easily one of my favorite things to do – I love getting to know our residents and hearing their thoughts on how folks in Washington should be doing their job.
I've heard from a lot of people, and one common theme keeps presenting itself: Indiana needs change.
While there's a lot to celebrate about our state, those things often get outshined by the GOP's attack on our freedoms – freedoms to vote, to make our own medical decisions, and to feel safe in our communities.
That's why I'm fighting to bring my people-first vision to Washington – one that focuses on helping our working families, keeping our neighborhoods safe, and protecting our democracy.
But if we're even going to make it to Election Day, contributions from our friends and neighbors are absolutely essential. Our End of Month Fundraising Deadline is the perfect opportunity to show your support – will you chip in toward our $7,882 goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
CHIP IN TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260

But if we're even going to make it to Election Day, contributions from our friends and neighbors are absolutely essential. Our End of Month Fundraising Deadline is the perfect opportunity to show your support – will you chip in toward our $7,882 goal? [] CHIP IN TODAY [] Thank you, Keith Potts Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council. [] Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment. He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak. Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to Keith Potts for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 SUPPORT KEITH [] [] Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate Keith for Senate PO Box 90103 Indianapolis, IN 46260 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

And so do Roy Cooper and Democratic leaders across the state.** _But Republicans in Raleigh clearly have a different idea._ NC GOPers would like to make it so that some voters have a harder time casting ballots — and so the GOP supermajority in the General Assembly has the final say on contested election outcomes. Meanwhile, they’re planning to rig electoral maps with extreme partisan gerrymandering to keep incumbent Republicans in office. These radical legislators are determined to steal the power from the people and give it all to themselves. **We won’t allow it.** **Roy is leading the fight to secure North Carolina’s democracy. | Hilary Franz knows how to get things done, Peter.

_**FIRST:**_ When Hilary Franz stepped into office, the Washington State Department of Natural Resources’ wildfire fighting capabilities were described as the “do not respond” agency.

_**THEN:**_ Hilary laid out a plan to secure historic new resources, develop a 20-year forest health plan, and give our firefighters the training, skills, and equipment needed to safely fight worsening wildfires.

_**NOW:**_ Washington is a national leader in wildfire fighting and prevention and forest management, all while creating sustainable-good paying jobs and delivering for our communities.

When our government is constantly stuck in disagreement, differences, and division, Hilary is working on the ground to understand our greatest problems and create solutions.

In her work across Washington, Hilary has seen communities big and small, rural and urban, struggling with the same things – housing affordability, rising costs, the impacts of climate change, and a lack of mental health care. She's ready to take the same determination she brought to solving our wildfire crisis to the Governor's office to tackle our challenges headfirst. [_**But, Peter,with our critical July fundraising deadline in just 48 hours, Hilary needs your help. name: Sen. Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: this week’s powerfully important end-of-month deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Grassroots donors helped send Joe and Kamala to the White House, and grassroots donors will help keep them in the White House. | | |
---
Peter -- When President Biden and Vice President Harris asked me to be a part of their reelection campaign’s National Advisory Board, I couldn’t say yes fast enough. The way I see it, joining the Biden-Harris 2024 National Advisory Board is another way of saying I’m all-in. All-in to reelect this terrific team. All-in to defeat the MAGA Republicans who want to drag us backwards. All-in to keep working alongside Joe and Kamala as they protect our freedoms, defend our democracy, and put our government on the side of working people. **Joe and Kamala are holding the line in this powerfully important election, but it’s going to take _all of us_ rolling up our sleeves and fighting by their side to win this thing. Now, Peter, I don’t have to tell you how badly we have to hold onto the White House.
Not just so we can keep MAGA Republicans far, far, FAR away from 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue (although that’s certainly reason enough). But also so we can keep making real change alongside Joe and Kamala. So we can keep fighting for big, structural change together.
From moving forward with student debt cancellation to putting a new tax on greedy corporations, it’s been an honor to work with them -- and they’ve shown what it looks like to have a government that works for working families, not the rich and powerful.
**Grassroots donors helped send Joe and Kamala to the White House in 2020, and grassroots donors will help keep them in the White House. So let’s have their backs, Peter.**

clean_body: Grassroots donors helped send Joe and Kamala to the White House, and grassroots donors will help keep them in the White House. | | | Peter -- When President Biden and Vice President Harris asked me to be a part of their reelection campaign’s National Advisory Board, I couldn’t say yes fast enough. The way I see it, joining the Biden-Harris 2024 National Advisory Board is another way of saying I’m all-in. All-in to reelect this terrific team. All-in to defeat the MAGA Republicans who want to drag us backwards. All-in to keep working alongside Joe and Kamala as they protect our freedoms, defend our democracy, and put our government on the side of working people. Joe and Kamala are holding the line in this powerfully important election, but it’s going to take all of us rolling up our sleeves and fighting by their side to win this thing. So I’m asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Now, Peter, I don’t have to tell you how badly we have to hold onto the White House. Not just so we can keep MAGA Republicans far, far, FAR away from 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue (although that’s certainly reason enough). But also so we can keep making real change alongside Joe and Kamala. So we can keep fighting for big, structural change together. From moving forward with student debt cancellation to putting a new tax on greedy corporations, it’s been an honor to work with them -- and they’ve shown what it looks like to have a government that works for working families, not the rich and powerful. Grassroots donors helped send Joe and Kamala to the White House in 2020, and grassroots donors will help keep them in the White House. So let’s have their backs, Peter. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Elizabeth Warren U.S. Senator, Massachusetts

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: George Santos + Donald Trump = birds of a feather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress running against
George Santos.

Like Donald Trump, my opponent calls himself an “America-first
Republican.”

Both Santos and Trump claim the 2020 election was stolen -- despite not
having any evidence. 🤔

They’re both anti-choice, pro-gun, radical right-wing lunatics.

And now, they’re both under criminal indictment and are running for office
to avoid jail time.

We can’t let them win.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19010?t=1001&akid=3441%2E346206%2E-GsXMD ]Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help
me DEFEAT George Santos and restore honesty and integrity to the U.S.
Congress?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19010?t=1002&akid=3441%2E346206%2E-GsXMD ][IMG]

Trump and Santos are birds of a feather. Let’s defeat them together.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230729-3441-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3441_346206_-GsXMD&akid=3441%2E346206%2E-GsXMD

subject: let me explain

body:
| I’ve got some important news that I had to share right away: **A new GOP opponent just entered the race in Ohio to defeat me and turn the Senate red.**

With polls already showing us neck and neck, I need your grassroots support to help me pull ahead and win. [_So please, will you split $10 right now between me and the Voter Protection Project to win this race and keep the Senate blue?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50619?t=6&akid=9563%2E878179%2EcWTfou)

[_So please, will you split $10 or more between me and the Voter Protection Project – everything you can spare before tonight’s rapid-response deadline – to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50619?t=7&akid=9563%2E878179%2EcWTfou) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/50620?t=8&akid=9563%2E878179%2EcWTfou)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=9563%2E878179%2EcWTfou). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=9563%2E878179%2EcWTfou).**

Fellow American,

I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – _one of the most competitive House races in the country._

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics.**

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f08bce513f6f4237b02a8af540899478&_e=XcUbtzfZU9hRsyZXj1sdWL4jofsmYfz6mAeBhA1Gx6S-iD8jQvXHJud-u7bq6YrIC6sCJf4aGsfJyakmfi4Y46psH5yRsbvZ1fLdBXtO8DoxTyFwVwYz2dtgH77MwCztBgfmcUxNHriplctXHHWPZKZg-Q1CWcl2DhWezNriHgPxDvrAaE0hlIj_CPDSwtaDjfzipQu5s34y-XfPRiXFyWhFiU_H5Zog-BQoAJ8YL0E9sftDct5mydzWKJpjXOkGogDBMHsoHAxJF3fnTr2BdTF11qYmVXFSXybDT83ztkvcWze__mxpQsInWB-FWfJ5EtZSOEGIySSn6mfxfbBBFrljpPTVuqT4e5fj5H6N9Dxj5QCImo8fzibDptUMgzIO)
Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer.

After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader.

**Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California.**

As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime.

America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them.

**I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve.**

[**Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track by supporting my campaign with a $5, $10 or $15 contribution today?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f08bce513f6f4237b02a8af540899478&_e=XcUbtzfZU9hRsyZXj1sdWL4jofsmYfz6mAeBhA1Gx6S-iD8jQvXHJud-u7bq6YrIC6sCJf4aGsfJyakmfi4Y46psH5yRsbvZ1fLdBXtO8DoxTyFwVwYz2dtgH77MwCztBgfmcUxNHriplctXHHWPZKZg-Q1CWcl2DhWezNriHgPxDvrAaE0hlIj_CPDSwtaDjfzipQu5s34y-XfPRiXFyWhFiU_H5Zog-BQoAJ8YL0EY5tKo5cqGrakuVEStsdwHew896OBD2fgE_g2CVofszd_yZSZnSgTKiSxDAO6DiztzjM2ly6mLjEz3SlIemNXkhow_vI6fR8jVenPjPJxZJ9wJfVWGeZnlKg9fJqabJv7j0pEiP4-TKL1PtP0OXw77)

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f08bce513f6f4237b02a8af540899478&_e=XcUbtzfZU9hRsyZXj1sdWL4jofsmYfz6mAeBhA1Gx6S-iD8jQvXHJud-u7bq6YrIC6sCJf4aGsfJyakmfi4Y46psH5yRsbvZ1fLdBXtO8DoxTyFwVwYz2dtgH77MwCztBgfmcUxNHriplctXHHWPZKZg-Q1CWcl2DhWezNriHgPxDvrAaE0hlIj_CPDSwtaDjfzipQu5s34y-XfPRiXFyWhFiU_H5Zog-BQoAJ8YL0HGvwXpUa1Q_0-l7rdqhvTaDc3iXyR6TAn3M2iVHH2WpDLuYFtn_WdHTkle_hvcHsSx2Moyel6SMB-w9N3WoRnZs69yRKuDDPAQvPBAl2yaqzgcE7Vc1RYRAtdFjP-zo0GoEV_IjQrVKL2MqqaPC4EW)
Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it?

We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again.

**California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation.**

[**But I need your help to win the fight so I can make it to Congress and get to work. Will you send in a Marine and mayor? Please join me today with a contribution of just $5, $10, $15 or more.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f08bce513f6f4237b02a8af540899478&_e=XcUbtzfZU9hRsyZXj1sdWL4jofsmYfz6mAeBhA1Gx6S-iD8jQvXHJud-u7bq6YrIC6sCJf4aGsfJyakmfi4Y46psH5yRsbvZ1fLdBXtO8DoxTyFwVwYz2dtgH77MwCztBgfmcUxNHriplctXHHWPZKZg-Q1CWcl2DhWezNriHgPxDvrAaE0hlIj_CPDSwtaDjfzipQu5s34y-XfPRiXFyWhFiU_H5Zog-BQoAJ8YL0EQBsltkqTz7BYMQIHpoLswoQX4XVX_Qn3N0pIqHFWHsEdFlSsYhANx8jBEYEVpXt1tiWXoiM2YTK34GlQVzuHDx-tXlRm-zQDygkBUMPCRl98FybUgbQzqUrmwM1oQ0reaZPM3qojPzOCtEa17dvMp)

For America,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f08bce513f6f4237b02a8af540899478&_e=XcUbtzfZU9hRsyZXj1sdWL4jofsmYfz6mAeBhA1Gx6S-iD8jQvXHJud-u7bq6YrIC6sCJf4aGsfJyakmfi4Y46psH5yRsbvZ1fLdBXtO8DoxTyFwVwYz2dtgH77MwCztBgfmcUxNHriplctXHHWPZKZg-Q1CWcl2DhWezNriHgPxDvrAaE0hlIj_CPDSwtaDjfzipQu5s34y-XfPRiXFyWhFiU_H5Zog-BQoAJ8YL0Fo5NnmWE3wdnImqfTBFJlkIyn0W1JPxhhC5WC_ZCTkO0TfAHLkECfcQciQsGWcmzZ6fUpgBi9D9aJqIc6yCOJwlok0rZMBlCruOSlnU6WVk1FFOqDutSQZ8cbmrinldeS1G6dAMBssBcTkMhDHRD0a)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader. Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California. As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime. America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them. I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve. Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it? We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again. California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation. For America, Kevin Lincoln Veteran, USMC Republican for Congress | Meet Kevin Lincoln My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran. Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader. I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton. Like , Follow , and Subscribe! Kevin Lincoln is a former member of the U.S. Marine Corps. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | PAID FOR BY KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The stakes couldn’t be higher
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Not one, but TWO wealthy GOP candidates are considering running against me, and they could announce their campaigns any day now.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=741%2E35263%2E7H6B4-)
Hey Peter: I’ve got some not-so-great news. Our end-of-month deadline is coming up in just 2 days, and my team tells me we might not hit our 10,000 donor goal. **[Before I get into the details about why we need to meet this goal, can you chip in to get us back on track?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230729_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=741%2E35263%2E7H6B4-)** This is the worst time to be falling behind, Peter. Not one, but _two_ mega-millionaire Republicans are considering running against me, _**and they could launch their campaigns any day now.**_ Republicans are certainly eager to flip my seat and regain control of the Senate majority. Last year, the GOP spent $77 million to win Wisconsin’s other Senate seat by just 1% — and they’re preparing to spend even more to defeat me. While the potential opponents lining up to run against me can self-fund their campaigns, I’m counting on this grassroots team to help me win next fall. We’ve done it before, and I know we can do it again — but only with your support. **[Peter, before our end-of-month deadline expires in a few days, can I count on you to pitch in to help us hit our donor goal?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230729_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=741%2E35263%2E7H6B4-)** Thanks so much for your continued support! — Tammy

subject: The few and the proud have no Commandant
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Today, you can do something about that.
#
Derek—
The Marine Corps is the tip of the spear. The Germans called them Teufel Hunden — Devil Dogs — after they fought them in the First World War. They are the heroes of Iwo Jima. The few, the proud.
And because of Tommy Tuberville, they are without a confirmed Commandant for the first time since 1859.
Alongside the next Commandant of the USMC, hundreds of senior Military promotions are being held up — Generals and Admirals.
All because of one Senator.
VoteVets has been fighting Tuberville tooth and nail for months on this. Democrats in the Senate took to the floor this week, calling out Tuberville and his blockade.
But after all of this, not one Republican in the Senate has told Tommy Tuberville to stand down. It’s time to start turning up the heat on the rest of the Senate GOP.
**Help us do that, Derek.**
**[Rush $3 here and help us prepare a full court press against the Senate GOP. They say they’re the pro-Veteran party — time to prove it. We’re going to hold each of them accountable, all the way to the ballot box.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july23.UD-seS&refcode=em230729-1-15&t=1&akid=13881%2E3013755%2Eg4iiSr)**

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The GOP is winning at fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends, did you see this headline from Politico ?
In the wake of that crucial FEC fundraising deadline we had last month, it’s becoming crystal clear that House Republican incumbents and candidates have been raking in heaps of cash.
And while I’ve been optimistic about our chances at regaining a House majority in 2024 (after all, the margin is just five seats!) this trend is genuinely worrying to me. It’s not just a matter of party line politics - Democrats are up against MAGA Republicans whose extreme beliefs just don’t reflect our American values.
Look at my opponent Bill Wells for one clear example: He opposes abortion under all circumstances, wants to overturn marriage equality, and thinks climate change is a hoax. And extreme, anti-science, Donald Trump-worshipping candidates just like Wells are going to be on ballots all across the country next November - with the financial backing of the National Republican Congressional Committee, of course.
That’s why we can’t sit on the sidelines in my race or any other - there’s just too much at stake.
Big victories - like flipping the House - are usually reached through incremental progress, so my team and I have set a goal to raise an additional $2,500 through email by midnight on July 31st to pave the way for next year. Will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help get us there and support my re-election campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If we’re going to retake the House in 2024, Democratic incumbents like myself are going to have to step up our fundraising efforts to hold our ground. Winning a majority will require an all-around approach - like raising funds early on so we can map out a strategy to connect with voters and offering our support for like-minded Democrats who are running for crucial Republican-held seats.
Please, chip in any amount towards our $2,500 email fundraising goal to help build a strong re-election campaign, fend off my MAGA opponent, and use this platform to support other Democrats in the months ahead. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thanks so much for your support.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: i’ll give you 3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4400?t=1007&amount=25&akid=299%2E52803%2EpauZBo ][IMG]

Peter, I could be here ALL DAY listing reasons why I need your
support in my race for U.S. Senate. But seeing as neither of us has all
day (loads to do!), I’ll just give you 3 big ones.

1) We’re going up against a multi-millionaire with seemingly limitless
resources. You might hear that and think, “what can my $15 or $25 do
against THAT?” But when this grassroots team comes together, trust me, it
really adds up.

2) We’re going to win this race by speaking to every Maryland voter we
possibly can. We need resources to make calls, knock on doors, run ads,
and whatever else it takes to communicate with Marylanders in every corner
of the state.

3) We have a Maryland-first message that resonates with voters. We’re
putting working families and underrepresented communities at the center of
this campaign.

If you still need one more reason, here it is: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4400?t=1008&amount=25&akid=299%2E52803%2EpauZBo ]We’ve got until Monday
night to hit our $25,000 End-of-Month goal, and I need your help. Can I
count on you to chip in $25 ASAP?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

name: Mark Takano
subject: This is extremely personal...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
I hope you read this, Peter

| | [**Below, Rep. Mark Takano has an important and very personal message for you – but first, would you consider chipping in $7 to support a fearless Asian American leader fighting for progressive values in Congress? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248044/419113050/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=) | [CHIP IN $7 TO SUPPORT MARK TAKANO NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248045/419113051/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=)
---
**_As a proud Japanese American, would you allow me to take this time to tell you a little bit about my very personal family story?_ I know most people don’t read long emails like this, but it would mean a lot to me if you read the whole thing. **

Peter, I’ve been reflecting on the respective stories and experiences of my maternal and paternal grandparents, pictured below.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248046/419113052/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248047/419113053/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=)
---|---
Painfully, along with my parents,**they were all sent to Japanese American internment camps** during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything. These policies were a continuation of _a long history of Asian exclusion and discrimination in US history._

Nonetheless, we’ve persevered. My family started over and rebuilt their entire lives after the internment camps. **Asian American communities have traveled across continents** to pursue the American Dream and build a new, better life for their children.

Today, I’m feeling especially thankful for my parents, Nancy – who I miss everyday – and Willie, for everything they sacrificed for me and my brothers.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248048/419113054/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=)
Peter, I’m proud to be Asian American. The AAPI community has persevered and thrived in the United States. And it means so much to me that our nation is collectively celebrating and acknowledging AAPI history, contributions, and culture.

**After all, Asian American history _is_ American history. **

[**Peter, as one of a small handful of Asian Americans serving in Congress, I’m proud to be a voice for Asian American communities and other underrepresented groups. If you’re with me, would you chip in $7 or any amount to help me keep up my work for the AAPI community? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248049/419113055/322263095?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248055/419113061/322263095?amount=7&amounts=7,15,25&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=)

[Or a custom donation »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248057/419113063/322263095?amount=10&amounts=7,15,25&refcode=MTFC_20230729_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmNjZDRlMC0yYzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48SDVXZnZ8-FoSi6F9OfZrBjaIDmazW-2ItB8XTLpMY=)
Learning about our stories is the best tool we have to combat current and future anti-Asian discrimination – **so** **thank you for taking the time to read this message.**

\-- Mark Takano

clean_body: I hope you read this, Peter | | = | = As a proud Japanese American, would you allow me to take this time to tell you a little bit about my very personal family story? I know most people don’t read long emails like this, but it would mean a lot to me if you read the whole thing. Peter, I’ve been reflecting on the respective stories and experiences of my maternal and paternal grandparents, pictured below. = | = ---|--- Painfully, along with my parents,they were all sent to Japanese American internment camps during World War II because of racist, fear-mongering policies. They lost everything. These policies were a continuation of a long history of Asian exclusion and discrimination in US history. Nonetheless, we’ve persevered. My family started over and rebuilt their entire lives after the internment camps. Asian American communities have traveled across continents to pursue the American Dream and build a new, better life for their children. Today, I’m feeling especially thankful for my parents, Nancy – who I miss everyday – and Willie, for everything they sacrificed for me and my brothers. = Peter, I’m proud to be Asian American. The AAPI community has persevered and thrived in the United States. And it means so much to me that our nation is collectively celebrating and acknowledging AAPI history, contributions, and culture. After all, Asian American history is American history. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Learning about our stories is the best tool we have to combat current and future anti-Asian discrimination – so thank you for taking the time to read this message. \-- Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. body:
Judge Hanen’s silence is leaving DACA recipients in limbo. | | | Peter, It’s been almost two months now since Judge Andrew Hanen held a widely anticipated oral argument on DACA. Since then, we’ve heard nothing. Judge Hanen can rule _at any point_ on the future of DACA, but until he does, DACA recipients are left in a state of agonizing limbo, unsure if they’ll still be protected after this decision. **We're done waiting — which is why we're fighting for permanent protections for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. As a reminder, Judge Hanen is the right-wing judge in Texas who closed DACA to new applicants. His 2021 ruling against DACA has prevented immigrant youth from applying to DACA for the first time.
So we’re no strangers to Judge Hanen’s attacks on DACA. We’ll be ready to fight back when the time comes.
But at the end of the day, DACA is still a temporary solution. We need more. _We deserve more._
**UWDA is leading the fight for permanent protections — for DACA recipients and all undocumented people — because we are here to stay, regardless of what anti-immigrant leaders like Judge Hanen have to say.**
As we scale up our advocacy work to win our demands in Congress and pressure the Biden administration to deliver on its promises, we are counting on support from grassroots allies like you, Peter.
**Rush a donation to support United We Dream Action’s fight for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. We need to secure a pathway to citizenship before it’s too late.**

clean_body: Judge Hanen’s silence is leaving DACA recipients in limbo. | | | Peter, It’s been almost two months now since Judge Andrew Hanen held a widely anticipated oral argument on DACA. Since then, we’ve heard nothing. Judge Hanen can rule at any point on the future of DACA, but until he does, DACA recipients are left in a state of agonizing limbo, unsure if they’ll still be protected after this decision. We're done waiting — which is why we're fighting for permanent protections for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. Pitch in to help us support immigrant communities no matter what Judge Hanen has in store. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | As a reminder, Judge Hanen is the right-wing judge in Texas who closed DACA to new applicants. His 2021 ruling against DACA has prevented immigrant youth from applying to DACA for the first time. So we’re no strangers to Judge Hanen’s attacks on DACA. We’ll be ready to fight back when the time comes. But at the end of the day, DACA is still a temporary solution. We need more. We deserve more. UWDA is leading the fight for permanent protections — for DACA recipients and all undocumented people — because we are here to stay, regardless of what anti-immigrant leaders like Judge Hanen have to say. As we scale up our advocacy work to win our demands in Congress and pressure the Biden administration to deliver on its promises, we are counting on support from grassroots allies like you, Peter. Rush a donation to support United We Dream Action’s fight for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. We need to secure a pathway to citizenship before it’s too late. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your ongoing support, Deya, United We Dream Action

Team, Jason is a big fan of 80s rock. Journey, Foreigner — you name it. So it probably comes as no surprise that our campaign lives by three words: **__Don’t. Stop. Believin’.__** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248193/419113788/1080436694?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC30_20230729_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMThlODM1Ni0yZDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zdrFKtQrixzyeRFRT-MbCuhDEjY_Wgwndw4mwFxFn0E=) It’s easy to lose faith. We all have days where it’s tempting to throw in the towel — or feel like one person can’t make a difference. **We’re asking you to keep the faith. Especially right now.** Jason has always gone where the fight is — even when the odds were stacked against him. That determination has led to some incredible progress: — Passing lifesaving gun safety reform
— Defending our democracy
— Rebuilding America’s place in the world
— Reducing inflation and growing our economy The journey is long, and some of the biggest triumphs come from choosing to stand back up after being pushed down. clean_body: | Team, Jason is a big fan of 80s rock. Journey, Foreigner — you name it. So it probably comes as no surprise that our campaign lives by three words: Don’t. Stop. Believin’. = It’s easy to lose faith. We all have days where it’s tempting to throw in the towel — or feel like one person can’t make a difference. We’re asking you to keep the faith. Especially right now. Jason has always gone where the fight is — even when the odds were stacked against him. That determination has led to some incredible progress: — Passing lifesaving gun safety reform — Defending our democracy — Rebuilding America’s place in the world — Reducing inflation and growing our economy The journey is long, and some of the biggest triumphs come from choosing to stand back up after being pushed down. It’s time we roll up our sleeves and get to work. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Hold onto that feeling, — Team Crow | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: JD was started by a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers and volunteers — including me.
body:
#
Peter, this email will probably be a bit longer than others you receive today, but it’s really important and I hope you’ll read the entire message.
Justice Democrats was started by just a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions of people for the first time — myself included.
**In 2018, when Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run** , she was working as a bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running for office. Sometimes, that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class candidate.
**We helped AOC manage her team** , run her organizing program, and make everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever to serve in Congress in his place.
**Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing more**. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a fraction of what they can raise.
We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we rely on supporters like you to power our work.
Thank you so much for joining our movement and supporting our work to recruit and elect more working-class champions like AOC, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee. It means so much that you’re with us.
[**→ Will you take the next step to support our work by making a contribution to help us reach our $95,000 end-of-month fundraising goal? Every single donation will make a real difference and I wouldn’t be asking if it wasn’t important.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136194?refcode=em20230729-30109&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=30109%2E1203867%2EcVQMFv)
**[Donate $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136194?refcode=em20230729-30109&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=30109%2E1203867%2EcVQMFv)**
I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight with you, thank you again.
In solidarity,
Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director
Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=30109%2E1203867%2EcVQMFv) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=30109%2E1203867%2EcVQMFv) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230729-30109-footer&t=24&refcode2=30109_1203867_cVQMFv&akid=30109%2E1203867%2EcVQMFv)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=30109%2E1203867%2EcVQMFv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=30109%2E1203867%2EcVQMFv)

| | [**_I’ll be blunt -- I really wish I didn’t have to ask you for money. But my FIRST End of Month Deadline since launching my campaign is just 48 hours away, and it’s absolutely critical that I show my people-powered campaign has what it takes to defeat Don Bacon and his corporate donors. Right now, I still need 343 more supporters to step up in these final 48 hours to prove I have what it takes to win. Can I count on you to pitch in $15 before the calendar flips? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248273/419113988/1698358150?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYmEyYi0yZDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gADx-I1de7uGDalzzYuSixVaJkj9RzTnWIpnc3oqN4=) I’ll be blunt: This is going to be a tough race. I know it’s not going to be easy to retire Don Bacon and flip this seat from red to blue. Especially when he’s already raised more than [**_$1.4 MILLION_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248277/419113992/1698358150?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYmEyYi0yZDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gADx-I1de7uGDalzzYuSixVaJkj9RzTnWIpnc3oqN4=) to take me down. [**_The truth is: I can’t compete with Bacon’s massive piles of corporate cash without your help. But if just 343 grassroots supporters step up in these final 48 hours, I’ll be able to fully fund my campaign and send Bacon a message that his days in power are numbered. So I’m personally asking you: Will you chip in $15? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248281/419113997/1698358150?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYmEyYi0yZDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gADx-I1de7uGDalzzYuSixVaJkj9RzTnWIpnc3oqN4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248286/419114001/1698358150?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYmEyYi0yZDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gADx-I1de7uGDalzzYuSixVaJkj9RzTnWIpnc3oqN4=) I don’t enjoy asking for your hard-earned cash. [**But this race isn’t about me. It’s about every single Nebraska family.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67248290/419114005/1698358150?refcode=20230729_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhhYmEyYi0yZDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gADx-I1de7uGDalzzYuSixVaJkj9RzTnWIpnc3oqN4=) And right now, we have a Congressman who’s more focused on his next cable news appearance than on making life better for people back home. Tony Vargas is a State Senator, public school teacher, and Dad running to represent Nebraska’s Second Congressional District and unseat Republican Don Bacon.

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

name: Jim Nelson
subject: The Left can’t cancel me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Nelson for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, The Left’s attack on Black Conservatives is despicable. We’ve all seen how they treat Clarence Thomas. Recently, **1.3 MILLION** Democrats signed a petition to have him REMOVED from SCOTUS because he doesn’t fit their narrative. Well, I know that bigotry firsthand. To Democrats, if you’re a black man, you have to think a certain way – or they’ll crush you. And, boy, do they hate me. **I’m everything they despise. I’m a black conservative, a police officer, a veteran, a father, and a pastor.**
---
[**HELP A RETIRED POLICE OFFICER**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2b2e3d560e3343b885aeafa03efd44a4&_e=BHNEVldN7sfAk-OakDLjYu6fo9I9v3CnWksdSOpsiXPPYGrWV0oY7hQ_AGKRycevvFiHBUoERwGcZSUMNOwgb57SVV6wzSYUGSotHp9zI95SouixxOwNiEciXWj9ZCW1eiSi9cyT2n8atDIB64M3PMM9Q0lqnsowyLfJSU1AGE77b0t_XEDRXHxnnFv1QlcoU-rxk7uAnxIhEJ7MoQbzfs7ovWjE9EzwqAslDowR3kBaALB5uhpO-cV89G758_AV9QrQ72kpKJxbPFYugVtNRbwfbIYRzjQhuXo-O8aGXhDRazifh91FNCTd1jW82SwDILZS6MokQ-F9iIB4kRrwtuYEXC1YngTRBdu3GDMDekC929CAf5XRWGHYDjoKHfLGoZ4UIV-o3E3UyIGVxqpCdYXhu5VPzasf73_DrmJ6gJDGUDw_mWMq64ROO4hlgwHHTwwd_yAyFtA21IyKTqAvqTm-Ox14MRe154z7Csd7V9rW6h4Z4EMt_kjvF4UOSFoSImanYXvd0IkSjBHDMtY_yKCBgjBSLfqtgjyYPYQShe0%3D)

I have always fought for what I believed—**and never once backed down.** Last month, I announced my campaign for Congress. **[I love our country too much to sit on the sidelines.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2b2e3d560e3343b885aeafa03efd44a4&_e=BHNEVldN7sfAk-OakDLjYu6fo9I9v3CnWksdSOpsiXPPYGrWV0oY7hQ_AGKRycevvFiHBUoERwGcZSUMNOwgb57SVV6wzSYUGSotHp9zI95SouixxOwNiEciXWj9ZCW1eiSi9cyT2n8atDIB64M3PMM9Q0lqnsowyLfJSU1AGE77b0t_XEDRXHxnnFv1QlcoU-rxk7uAnxIhEJ7MoQbzfs7ovWjE9EzwqAslDowR3kBaALB5uhpO-cV89G758_AV9QrQ72kpKJxbPFYugVtNRbwfbIYRzjQhuXo-O8aGXhDRazifh91FNCTd1jW82SwDILZS6MokQ-F9iIB4kRrwtuYEXC1YngTRBdu3GDMDekC929CAf5XRWGHYDjoKHfLGoZ4UIV-o3E3UyIGVxqpCdQPttM2M1dWQADPPlM9TfmuuxhgUEkGMy7gA8xewa0ya87vPo9VeWKAeFlZZrvZe8yFBpIX1o50knfuDEzgDDeS6eNGyHxNZpvrij76FzmPGNHvtkwyxsrnVIKIPPYj21120Ik5yGULO9Nbi0isODlg%3D)**
---
[** STAND WITH ME**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=2b2e3d560e3343b885aeafa03efd44a4&_e=BHNEVldN7sfAk-OakDLjYu6fo9I9v3CnWksdSOpsiXPPYGrWV0oY7hQ_AGKRycevvFiHBUoERwGcZSUMNOwgb57SVV6wzSYUGSotHp9zI95SouixxOwNiEciXWj9ZCW1eiSi9cyT2n8atDIB64M3PMM9Q0lqnsowyLfJSU1AGE77b0t_XEDRXHxnnFv1QlcoU-rxk7uAnxIhEJ7MoQbzfs7ovWjE9EzwqAslDowR3kBaALB5uhpO-cV89G758_AV9QrQ72kpKJxbPFYugVtNRbwfbIYRzjQhuXo-O8aGXhDRazifh91FNCTd1jW82SwDILZS6MokQ-F9iIB4kRrwtuYEXC1YngTRBdu3GDMDekC929CAf5XRWGHYDjoKHfLGoZ4UIV-o3E3UyIGVxqpCdckvPPmOmHI2Ku8jVOTGir6iqq9yiqll1RkCor4UIcqJBSJNvkCMwnsdnQbt7_ugjhBY8kbtVzf2WnTgTbp6nKRLlpqFwC3McPVuTN2jeOpg0qz4hvSfnabfSec4FJ3uBXMDM_uICTFd_OiJeWx7hE4%3D)

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67253600/419123995/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmY2NzhmOC0zMzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bQZ3PJj9R_PdLSowR7gBjLsPswJqu7uu-nwBtty6rk=)
Peter,

**[I wanted to take a moment to share more about why I'm running for Congress. I hope you'll read this entire message, then consider making a donation to help us improve lives in CA-27 and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67253601/419123997/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.29.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmY2NzhmOC0zMzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bQZ3PJj9R_PdLSowR7gBjLsPswJqu7uu-nwBtty6rk=)**

When I think about why I'm running for Congress, I think about my kids -- specifically my daughter, Maya.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67253604/419123998/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.29.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmY2NzhmOC0zMzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bQZ3PJj9R_PdLSowR7gBjLsPswJqu7uu-nwBtty6rk=)
I'll never forget the day six years ago when Maya came home from kindergarten and told me about some “exercises” she’d done with her classmates. She didn't quite understand what was going on, but I realized she was describing an active shooter drill.

It hit me at that moment; we now live in a country where millions of Americans fear that a hug goodbye before school, a concert, or even church, could be the last.

I also think about the Supreme Court's ruling on _Roe v. Wade_. Right now, Maya is on a path to have less control over her body than my wife, or even my mom, did. I never imagined that was possible, and it's completely unacceptable.

**The problem we face is that a major political party in our country is not willing to take common sense steps to save lives. The good news is we have the power to change that; if we can change who represents us in Congress.**

My Republican opponent Mike Garcia co-sponsored a bill that would create a nationwide ban on abortion _without exceptions_. Literally days after the mass shooting in Uvalde, Texas, Garcia was taking cash from a pro-gun group that opposes background checks.

My campaign to unseat Mike Garcia is one of the most important races in taking Congress back from extremists. Republicans hold a slim majority and **CA-27 is one of just ten GOP-held toss-up districts in the entire country.**

**[If you're with me, send in a contribution of $5, $35, $50, whatever amount you can, to flip CA-27 and bring some common sense back to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67253606/419124000/-1766409733?refcode=em-7.29.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmY2NzhmOC0zMzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3bQZ3PJj9R_PdLSowR7gBjLsPswJqu7uu-nwBtty6rk=)**

This grassroots movement has always powered the NDRC’s work. With your support, we helped secure the fairest congressional maps of the past 40 years, helped elect dozens of Democracy Defenders, and helped defeat dangerous election deniers in key states across the country.

**But our fight for fairness is _far from over_ , team. A.G. Holder made that perfectly clear:**
**“ Our democracy is still at risk. We should not think that because we had a fairly good result in the last election that everything is fine.

There are still people who are determined through gerrymandering, through voter suppression, through attacks on our election infrastructure in our nation to try to come up with ways to hold on to power to which they are not entitled.”**

– _Attorney General Eric H. Holder, Jr._

subject: The Virginia House Democratic Caucus is counting on folks like you

body:
Together, we can re-take the House of Delegates from far-right, anti-choice Republicans.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254152/419124322/819642576?refcode=EM_FR_230729VHD_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjRmYWEyOS0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTLevkDrHTSKzQq7xOzonEZyCGEjU60Ify2fhkglM8k=)

In addition to gearing up this summer for my own 2024 re-election campaign, I’ve been intently focused on doing my part for Virginia’s 2023 elections – in which control of the state legislature is at stake.

**I’d like to talk to you a bit today about what my friends over at the Virginia House Democratic Caucus are fighting for and how grassroots supporters (like you) can make a difference.[If you’re ready to join their fight to re-take the House of Delegates from far-right, anti-choice Republicans, can you make a split contribution of $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254153/419124324/819642576?refcode=EM_FR_230729VHD_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L3&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjRmYWEyOS0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTLevkDrHTSKzQq7xOzonEZyCGEjU60Ify2fhkglM8k=)**

I’ve seen our Commonwealth make so much progress since my time in the State Senate, but ever since Republicans won the Governor’s mansion and a narrow House of Delegates majority two years ago, they've been doing everything they can to drag us backward. They’ve been trying to pass legislation to make it harder to vote, harder to access reproductive care, and harder for all kids to access a quality education.

The Virginia House Democratic Caucus has been working tirelessly to recruit, train, and support candidates. They’re fighting to make our Commonwealth more affordable for families, protect our freedoms, and improve public education.

They need your help to make that vision a reality for all Virginians. Glenn Youngkin’s super PAC is going to be spending heavily in the weeks ahead to prop up Republican candidates. That’s why the Virginia House Democratic Caucus is trying to raise $5,000 from grassroots supporters before the end of this month.

**[So will you join me and make a split donation between my campaign and the Virginia House Democratic Caucus?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254154/419124325/819642576?refcode=EM_FR_230729VHD_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjRmYWEyOS0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTLevkDrHTSKzQq7xOzonEZyCGEjU60Ify2fhkglM8k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and Jennifer Wexton:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67254155/419124327/819642576?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230729VHD_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjRmYWEyOS0zNDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OTLevkDrHTSKzQq7xOzonEZyCGEjU60Ify2fhkglM8k=)**

I’d like to talk to you a bit today about what my friends over at the Virginia House Democratic Caucus are fighting for and how grassroots supporters (like you) can make a difference.= I’ve seen our Commonwealth make so much progress since my time in the State Senate, but ever since Republicans won the Governor’s mansion and a narrow House of Delegates majority two years ago, they've been doing everything they can to drag us backward. They’ve been trying to pass legislation to make it harder to vote, harder to access reproductive care, and harder for all kids to access a quality education. The Virginia House Democratic Caucus has been working tirelessly to recruit, train, and support candidates. They’re fighting to make our Commonwealth more affordable for families, protect our freedoms, and improve public education. They need your help to make that vision a reality for all Virginians. Glenn Youngkin’s super PAC is going to be spending heavily in the weeks ahead to prop up Republican candidates. That’s why the Virginia House Democratic Caucus is trying to raise $5,000 from grassroots supporters before the end of this month. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and Jennifer Wexton: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Virginia Democrats need to win just 3 seats to flip back the House of Delegates.
