Fellow American,

I’m Kevin Lincoln, the conservative Republican who is running to defeat leftist Josh Harder in California’s highly-targeted 9th Congressional District – _one of the most competitive House races in the country._

**I’m a Marine Corps veteran, mayor of my hometown of Stockton, a proud father & husband, and I’m running to rescue American families and workers from Washington D.C.’s broken politics.**

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN797B6rv89lyE17UJpqRRftFtSBY2q3Y3H_LSseoplkrE_aJ2NH4sg2L46FYqAnexumQyHQcOsyg1jOL3JZDfy2YW61vNHyVURiHeP95TD8Oqwjo3Fi7Xlzjg5VWaFpTmlwvXt4Tn7WSRKkI1dwvqdpogkTcgRNdQoFqFQqGE2yPSabClqV_STwdD-zTv3li8NCymu7yBeRK5ZhpUxsJxD7vR_seU8uKGyr473K83mpDVUzajoic6ySJB-8By1Uf0vE9K1p4y2XRd-w9c8rN0AJVjZCpQ5Lve2OTk-qOmv1fc83DNgl0s7TFKuuEQ3oIfHhy-XuK_c0ZrgWl1VJ442CcDvLKUBRy-77faQo3NG1Cl)
Service has always defined my life. I joined the United States Marine Corps in 2001 and became a military police officer.

After 9/11, I was assigned to Marine One to serve and protect the President of the United States.

When I completed my military service, I graduated from college while working full time and raising a family. But my urge to serve hadn’t gone. I continued to serve my community as a pastor and as a non-profit leader.

**Now, one of the greatest honors of my life is being able to serve as the Mayor of my hometown of Stockton, California.**

As Mayor, my team and I have revitalized our local economy, attracted businesses that have created jobs, balanced our budget, tackled homelessness, and reduced violent crime.

America as a whole is suffering these same problems, but the politicians in the White House and Congress don’t have what it takes to fix them.

**I do, and that’s why I’m running for Congress. My country needs me again, and I’m ready to serve.**

[**Will you send in a Marine and mayor to fix Washington’s broken politics and get our country back on track by supporting my campaign with a $5, $10 or $15 contribution today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN797B6rv89lyE17UJpqRRftFtSBY2q3Y3H_LSseoplkrE_aJ2NH4sg2L46FYqAnexumQyHQcOsyg1jOL3JZDfy2YW61vNHyVURiHeP95TD8Oqwjo3Fi7Xlzjg5VWaFpTmlwvXt4Tn7WSRKkI1dwvqdpogkTcgRNdQoFqFQqGE2yPSabClqV_STwdD-zTv3li8NCymu7yBeRK5ZhpUxsJxD7tWkDDnMy6j287hFb7kJCjcqF13cOsf2JTom7I2T1160dRJOuWrRqMnAphjtAbF4SsmeUquCEXFGiYJh5iJD-EYF_LC1ld_VH8dQhUHqiZmPP1pt7isLOS0JwR7zyA3g-FoWGGzUhgCpL_dk3tCEONs)

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN797B6rv89lyE17UJpqRRftFtSBY2q3Y3H_LSseoplkrE_aJ2NH4sg2L46FYqAnexumQyHQcOsyg1jOL3JZDfy2YW61vNHyVURiHeP95TD8Oqwjo3Fi7Xlzjg5VWaFpTmlwvXt4Tn7WSRKkI1dwvqdpogkTcgRNdQoFqFQqGE2yPSabClqV_STwdD-zTv3li8NCymu7yBeRK5ZhpUxsJxD7tJG_I-n73GOsgyRocFOQR5fOOMg09ot5soQSzQxgnqDdP7tsz8GKE9KokAIlm41EHt0P9YnEKSiumd17qz65FX8haJDCKcVTYLB99bMOhtm1VXqMcuLs8op7TTyPl6NzW64e5drVWqbAdE186g3zxQ)
Career politicians like Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi and Josh Harder have created the mess we’re in, so why would we think they could get us out of it?

We need to get inflation under control, revive our economy, reprioritize public safety, support our veterans, and make the politicians in Washington D.C. work for and serve the American people once again.

**California’s 9th Congressional District is a toss-up, top-target House seat and one of our best chances to defeat a career Democrat politician and restore conservative representation.**

[**But I need your help to win the fight so I can make it to Congress and get to work. Will you send in a Marine and mayor? Please join me today with a contribution of just $5, $10, $15 or more.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN797B6rv89lyE17UJpqRRftFtSBY2q3Y3H_LSseoplkrE_aJ2NH4sg2L46FYqAnexumQyHQcOsyg1jOL3JZDfy2YW61vNHyVURiHeP95TD8Oqwjo3Fi7Xlzjg5VWaFpTmlwvXt4Tn7WSRKkI1dwvqdpogkTcgRNdQoFqFQqGE2yPSabClqV_STwdD-zTv3li8NCymu7yBeRK5ZhpUxsJxD7uRcFnW1UjlZEjSaq8C6nFrnekFwmCloxeXsRjSfiuG7WJj_8HYmQYFSyEO631WIS_AeBJK1lbQCfW9pA72HYP1jtXp9LPykVyth_UAwU1ywnyH_QfDr5_M1kJIfQRtG9Qso1TczN3oKGdR_uBVF89w)

For America,

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** Send a Marine & Mayor to Congress ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN797B6rv89lyE17UJpqRRftFtSBY2q3Y3H_LSseoplkrE_aJ2NH4sg2L46FYqAnexumQyHQcOsyg1jOL3JZDfy2YW61vNHyVURiHeP95TD8Oqwjo3Fi7Xlzjg5VWaFpTmlwvXt4Tn7WSRKkI1dwvqdpogkTcgRNdQoFqFQqGE2yPSabClqV_STwdD-zTv3li8NCymu7yBeRK5ZhpUxsJxD7teipd43rY2PMqoGE5fM3IUTsqO9_eBe0gL-j93b2rIueV7uD-4tIBy2hW2oLg0yBrLvnM91hC0ctPzVQ7H_pRnxOZVNfy7uIWrSv2ZwglC-7pWe0-xoMfoo2iAefV43KAC0DnViTVYhgNsIBfSPEIT)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.
[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN797B6rv89lyE17UJpqRRftFtSBY2q3Y3H_LSseoplkrE_aJ2NH4sg2L46FYqAnexumQyHQcOsyg1jOL3JZDfy2YW61vNHyVURiHeP95TD8Oqwjo3Fi7Xlzjg5VWaFpTmlwvXt4Tn7WSRKkI1dwvqdpogkTcgRNdQoFqFQqGE2yPSabClqV_STwdD-zTv3li8NCymu7yBeRK5ZhpUxsJxD7umV9Flb2y5YP2bRzi37he2-637iIboC4mGpp1MEwA3GQIbngR-0oqDE7i0WOMgWa56mTqkd7VhLczKugFMgAe5_rBGIA91EDk3cR92fpJ-ekM4_v1_462YO4yvrPzvF0GTeAqyL5q9FzR2H41OSIpB)
---

**_Like_ , _Follow_ , and _Subscribe_!**
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN7wNE1VpokY_okMHboV6A78xFlEwZrv_iaPGM5DxHyLb1CHWgIhBcYeLhK-xCQ2CjfuIVmk4mR5pGR3INuocGtdS0krpG5NuHqXIZ-zpIATdEY5u7oV5Y1K8wH1N2mbwe5hzOjZVgSt4vFwklZ5NqQE91SlqPMHa1Ws2Tz9L3aITJrDN-SXzBJC3buE082XcwsS9ax_3TYOfvDu_9EI8LZEI%3D) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN7x5nsObMSDjiEn19Pea8gQKRej4D1SoJSOUHrsiE4aYj5_1YUX5MyzH9eGHmJDjl2gS6AnFqiteqd4jpVyL7bPKueNzFds27xCWH_2wDcoQbaGPWvTbs4cG29H7eSPUutOXXloP6u77uxbp8aNIOLcAmmVt5RjA9AvMG3iheuTSOzSDdZMY-T9l3ep1mWSOkdg%3D%3D) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN74PY_Iim0u1PmAMr6d49rDHAwbQD0WA4vUYBhdFAUdwPaBwIvJKwNAntZgaqzWcDTUygGXKh09PPADKNcU_QYPLOTEjOM8RpMgpfDW5ikw9b13j9jyV0mqI4cWoc3HazPEibTOhdzJBOh1e4W2curiZDZyVouZHn9bCDrl9q-sX8KbK9e7RnyMJ-pfhoiERHmw%3D%3D) [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6b469ae0b2f74c83ae3e7db7a889d183&_e=3nlUIIHbFYwCJr1O9fwN77lY8TKNku25uAF7YtxBz-k34scuEk8dWzG0RjUkeiSVqjtWMDPho-WpZY4Grame2ft0rXFG2N2t9GPN2yS1uE8SLtkfX0rgYdJTD_51disLAOCyzq4D0r2PdxvVJUFoDqOmNMgGtUGYHBG4x4elNTddL9USQNTj07Iic0gKXoBNLqt2ZCwWRUcd__onOHX7bw%3D%3D)

name: ERA Legislation Update
subject: this is our best bet to restore reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**DEVELOPING FROM WASHINGTON:**
**Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand introduces a resolution to certify the Equal Rights Amendment and enshrine reproductive rights in the Constitution.**
Friend, the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) would establish that our civil rights cannot be infringed upon or taken away on the basis of gender. Activists have been fighting for nearly 100 years to add this amendment to our Constitution — and we can't wait any longer.
Since Kirsten announced this resolution, so many Democrats have already added their names to stand with her and show their support for the ERA. Now, we've set a HUGE end-of-month goal to reach 75,000 signatures, and we're counting on your help to do it!
**Please, friend, it's time to raise our voices as one and DEMAND gender equity — will you join us?**

| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67258236/419128224/-1770068183?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4333-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjlhYzBhNi0zNzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0a5C2pC8oRXiuAqnDjOOzDbck1pYM7I3EodafW_nq0U=&emci=0bf43e41-bf2c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=b69ac0a6-372e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, they took away the right for half of the population to access the health care they need. It's discrimination based on sex — plain and simple. **Adding the ERA to our Constitution would give us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the entire country.**
Right now, we're closer than ever before to certifying the ERA: 38 states have ratified it, and it's just one signature away from being added to the Constitution. _But an arbitrary deadline is stopping us from finally certifying this amendment!_
**That's why Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand has introduced new legislation that would establish that this deadline should _not_ stop us from certifying the ERA. **With bipartisan support and filibuster reform, we can pass this legislation, finally establish gender equality in our Constitution and restore reproductive freedoms nationwide.
This is a crucial moment in our fight for gender equality and reproductive rights. Kirsten needs to know where grassroots activists like you stand on the ERA. **[_Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to show Kirsten that you support the ERA? She's counting on 75,000 signatures before our end-of-month deadline!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67258237/419128225/-1770068183?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4333-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjlhYzBhNi0zNzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0a5C2pC8oRXiuAqnDjOOzDbck1pYM7I3EodafW_nq0U=&emci=0bf43e41-bf2c-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&emdi=b69ac0a6-372e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

We met voters, traveled the district, and Wiley spoke with folks about what they wanted to see accomplished in Congress - f olks like Republican, Democrat, and Independent farmers about the struggles they’re facing to maintain and grow their businesses.

From better roads to faster broadband and access to healthcare and quality education, Wiley knows we must do better for rural communities in North Carolina and across the country.
But now we want to hear from you!

body:
| | **Every day our news feeds are flooded with stories of MAGA extremists working to strip away our kids’ freedom to learn.

But with your help, this year our news feeds can instead be filled with news about common sense victories for our schools all across the state.** Right now, it’s up to us to protect our children and teachers from partisan culture wars. Ideologues are determined to control what our children learn about history, civics, and science, which is why we need to support candidates committed to critical thinking, free speech, and facts.

I know this November’s election may seem far away, but mail-in voting starts in September, so if we want to protect our kids’ educations, we need to invest in critical school board races TODAY. We have set a fundraising goal of $50k by the end of the month; if we hit that goal we could get $500 to 100 different candidates across the state. Voting starts in seven weeks, so there’s no time to wait.

[Will you chip in $10 so we can get resources to school board candidates across NJ right away? But with your help, this year our news feeds can instead be filled with news about common sense victories for our schools all across the state. Right now, it’s up to us to protect our children and teachers from partisan culture wars. Ideologues are determined to control what our children learn about history, civics, and science, which is why we need to support candidates committed to critical thinking, free speech, and facts. I know this November’s election may seem far away, but mail-in voting starts in September, so if we want to protect our kids’ educations, we need to invest in critical school board races TODAY. We have set a fundraising goal of $50k by the end of the month; if we hit that goal we could get $500 to 100 different candidates across the state. Voting starts in seven weeks, so there’s no time to wait. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = – Districts for Democracy * | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. Box 01 Ringoes, NJ 08851-0001 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

Peter,

body:
With less than 72 hours until our end-of-month fundraising deadline and seven special elections on the horizon, we need all hands on deck to reach our goal. | | |
---
| | Last month, grassroots Democrats like you came together to help the DLCC meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal _just_ before the deadline. But this month, things have taken a turn for the worse: **There are less than 72 hours left, and we’re _dangerously_ behind on our end-of-month fundraising goal.** **07/01/2023 – 07/29/2023** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtMZjpC-P5GvlZ6rXcOpAltc611fs00HbqXjfcKF-Ck6RrPuuxt0orUWX93lwaYV9QVWuc8yz9p4UxmI4VPRCBFp0DMhUdoHtbvFM8EIumRQnnNNtXDN_tIu4X-QD6ralwyHaguo26yZAVX93jEE476tT49v9JNZd0OuUvplOmsRAKxEsXMW2KC-HpkT6yYL5IxT7UjxuUh0WEObyIJjqaaEy_tcjYWo2O97UF27r1X7QOnN0QC5yEh4UXiwI76HNLZNQMFHcgSn-34d4zImgwq5EZisHa0ls8WnCEej_9U3mbqqmzEPWItd6mEhtg4bDVNkcSdp5mETXMlUHCzyzdl4NvZLXBtWgYX2FqVSldgyUU-1-0vduXBUoWwO_z1wcYDdRuQzKDWWSs-niLjuv2wexCnxjqLGp5_5ZBcOKLjuA/3ya/EIFRYZ4IR-C9e0O7lk_-_w/h0/4jdXGb1smydPmZweQsmKcOzTA0dgXIthb66t9wx1qQQ) **We can’t stress enough how crucial a grassroots donation is right now. If we fall short, Democrats won’t have the resources they need to defeat extreme Republicans in the states.** [Will you help reach our end-of-month goal by rushing a 3X-matched $7 donation before Monday’s deadline? Even $7 will help close the gap in this final stretch. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtMZjpC-P5GvlZ6rXcOpAltc611fs00HbqXjfcKF-Ck6RrPuuxt0orUWX93lwaYV9QVWuc8yz9p4UxmI4VPRCBFp0DMhUdoHtbvFM8EIumRQnnNNtXDN_tIu4X-QD6ralwyHaguo26yZAVX93jEE476tT49v9JNZd0OuUvplOmsRCwxvkTTOtDI6_qJnNodRPl3aQOzwyONFXueksNtBUi9BJGXWLcpXWSzxPLb0NlGR_uvg93HYJLrTTWIDnZYbQSd5v9AyGn8vE6Ha-H1gkOT_GJ8aa6pVfmFr3r9VZveTv62lYIOw0GwxukOmi9lWFKyshfr0J1s-55ePxKAxNNEWno1TWefp5-smyyDfJR0_RXd65p3k_zlR02Nk4npWlFnl43Pq07K06VDtTJjABq-HBLcp2XEvXx7XZwSkQnaPg/3ya/EIFRYZ4IR-C9e0O7lk_-_w/h1/zLOedyz24xc7tjSS8P6lngq-mw2mBPTv73UHQfuR3U0) **[RUSH $7 NOW »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtMZjpC-P5GvlZ6rXcOpAltc611fs00HbqXjfcKF-Ck6RrPuuxt0orUWX93lwaYV9QVWuc8yz9p4UxmI4VPRCBFp0DMhUdoHtbvFM8EIumRQnnNNtXDN_tIu4X-QD6ralwyHaguo26yZAVX93jEE476pOaQW5CH9f3D_GkTcLSrLHAb8LjLrNA9WBGJ_ahD1p0PxEER-N0kBu0EdAwITE49DeoJn38HP9Nai-69OdFWcoo9uSL6GSQxcqgucIP--Oe7ooE2XULKZWYn2Yg7F0zI3HaU7Hn22HQuSj-TWbjYWjJrbvpaxfdUr21aTbWUvVs1ldvczEkk5vvNKalFLkTtpQtPjBiBG0PGvt4YgSL5cumRdAlQWmE17jKb5dQ31VutWHLstrR2eO13TVDEUaKLTG4Qfl5A51GCdt_j9clJ1g/3ya/EIFRYZ4IR-C9e0O7lk_-_w/h2/6_sd6wE6gzQnwV4XrVlUenT7PA54h-fa3hiJJgWkcyI)** We need to hit _every single mark_ so we can secure victory in upcoming elections in states like Pennsylvania, Tennessee, and Virginia. We know how difficult it can be to stay motivated during “off-years” in politics, but remember, an "off-year" doesn't mean we can slow down. **We have _seven_ special elections ahead of us**, including two in New Hampshire, where we’re just four seats away from flipping the House. clean_body: With less than 72 hours until our end-of-month fundraising deadline and seven special elections on the horizon, we need all hands on deck to reach our goal. | | | | | Last month, grassroots Democrats like you came together to help the DLCC meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal just before the deadline. But this month, things have taken a turn for the worse: There are less than 72 hours left, and we’re dangerously behind on our end-of-month fundraising goal. 07/01/2023 – 07/29/2023 We can’t stress enough how crucial a grassroots donation is right now. If we fall short, Democrats won’t have the resources they need to defeat extreme Republicans in the states. We need to hit every single mark so we can secure victory in upcoming elections in states like Pennsylvania, Tennessee, and Virginia. We know how difficult it can be to stay motivated during “off-years” in politics, but remember, an "off-year" doesn't mean we can slow down. We have seven special elections ahead of us, including two in New Hampshire, where we’re just four seats away from flipping the House. Don't underestimate the power of your support. When we stand together, we can make a real difference. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We need you in this fight, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Williams
subject: did you see this note from Dr. Williams?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Did you see this email from Brian, Peter?

The continued attacks not only on reproductive rights, but also on the privacy of your medical records are deeply concerning, and will likely impact the ability of doctors around the country to adequately care for their patients.

[Here at Team Williams, we’re all united in our unconditional support for patient privacy and reproductive rights. If you’re with us, will you make a donation of $10 towards our end-of-month fundraising deadline? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67262155/419132549/-609881289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230729_FR_JulyEOM_0_3MO_TeamWilliams_na_na_EOM02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWMzOGIwOGItM2EyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LF-o8NDPfi9_C86d0BKVWuYAVrAdyxT7UzpcEG1HkUA=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67262156/419132550/-609881289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230729_FR_JulyEOM_0_3MO_TeamWilliams_na_na_EOM02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWMzOGIwOGItM2EyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LF-o8NDPfi9_C86d0BKVWuYAVrAdyxT7UzpcEG1HkUA=)

Thanks, and read on for Brian’s original message!
* * *
_Brian’s Original Message:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67262157/419132551/-609881289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230729_FR_JulyEOM_0_3MO_TeamWilliams_na_na_EOM02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWMzOGIwOGItM2EyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LF-o8NDPfi9_C86d0BKVWuYAVrAdyxT7UzpcEG1HkUA=)
Peter, have you seen any of these headlines lately?

This is a blatant invasion of privacy, and should truly concern us all.

As a doctor, I can tell you that maintaining privacy is CRUCIAL for a patient-doctor relationship.

If my patients can’t trust I’ll keep their information private, they might not tell me the truth, which compromises my ability to give them the help they may need.

A major reason I’m running for Congress is to defend reproductive freedom. I’ve seen how bad policy impairs patient care. We need more doctors like myself who know firsthand how important it is to expand healthcare access, not create more deadly obstacles.

[Will you support my campaign to champion reproductive freedom in Congress and reinstitute federal protections for abortion by contributing $10 or whatever you can before our critical end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67262158/419132552/-609881289?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BW_20230729_FR_JulyEOM_0_3MO_TeamWilliams_na_na_EOM02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWMzOGIwOGItM2EyZS1lZTExLWI4ZjAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LF-o8NDPfi9_C86d0BKVWuYAVrAdyxT7UzpcEG1HkUA=)
If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | Did you see this email from Brian, Peter? The continued attacks not only on reproductive rights, but also on the privacy of your medical records are deeply concerning, and will likely impact the ability of doctors around the country to adequately care for their patients. = | = Thanks, and read on for Brian’s original message! Brian’s Original Message: = Peter, have you seen any of these headlines lately? This is a blatant invasion of privacy, and should truly concern us all. As a doctor, I can tell you that maintaining privacy is CRUCIAL for a patient-doctor relationship. If my patients can’t trust I’ll keep their information private, they might not tell me the truth, which compromises my ability to give them the help they may need. A major reason I’m running for Congress is to defend reproductive freedom. I’ve seen how bad policy impairs patient care. We need more doctors like myself who know firsthand how important it is to expand healthcare access, not create more deadly obstacles. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your continued support, Brian | | | = | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. Believe me, I know that it seems like every single politician is always telling you “this election is the most important election of our lifetimes.” But frankly, this one _is_ incredibly important. Think about it this way: Every single seat in the General Assembly is up for grabs – so **Republicans have the opportunity to turn Virginia completely red.** And this election comes one year before a presidential AND congressional election. clean_body: 100 days | | | It’s official, Derek – the countdown to Election Day in Virginia is on. = Just 100 days until one of the most crucial elections in Virginia’s recent history. Believe me, I know that it seems like every single politician is always telling you “this election is the most important election of our lifetimes.” But frankly, this one is incredibly important. Think about it this way: Every single seat in the General Assembly is up for grabs – so Republicans have the opportunity to turn Virginia completely red. And this election comes one year before a presidential AND congressional election. If the GOP win the presidency, the Senate, and the House, we can’t afford to have the General Assembly in Virginia be under Republican control too. = Thank you, Mark ****=** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

clean_body: | = Peter, we want to take a moment to be fully transparent with you. In the latest fundraising period, our people-powered campaign reported having over 3x the number of donors Ken Calvert did. We also surpassed him significantly among in-district donors. That's a huge sign of our strength, but we still have ground to make up. Calvert got a head start on fundraising, and thanks to his special interest and corporate PAC allies, he currently has more cash than we do. Much more. = Monday marks our July deadline, and an important opportunity to close the gap you see above. Unfortunately, fundraising has ticked down a bit since our launch quarter, and we could really use your help picking up the pace. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = You know the statistics. History tells us that the candidate with the most money will likely win over 90% of the time. We think it's wrong that money plays such a huge role in determining who holds power. That’s a big reason why Will rejects corporate PAC money and is running a campaign powered by real people. We know the requests for contributions can feel relentless, but the numbers we laid out above are the reality we're up against, and it’s why we need to ask. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Team Rollins HQ | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. subject: Breaking point?

body:
No matter how many witch hunts the Left throws at us, we have no breaking point.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=6b717de3909444b4b52146d1d4a45b91&_e=39tk2Cx0KNpef_cR7QqtfcpDk5xOclG-XpdDOHlwebGwhdcQeecGnIYbukqcMLfEGgb3J3wn1GyQu724Oo0964XpGAZZfKggCvmvvV9E1V5c8SlH7uWeXr4s-PhTYTvatDA0eRdlO35IdHsBeoD8e7KXvyrNzaukrHfuOnTrxemnYV-d1fTNYXIeq9LzFZyTJ9uUcZmr3wEbtHYNxx6JJqcwTkMQ1tLI9u4-TnlzgswF0OmmurtmoUujI5PkyzvBXgXdWv9kBZ7JYXFz8y4Os-eDzyqNHKxWCkK0ZyMigZBZjBrZef2ryxZmxFhsHP7VmRmJzM8F8WlDJIc2t1n45XO-0KiBLk45kpVxW0RmueXi4nHO6jNclUZ81hgAXuWtZlADLqq_PyTEYWq80R5y62jeAp4HhREk5m-vV7wZHe18wfiau4Nm07MsPNJ4kta2J-hvmbm_9U-3lyP3musqLloBvjy9cOdlvCea4sobE-BgpjuTxqstzJe8h7CSMZjx)
---
| | Friend,

---
It’s truly pathetic to watch the disloyal “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) who cave so quickly to the Deep State.

---
**_In fact, the puppet candidate propped up by RINO special interest donors has even EXCUSED and JUSTIFIED the Deep State’s witch hunt against me for a SECOND time now._**
---
But sadly, this shouldn’t come as a surprise...

---
For decades, these were the types of “Republicans” who the Swamp has dealt with.

---
**_And for decades, they watched as these very same WEAK and COWARDLY RINOs bent the knee to their every whim._**

---
But in June of 2015, they were introduced to a __NEW__ kind of Republican — _me_.

---
A candidate who couldn’t be bought, bullied, or controlled by _either_ party.

---
Because my ONLY special interest is — and always will be — **YOU**.

---
But even still, the power-drunk Democrats believe that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, they will finally bring our beautiful movement to its breaking point.

---
**It’s Election Interference, plain and simple, and it’s the only reason Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ just brought NEW BOGUS CHARGES against me despite committing no crime whatsoever!**

---
_It’s a vicious attempt to intimidate YOU out of voting for the one and only candidate who puts the PEOPLE of our country FIRST.
_
---
But Friend, let me be as clear as possible to our many enemies in the Deep State:

---
**_WE HAVE NO BREAKING POINT!_**

---
These sick and twisted thugs could threaten to JAIL me for not just 5 lifetimes, but _50 LIFETIMES_ , and yet, patriots like you would _STILL_ never be intimidated out of voting to SAVE AMERICA...

---
...because I know that _YOU_ – like me – will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny!

---
**And right now, with the end-of-month deadline just 48 HOURS away, *** **_this*_** **is the moment when we cement in the history books just how UNBREAKABLE our movement truly is.**

---
_(If you're doing poorly right now because Crooked Joe has wreaked havoc on your life and your finances, then please do not donate. Just hit the back button; your thoughts and prayers are more than enough!)_

---
**[In light of the latest attack against our movement from Biden’s “Justice” Department, please make a contribution of even just $1 before the end-of-month deadline to PROVE we are truly UNBREAKABLE.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=6b717de3909444b4b52146d1d4a45b91&_e=39tk2Cx0KNpef_cR7QqtfcpDk5xOclG-XpdDOHlwebGwhdcQeecGnIYbukqcMLfEGgb3J3wn1GyQu724Oo0964XpGAZZfKggCvmvvV9E1V5c8SlH7uWeXr4s-PhTYTvatDA0eRdlO35IdHsBeoD8e7KXvyrNzaukrHfuOnTrxemnYV-d1fTNYXIeq9LzFZyTJ9uUcZmr3wEbtHYNxx6JJqcwTkMQ1tLI9u4-TnlzgswF0OmmurtmoUujI5PkyzvBXgXdWv9kBZ7JYXFz8y4Os-eDzyqNHKxWCkK0ZyMigZBZjBrZef2ryxZmxFhsHP7VmRmJzM8F8WlDJIc2t1n45UIhbpLbKJXDgGDWG4ye15vz1b3-aPJCyNzrlRNhecro_TF_Bh28iDxhK-yYiFZSJuhke6YZbmgJbujamHmNdZCJCuRnnaGXcWn26vod6AYaEfJcxg6RNaYYsLKgkzKvSq4q4xiIG0Jl82ZRhJRZnOzDvUQF7jMUP5hWuJ1L1XYJ)**
---
Thank you and God bless you,
---

clean_body: No matter how many witch hunts the Left throws at us, we have no breaking point.| | | | | Friend, It’s truly pathetic to watch the disloyal “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) who cave so quickly to the Deep State. In fact, the puppet candidate propped up by RINO special interest donors has even EXCUSED and JUSTIFIED the Deep State’s witch hunt against me for a SECOND time now. But sadly, this shouldn’t come as a surprise... For decades, these were the types of “Republicans” who the Swamp has dealt with. And for decades, they watched as these very same WEAK and COWARDLY RINOs bent the knee to their every whim. But in June of 2015, they were introduced to a NEW kind of Republican — me. A candidate who couldn’t be bought, bullied, or controlled by either party. Because my ONLY special interest is — and always will be — YOU. But even still, the power-drunk Democrats believe that by burying me in never-ending witch hunts, they will finally bring our beautiful movement to its breaking point. It’s Election Interference, plain and simple, and it’s the only reason Crooked Joe’s corrupt DOJ just brought NEW BOGUS CHARGES against me despite committing no crime whatsoever! It’s a vicious attempt to intimidate YOU out of voting for the one and only candidate who puts the PEOPLE of our country FIRST. But Friend, let me be as clear as possible to our many enemies in the Deep State: WE HAVE NO BREAKING POINT! These sick and twisted thugs could threaten to JAIL me for not just 5 lifetimes, but 50 LIFETIMES , and yet, patriots like you would STILL never be intimidated out of voting to SAVE AMERICA... ...because I know that YOU – like me – will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the Left’s tyranny! And right now, with the end-of-month deadline just 48 HOURS away, this is the moment when we cement in the history books just how UNBREAKABLE our movement truly is. (If you're doing poorly right now because Crooked Joe has wreaked havoc on your life and your finances, then please do not donate. Just hit the back button; your thoughts and prayers are more than enough!) Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. name: Shift WA
subject: FWD: What you read matters
body:
Friends,

Did you get a chance to read the email below?

The August Primary is this week! And while elections matter, those decisions are only as solid as the information that voters have access to for their decision-making. We here at Shift WA are committed to providing critical information that mainstream media outlets minimize or outright ignore - but which has the potential to shape our state's future.

It's our mission to hold our state leaders accountable, and highlight the issue contrasts which face voters across Washington. As part of our efforts, we've brought to light essential policy developments ahead of mainstream media outlets. >From exposing the flaws in the Democrats' long-term care tax to warning about the potential impacts of Jay Inslee's cap-and-tax schemes, we've kept you informed about the real implications of liberal policies on your daily life.

**As we approach the end of the month, we find ourselves behind on our fundraising goal by more than $1,500 dollars! ****_[Your contribution of $100, $50, or $25 will make a significant difference in helping us continue our work.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62080846:sJ-5cxDpN:m:1:2610672541:0C913FCD39C7A69F9BCC4F5C79430C00:r)_**

We greatly appreciate your continued support. Together, we can shift the political debate in Washington and empower voters with the knowledge they need to make informed decisions.

Thank you again,

The Shift WA Team
By reporting on these policies before politicians can spin the story to fit their agenda, we here at Shift WA offer our readers insight into what's really going on in their state. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62080847:sJ-5cxDpN:m:1:2610672541:0C913FCD39C7A69F9BCC4F5C79430C00:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, As the August Primary approaches, we wanted to remind you of the simple truth that elections matter - and so does what you read as elections approach. We here at Shift WA understand the importance of voters being well-informed about the policies that could shape our future. We value your trust in us to bring you that information.**It 's our goal to highlight details about politics in our state that voters will not get from mainstream media outlets, because that's the only way we can _shift_ the political debate in our Washington.** Over the years, we've shed light on critical policy developments long before mainstream news outlets bothered to report on them. Our work informing you about the problems with the Democrats' disastrous long-term care tax before its passage in 2020 is an example of our mission. We wrote about its flawed structure, and now we see its consequences, costing taxpayers significantly more than anticipated. Our early coverage of the Democrats' cap-and-tax scheme and their intentions to increase your gas costs was aimed at ensuring readers like you were aware of how such policies could affect your everyday life. From higher bills for heating your home to soaring gas prices at the pump, we warned about the potential impacts on your family's budget of Jay Inslee's green obsession. By reporting on these policies before politicians can spin the story to fit their agenda, we here at Shift WA offer our readers insight into what's really going on in the state. Our end-of-month deadline is fast approaching, and we are behind on our fundraising goal. **_[We need your support today](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62080846:sJ-5cxDpN:m:1:2610672541:0C913FCD39C7A69F9BCC4F5C79430C00:r)_**. **_[Your contribution of $100, $50, or $25 will go a long way in making up the difference](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62080846:sJ-5cxDpN:m:1:2610672541:0C913FCD39C7A69F9BCC4F5C79430C00:r)_**. Will you consider helping today? Thank you, The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62080848:sJ-5cxDpN:m:1:2610672541:0C913FCD39C7A69F9BCC4F5C79430C00:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14258629&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osJ-5cxDpN).
---

name: Team Chrissy Houlahan
subject: FWD: Help Chrissy defend against anti-LGBTQ attacks
body:
Derek, Chrissy just sent you a critical LGBTQ rights update – and we wanted to make sure you saw it.

Last week, Republicans escalated their ongoing attacks on LGBTQ rights when they cut millions in funding for vital social services, including:
---
* Affordable housing for senior LGBTQ Americans
* Expansion of Philadelphia’s William Way Community Center, which serves thousands of LGBTQ individuals in Philadelphia and nearby communities
* Lifesaving transitional housing for LGBTQ residents in Reading – _which Chrissy requested_

**Derek, this is _devastating_ _._ There’s no precedent, no history, no reasonable explanation for this attack – it’s just hate and bigotry.

Chrissy’s committed to continue her fight for equality – no matter what hateful campaign they concoct next. But she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this important work, so please:**
**[_Can you pitch in $5, or whatever you’re able, to support Chrissy’s fight against anti-LGBTQ hatred? With new GOP attacks weekly, she’s depending on this team more than ever._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67268591/419138818/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk858-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzU3MzQyMi00MjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRm2jAW5LBDHT0aUpxmoALsvT-NKzRYiqaCFI3hK3GA=)**
–Team Chrissy
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Chrissy Houlahan**
Date: Fri, Jul 28, 2023
Subject: I’m fuming
| | |
---
Derek, it’s Chrissy, and I’m still _fuming_ _._ I thought I had seen the ugliest parts of the far right's bigotry – but I was evidently wrong.
Last week, Republicans (unanimously) took the unprecedented step of gutting almost _$4 million_ for vital social services for LGBTQ Americans in need. The money was for transitional housing and other related support!
**I’m devastated to say that included my own request for much-needed support in our own community** – a project that has the power to transform and save so many young lives.
But this decision isn’t rooted in any legitimacy – instead _it’s rooted in bigotry._ For some Republicans, their hatred knows no bounds. While this charge was first led by just a few extremists, the larger Republican Caucus ultimately stood by and let them do it.
**I’m not going to stop fighting back against these escalating attacks on LGBTQ Americans – but I need dedicated grassroots fighters behind me to stand a chance:**
**[_Could you chip in whatever you’re able to power my continued fight for equality? I’m depending on supporters like you to help me be a voice for LGBTQ Americans._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67268592/419138819/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk858-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzU3MzQyMi00MjJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yRm2jAW5LBDHT0aUpxmoALsvT-NKzRYiqaCFI3hK3GA=)**
We have quite a fight ahead of us. But I’m inspired every day by this team’s dedication to justice for every American. Thank you.

There’s work to be done,
Chrissy
| | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

clean_body: Derek, Chrissy just sent you a critical LGBTQ rights update – and we wanted to make sure you saw it. Last week, Republicans escalated their ongoing attacks on LGBTQ rights when they cut millions in funding for vital social services, including: Affordable housing for senior LGBTQ Americans Expansion of Philadelphia’s William Way Community Center, which serves thousands of LGBTQ individuals in Philadelphia and nearby communities Lifesaving transitional housing for LGBTQ residents in Reading – which Chrissy requested Derek, this is devastating . There’s no precedent, no history, no reasonable explanation for this attack – it’s just hate and bigotry. Chrissy’s committed to continue her fight for equality – no matter what hateful campaign they concoct next. But she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to power this important work, so please: = –Team Chrissy \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Chrissy Houlahan Date: Fri, Jul 28, 2023 Subject: I’m fuming | | | Derek, it’s Chrissy, and I’m still fuming . I thought I had seen the ugliest parts of the far right's bigotry – but I was evidently wrong. Last week, Republicans (unanimously) took the unprecedented step of gutting almost $4 million for vital social services for LGBTQ Americans in need. The money was for transitional housing and other related support! I’m devastated to say that included my own request for much-needed support in our own community – a project that has the power to transform and save so many young lives. But this decision isn’t rooted in any legitimacy – instead it’s rooted in bigotry. For some Republicans, their hatred knows no bounds. While this charge was first led by just a few extremists, the larger Republican Caucus ultimately stood by and let them do it. I’m not going to stop fighting back against these escalating attacks on LGBTQ Americans – but I need dedicated grassroots fighters behind me to stand a chance: =** We have quite a fight ahead of us. But I’m inspired every day by this team’s dedication to justice for every American. Thank you. There’s work to be done, Chrissy | | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. Box 222 Devon, PA 19333 United States Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click . body:
| | | **ALERT: Recent poll shows 53% of voters "definitely would not" vote for Trump next year -- _but we don't know if YOU are one of them!_**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/14826?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230729-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230729-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=11362%2E9716520%2ERj_7_j)
**Please confirm before MIDNIGHT:****Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >>**
| | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/14826?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230729-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230729-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=11362%2E9716520%2ERj_7_j)
---

Team, this is HUGE: According to a recent poll, **53% of Americans say they _definitely won’t_ vote for Trump for president next year.**

But that's almost IDENTICAL to the number of Americans who voted against Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- which means next year's election could be _**razor-close!**_

If this poll is accurate, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 73 more people in Pennsylvania to let us know by midnight that they'll NEVER consider voting for Trump. **So please, sign our urgent petition now to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Donald Trump next year:**

**Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >>**
| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/14826?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230729-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230729-UrgentAlert-TrumpDefinitelyNotSupportPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=11362%2E9716520%2ERj_7_j)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

But that's almost IDENTICAL to the number of Americans who voted against Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- which means next year's election could be razor-close! If this poll is accurate, we need to lock in as many Democratic votes as possible. We need 73 more people in Pennsylvania to let us know by midnight that they'll NEVER consider voting for Trump. So please, sign our urgent petition now to confirm you DEFINITELY WON’T vote for Donald Trump next year: Sign on to confirm you DEFINITELY WON'T vote for Trump >> | Thank you, Team DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. Derivative of by Gage Skidmore. . | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. | Peter,

It’s Rio from Team Wild. As the campaign’s Finance Director, it’s my job to make sure we stay on track with all our fundraising goals so that Susan has what it takes to win re-election.

We know how close Susan’s races were in the last three election cycles, and there’s no doubt that 2024 will be any different. **National Republicans have thought time and time again that they’d be able to beat Susan, but she has always come out victorious.**

We have a long race ahead of us, and Republicans are recruiting multiple extremists to run against Susan to help them defend their slim House majority.

name: Team Cori
subject: RE: Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is unafraid to stand for the people. | |
---
Peter, While in Congress, Cori has advocated for marginalized and oppressed people in the U.S. and abroad. She has championed Palestinian rights, including by leading her colleagues to push the U.S. State Department to stop Israel’s forced displacement of hundreds of Palestinian children. **Last year, the right-wing group AIPAC and its network of PACs poured millions of dollars into defeating progressive women of color running for Congress who dared to challenge the unjust status quo and shine a light on the Israeli government’s human rights abuses.** We know that they’re setting their sights on Cori as we gear up for 2024’s re-election. And progressive Black women candidates have a much harder time raising money to run election campaigns, so we especially need your support to withstand right-wing attacks. \---Original Message---

Peter,
Cori Bush doesn’t want anyone else to have to go through what she’s gone through. That’s what fuels her activism and her policymaking, and it’s why she speaks up for people who have felt voiceless.
She’s been assaulted by the police. She’s been evicted and forced out onto the streets to live in a car with her two children.
As Cori has said, she wouldn’t wish these traumas on anybody. That’s why she camped out on the steps of Congress day and night and succeeded in delaying evictions for millions of Americans. And it’s why for years, Cori has spoken out against the Israeli government for stealing and destroying Palestinians’ homes while brutalizing and killing Palestinian families.
**Cori cares about people, governing from a place of radical love for all humanity. That threatens right-wing groups like AIPAC, which want to maintain the status quo.**
AIPAC and its affiliated groups have spent millions to defeat progressive women of color, including Cori—even though women of color running for federal office often have much less cash on hand than other candidates.[1] We don’t take money from corporate PACs, instead relying on grassroots donations from people like you in order to keep Cori in Congress fighting for all of us.

As the first member of the movement for Black Lives to be elected to Congress, Cori is unafraid to stand for the people.
She first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from militarized violence and tear gas.
During the protests, Palestinians in St. Louis also showed up in support of Black lives, and conversations about their oppression opened her eyes as together they fought for collective liberation.
While in Congress, Cori has advocated for marginalized and oppressed people in the U.S. and abroad.
She has championed Palestinian rights, including by leading her colleagues to push the U.S. State Department to stop Israel’s forced displacement of hundreds of Palestinian children. **In the past month, Cori made the principled decision to boycott congressional speeches from Israel’s President and India’s Prime Minister for perpetuating human rights abuses.**
**Cori continues to be one of the few members of Congress to legislate with love for _all_ humanity, without exceptions. That’s why she challenges the status quo, and it’s why the right-wing continues to target her. **

clean_body: Cori is unafraid to stand for the people. | | Peter, While in Congress, Cori has advocated for marginalized and oppressed people in the U.S. and abroad. She has championed Palestinian rights, including by leading her colleagues to push the U.S. State Department to stop Israel’s forced displacement of hundreds of Palestinian children. Last year, the right-wing group AIPAC and its network of PACs poured millions of dollars into defeating progressive women of color running for Congress who dared to challenge the unjust status quo and shine a light on the Israeli government’s human rights abuses. We know that they’re setting their sights on Cori as we gear up for 2024’s re-election. And progressive Black women candidates have a much harder time raising money to run election campaigns, so we especially need your support to withstand right-wing attacks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Please feel free to read more from yesterday’s email about Cori’s radical love for all humanity, and how she came to understand the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence. In solidarity, Team Cori \---Original Message--- Peter, Cori Bush doesn’t want anyone else to have to go through what she’s gone through. That’s what fuels her activism and her policymaking, and it’s why she speaks up for people who have felt voiceless. She’s been assaulted by the police. She’s been evicted and forced out onto the streets to live in a car with her two children. As Cori has said, she wouldn’t wish these traumas on anybody. That’s why she camped out on the steps of Congress day and night and succeeded in delaying evictions for millions of Americans. And it’s why for years, Cori has spoken out against the Israeli government for stealing and destroying Palestinians’ homes while brutalizing and killing Palestinian families. Cori cares about people, governing from a place of radical love for all humanity. That threatens right-wing groups like AIPAC, which want to maintain the status quo. AIPAC and its affiliated groups have spent millions to defeat progressive women of color, including Cori—even though women of color running for federal office often have much less cash on hand than other candidates.[1] We don’t take money from corporate PACs, instead relying on grassroots donations from people like you in order to keep Cori in Congress fighting for all of us. As the first member of the movement for Black Lives to be elected to Congress, Cori is unafraid to stand for the people. She first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from militarized violence and tear gas. During the protests, Palestinians in St. Louis also showed up in support of Black lives, and conversations about their oppression opened her eyes as together they fought for collective liberation. While in Congress, Cori has advocated for marginalized and oppressed people in the U.S. and abroad. She has championed Palestinian rights, including by leading her colleagues to push the U.S. State Department to stop Israel’s forced displacement of hundreds of Palestinian children. In the past month, Cori made the principled decision to boycott congressional speeches from Israel’s President and India’s Prime Minister for perpetuating human rights abuses. Cori continues to be one of the few members of Congress to legislate with love for all humanity, without exceptions. That’s why she challenges the status quo, and it’s why the right-wing continues to target her. Hello,
Only one of the extremists in Congress is actually vulnerable: Lauren Boebert.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67269547/419142790/1610638071?refcode=em20230729pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=21bd9dcd-482e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWJkOWRjZC00ODJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqLhtA_9Hp6YGVWtloZNjlMMhZtFoONAyA_6Ajw2xJU=)
Marjorie Taylor Greene won reelection by over 30 percentage points. Matt Gaetz and Jim Jordan... The same story.

body:
It's absurd for National Republicans to label Kim and other Jewish members of the Democratic Party anti-Semitic bigots while simultaneously pandering to white nationalists. The NRCC just called Kim a "rabid antisemite." Kim's Jewish, Peter.

It's disgusting for National Republicans to label her and other Jewish members of the Democratic Party “anti-Semitic bigots” while simultaneously pandering to white nationalists.

**We need to ensure Kim has the resources she needs to respond to their outrageous attacks.[Will you please rush a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford before our end-of-month deadline to help Kim fight back? >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67269764/419144817/-248336221?refcode=em23_230729_eom3_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230729_eom3_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5cb1d882-4a2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2IxZDg4Mi00YTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c_K2OXWUR-0pMcFkufBPscVGcozDhM7Zs-S58ffUuk8=)**

\----------Begin Forwarded Message---------
Sender: Dr. Kim Schrier
Subject: The NRCC just called me a “rabid antisemite”
Date: Thursday, July 20, 2023
Team,

The National Republican Congressional Committee just issued a press release calling me a “rabid antisemite.”

**Let's be clear: I'm Jewish.**

My great-grandparents and grandparents left Europe at the turn of the 20th Century because of antisemitism, pogroms, and economic struggles.

It's absurd and offensive to label me and other Jewish members of the Democratic Party anti-Semitic bigots. **Frankly, it is especially sickening that the attack comes from today's Republican Party, which panders to white nationalists.**

This attack comes from the same Republican Party that has repeatedly used anti-Semitic tropes against me during past elections.

Several members of this same Republican Party have spread anti-Semitic conspiracy theories and even attended white nationalist conferences.

Republican congressmen in my office building have taken down the POW-MIA flag to fly the “An Appeal to Heaven” pine tree flag, a Revolutionary War flag which in recent years has become a symbol for Christian nationalism and Christian Dominionism. It was one of the flags waved by rioters on January 6 in front of the Capitol.

**[National Republicans will say anything to attack me – no matter how absurd... or hypocritical. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up Monday, and the truth is we’re falling behind where we need to be.

While there is typically a “summer slump” for political fundraising this time of year, missing any fundraising goal sets our campaign back and forces us to make cuts that could hurt our ability to get Sepi’s message out to voters.

[**We can get back on track, but we need your urgent support to get there. We’re still $18,763 shy of our $30,000 goal. _Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. clean_body: Team, we’ll make this short and sweet. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up Monday, and the truth is we’re falling behind where we need to be. While there is typically a “summer slump” for political fundraising this time of year, missing any fundraising goal sets our campaign back and forces us to make cuts that could hurt our ability to get Sepi’s message out to voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks so much, Finance Team Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today. = = Sepi Shyne For Congress 8149 Santa Monica Blvd #280 West Hollywood, CA 90046 United States

subject: District 34 Challenge + I just got back from Washington 🎤
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Kim for Congress - CA34_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/washington?e=fee98d637f)
---
| | [ ](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=8bc33fd9fc&e=fee98d637f)
---
| | Dear Friend:

**We've set our sights on raising $50,000 by July 31st and we need your help to make it happen!** Every donation, big or small, will make a huge difference and bring us closer to reaching our goal. 🎯

**To make things even more exciting, we're running the "District 34 Challenge!"** 🎉 We're asking for $34 donations to match our amazing District number, 34! With your donation, you become an essential part of our movement, driving us forward toward a better tomorrow. Your support will help us spread our message, engage with more voters, and pave the path for a brighter future for our communities.

---
| [Click here to contribute!](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=c4f8abc6e7&e=fee98d637f "Click here to contribute!")
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
🌟🎤 I want to also take a moment to reflect on a historic gathering that took place on July 27th—the Korea Peace Action event in front of the White House. Standing amidst history, I emphasized the importance of peace on the Korean peninsula, knowing that it's a prerequisite for all advancements of humanity. Knowing that to attain diplomatic relations, we must first aim for peace. To attain denuclearization, we must first achieve peace. To make real progress in uplifting human rights, we must first achieve peace.

As I run for Congressional District 34, with its significant Korean community, I'm even more determined to advocate for peace and progress. The event was a reminder that the choices made over 70 years ago must be accounted for, and I firmly believe that through diplomacy and dialogue, we can end the "Forgotten War" and establish peace in Korea.

_**Thank you all for being part of this journey, and your continued support means the world. Let’s continue to work towards a brighter future, and win this election together! **_

---

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: we can’t fall behind now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The fight to protect our planet doesn’t stop and we need your continued support to keep up our strong momentum.

From: **Sarah McBride**
Date: Wed, Jul 26, 2023 at 12:15 PM
Subject: One month
I can’t believe it’s been a month since we launched this campaign. I can’t thank you enough for helping us kick off with so much momentum and enthusiasm.
**The election is a year away, but my team and I are already working really hard to earn the votes to win.** We’ve already:
* Knocked on doors and talked to voters about issues that matter most to them.
* Planned our first three major volunteer events in all three counties.
* Recruited hundreds of volunteers to join us in the first 30 days of this race.

[**We need to raise $10,000 by the end of the month to help cover the costs for our first organizing events. Can I count on you to make a donation now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67270355/419148155/253303863?refcode=EM_FL_MCB_20230728_fr_eom1_team_kw_act_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFhZDg0Zi00YzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i2oXWeMAkno3T9XNZR4gkT_iwbFaclUtaQgHtCCBZpE=)

Extremists are passing laws that target our friends and neighbors because of who they are and who they love.
All the while, extremists are refusing to pass reasonable gun safety laws to keep our children safe.
**Meanwhile, Joe and I are focused on moving this country forward.** And that’s exactly what we’ve done: In the last few years, we’ve made unprecedented investments in our country’s infrastructure. We’ve taken on the climate crisis, lowered the cost of prescription drugs, and passed the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years.

name: Diane Morgan, Our Rev Mobilization Coordinator
subject: Update on the fight in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Last week I told you about the work Our Revolution is doing in my home state of Ohio ahead of next month’s ballot measure. To recap: ahead of a crucial November vote to protect abortion rights in the state, a vocal minority are trying to change the state constitution, making it harder for voters to have their voices heard.

If you know our team of grassroots volunteers, you know we’re fighting back. But we need an outpouring from our top grassroots supporters if we’re going to beat back the well-funded and well-organized opposition. Can you chip in $5 or more today to stop this state by state attack on our rights?? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1008&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.
CHIP IN $10 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9277?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1009&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)
CHIP IN $27 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9278?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1010&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)
CHIP IN $50 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9279?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1011&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)
CHIP IN $100 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9280?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1012&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)
CHIP IN $250 NOW » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9281?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1013&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT » (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1014&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)
Every night across the country, Our Revolution volunteers are on the phone with Ohio voters to make sure they know to show up on August 8th and vote NO on Issue One. We’ve made thousands of calls and we’re just getting started.

Every phone bank costs about $750 and we need to call every night between now and Election Day to make sure voters know what’s at stake. That’s almost $7,000 between now and August 8th. We can’t afford to rest until we’ve beat this measure, but the phone bills add up. Can you chip in a few dollars to help us make sure that we’ve talked to every voter we can in Ohio? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8949?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230729_FR_oh_0_3MO_dianemorgan_na_na_ohturnout&t=1015&akid=4499%2E5885482%2EvVv-_V)

Thank you for your support,

Diane Morgan
Our Revolution Mobilization Coordinator

subject: stopping the GOP in PA-04 🛑

body:
The GOP agenda is wildly out of step with the needs and challenges of everyday Americans – just take a look at what’s on their to-do list: **** The GOP agenda is wildly out of step with the needs and challenges of everyday Americans – just take a look at what’s on their to-do list:
* Slashing access to reproductive care

* Ignoring gun violence and deadly mass shootings

* Eliminating environmental protections that address climate change

* Making deep cuts to Social Security and Medicare

We have to be ready to defend PA-04 in a big way to show Kevin McCarthy, Jim Jordan, and other far-right leaders how unpopular their agenda is in the all-important suburbs.

To stay on track, we need to recruit 32 more donors before Monday’s deadline. **[Peter, will you be one of them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67270520/419148938/268484999?amount=25&refcode=07292023_md_eom_fr_3&refcode2=4b1364b3-4e2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEzNjRiMy00ZTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HXMh3yYfiSCTiHBrh4bncZt7ftssT-p0Sm7ZEaJmaU=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ **CHIP IN $5** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67270521/419148939/268484999?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=07292023_md_eom_fr_3&refcode2=4b1364b3-4e2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEzNjRiMy00ZTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HXMh3yYfiSCTiHBrh4bncZt7ftssT-p0Sm7ZEaJmaU=)

Mad will not stand idly by when our rights and freedoms are in jeopardy. If we are going to be successful in fending off more opponents and come out of the summer slump strong, we have to make the most of every fundraising opportunity.

**[Only if you’re able, you can chip in here to help us reach our goal before Monday.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67270524/419148942/268484999?amount=25&refcode=07292023_md_eom_fr_3&refcode2=4b1364b3-4e2e-ee11-b8f0-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjEzNjRiMy00ZTJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HXMh3yYfiSCTiHBrh4bncZt7ftssT-p0Sm7ZEaJmaU=)**

Team Dean

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. name: KatiePorter.com
subject: re: Young lady, Wells Fargo does not make mistakes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Holding Wall Street accountable.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)
Derek, we wanted to make sure you caught Katie’s email from last week about her work holding Wall Street accountable before she was in Congress. ⬇️
[**Before you read—can you make a $5 donation before our end of month deadline so we can send Katie to the Senate to keep fighting predatory corporations?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-3?refcode=EMAJ29_3_WFG_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27196_3422442_Q1sXgb&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)
* * *
From: Katie Porter <info@katieporter.com>
Subject line: Young lady, Wells Fargo does not make mistakes.
Date: Thursday, July 20
_Young lady, Wells Fargo does not make mistakes._
Those were the words I heard in late 2007 after presenting my research showing 70% of lenders were trying to collect more money than homeowners believed they owed.
Back up for a second: In 2007 I was a law professor researching whether banks were taking advantage of homeowners by claiming Americans owed more than they really did. **In a sample of 1,700 cases, I found banks were asking people to pay $6 million more than they expected.** Banks repeatedly didn’t have the documentation to back up their claims, and nobody in the system was willing or able to stop them. For so many families that meant losing their home entirely.
It was a Wells Fargo lawyer who stood up after I presented my findings at a conference and lectured me on how the vast teams at Wells Fargo could afford to follow the law, and plenty of other Big Bank lawyers chimed in. **The conventional wisdom was that banks were always right, and nobody needed to question it.**
**If banks don’t make mistakes, the next logical conclusion was that this was in fact a deliberate strategy to break the rules and cheat borrowers.**
Because of this research, a few months later I was asked to testify before the Senate Subcommittee on Administrative Oversight and the Courts. Senator Chuck Schumer came prepared with a poster board, and pointed out how Wall Street boasted their strategy of foreclosure and late fees helped them become even more profitable. I left that hearing thinking punishment was coming for those lawbreaking banks, but for the most part they continued to collect every penny without following every rule.
As a professor, I could study and point out problems. But I wanted to do more to actually change our system. **I’m running for the U.S. Senate to fight for the people who have been taken advantage of by big corporations and are struggling to get ahead.**
That’s the work I’ve always done, and with your support I can head _back_ to the Senate—this time with the power to hold Wall Street to account. [**I'd be so appreciative of anything you can chip in to our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-3?refcode=EMAJ29_3_WFG_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27196_3422442_Q1sXgb&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-3?refcode=EMAJ29_3_WFG_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27196_3422442_Q1sXgb&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)**
Katie Porter
P.S. Because of experiences like this, I don’t take a dime from Big Bank, Big Oil, or Big Pharma CEOs. Our campaign is truly people powered. [**Join us here.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230729-3?refcode=EMAJ29_3_WFG_20230729_V1_F&refcode2=27196_3422442_Q1sXgb&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAJ29_3_WFG_20230729_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=27196_3422442_Q1sXgb&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=27196%2E3422442%2EQ1sXgb)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

### **Message To Alaskans**
---
#### **ALEC Nationwide Legislation Framework to Ban RCV, please share with legislators, friends and family in other states. It is important to be preemptive and STOP RCV before it gets a hold on other States.**
---
#### Summary
In American federalism, states are the fundamental level of government. This includes primacy over state and local elections, and over many aspects of federal elections. Special interests are pushing a novel and complicated election process called ranked-choice voting (RCV; and also related systems like approval voting and STAR voting). Often they try to enact these in local jurisdictions, creating a conflict between local and state election processes. They have also introduced federal legislation to force RCV on the states. This legislation would prohibit RCV and similar systems in state or local elections.

SAFEGUARD AMERICAN VOTES AND ELECTIONS ACT (SAVE ACT)

(1) In all elections, including primary elections, for any local, state, or federal public office, the following shall be prohibited:

a. Voting systems that permit a voter to vote for more than one candidate for the same office;

b. Voting systems that permit a voter to rank multiple candidates for the same office; and

c. Voting systems that reallocate a voter’s vote for one candidate to another candidate for the same office.

(2) Nothing in this section shall be construed to prevent a locality from holding at-large elections or multi-member district elections, so long as voters have one vote per position and no votes are transferred between candidates.

(3) Any existing or future ordinance by any political subdivision of this state which is in conflict with this section is void.

(4) Any election for any public office in this state conducted under a voting system prohibited by section 1 is void, and no candidate shall be elected under such a system.

[https://alec.org/model-policy/safeguard-american-votes-and-elections-act-save-act/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64c57de4f6599d23638e8110&u=https%3A%2F%2Falec.org%2Fmodel-policy%2Fsafeguard-american-votes-and-elections-act-save-act%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64c575ebc6b7df4115a0ac2f&l=en-US&s=KaqV7_a7SYPLPBERFFeaKHEP7WY%3D)
---

#### **Celebrating Alaskan Spirit!**
In the land of the midnight sun, where resilience and determination flow like the mighty rivers, Alaskans have achieved a monumental triumph in their pursuit of our Constitutional Republic. With the image of fishing for salmon and collecting signatures, we witness the true essence of Alaskan identity interwoven with the spirit of determination and helping each other. Through grit and unity, Alaskans have cast their nets wide, embracing the challenge of repealing ranked choice voting. Like the seasoned fishermen, they navigated the turbulent waters of politics, standing shoulder to shoulder, forging a path towards a more transparent electoral system. Just as the salmon fight against the current to help further their generations, Alaskans faced their own obstacles, but their unyielding resolve made them unstoppable. They understand that their voices matter, and their votes are a vital part of shaping Alaska's future. The act of collecting signatures not only reflects their commitment to preserving their values but also epitomizes the inclusivity and diversity that define Alaskan culture. In this endeavor, Alaskans have showcased their unity, bridging gaps, and fostering a strong sense of community that exemplifies the Alaskan way. Today, we applaud the Alaskans' triumph, as they have demonstrated that together, anything is possible. Let us take inspiration from their journey, embracing the challenges that lie ahead with an unwavering spirit, knowing that collective action can bring about profound change. May this victory serve as a beacon of hope and inspiration to all, reminding us that in the face of adversity, the spirit of Alaska shines brighter than ever before. Keep pushing forward, empowering change, and together, let's make our voices heard!
