#### **Ranked Choice Voting Encourages Gaming**
---
An Analysis of Alaska's Shift from Traditional Plurality Election to Ranked Choice Voting: Unveiling Potential Gaming of the Election System

This research paper examines the significant shift in voter behavior in Alaska's US Senate elections between 2020 and 2022, where the state transitioned from a traditional closed primary and plurality election to a Jungle Primary with Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting method. The focus is on understanding the substantial swing in voter support for Democrat candidates, which experienced a dramatic decrease from 41.2% in 2020 to a mere 10.7% in 2022. The results indicate a clear example of potential gaming of the election system aimed at hindering other candidates from securing victory.

Introduction:
Alaska introduced a significant electoral reform in 2022, implementing Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) for the first time. This new system aimed to provide voters with more choices, mitigate the "spoiler effect," and promote candidates with broader appeal. However, the 2022 US Senate election revealed a notable shift in voter preferences, particularly among Democrat supporters. This paper delves into the factors behind this shift, exploring whether the introduction of RCV had unintended consequences.

Methodology:
The research analyzes voter data from the 2020 and 2022 US Senate elections in Alaska. The 2020 election utilized a traditional closed primary and plurality voting system, while the 2022 election employed a Jungle Primary with Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting method.

The primary focus is on the performance of the Democratic candidates in both elections and the percentage shift in their voter support. The Democrat in the US Senate Election in 2022, received the lowest percentage of the vote in a US Senate Election in Alaska's History.

Results:
In the 2020 US Senate election, the Republican candidate Dan Sullivan secured victory with 53.9% of the vote (191,112 votes). The Democratic candidate, Al Gross, received 41.2% of the vote (146,068 votes).

However, the 2022 election under RCV witnessed a notable change in voter behavior. Two Republicans collectively obtained 86% of the total votes cast, with 226,219 votes. The Democratic candidate, which had received significant support in 2020, experienced a dramatic decrease in voter backing, obtaining only 10.7% of the vote (28,233 votes), the lowest for a Democrat in Alaska's History.

Discussion:
The striking drop of 30.5 percentage points in voter support for the Democratic candidate from 2020 to 2022 indicates a noteworthy shift in preferences. This change can be attributed to the introduction of the RCV system, which might have influenced voters' strategic behavior.

The Jungle Primary with Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting method allowed voters to rank candidates in order of preference. To block other candidates from winning, some voters may have strategically ranked only Republican candidates while leaving the Democratic candidate unranked. This approach could potentially lead to the elimination of the Democratic candidate in the early rounds, ultimately favoring the Republican contenders in the final round. This type of strategic voting behavior by Democrats can only be explained by Gaming. Voters knew the Democrat could not beat @KellyForAlaska they voted for @lisamurkowski so they could make sure Kelly did not win.

Conclusion:
The implementation of Ranked Choice Voting in Alaska's 2022 US Senate election resulted in an unexpected and substantial shift in voter support for Democratic candidates. The decline of 30.5% from 2020 to 2022 suggests a potential gaming of the election system by voters to prevent other candidates from winning.

**Signature Gathering Update:** Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. **Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot** Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling.
#### “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young”
“The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: [JAMES BROOKS](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64c57de4f6599d23638e8110&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2Fauthor%2Fjames-brooks%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64c575ebc6b7df4115a0ac2f&l=en-US&s=uABguimp5Jz7JfZA3N_bZnI3qDw%3D "Posts by James Brooks") \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon [https://alaskabeacon.com/2023/04/28/al-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says/](https://mgcp03.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=64c57de4f6599d23638e8110&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskabeacon.com%2F2023%2F04%2F28%2Fal-gross-should-have-stayed-on-u-s-house-ballot-alaska-supreme-court-says%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64c575ebc6b7df4115a0ac2f&l=en-US&s=hFNlsausS_5rGFeUQ3ed2bxO5mk%3D) **Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting** We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)**Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting.**

The decline of 30.5% from 2020 to 2022 suggests a potential gaming of the election system by voters to prevent other candidates from winning. | | Fairbanks Sign To Repeal Ranked Choice Voting at the Tanana Fair July 28th - Aug 6th. | Signing Locations | | Anchorage Sign During Business Hours | Kenai / Soldotna Sign at G F Sherman Signs | Sign In Juneau, Call Beforehand | Sign In Wasilla, Address and Times Below | Sign In Homer, address and time below | Wasilla Sign During Business Hours | Kodiak Please Contact To Sign the Petition!!! Dan Powell 907-942-1312 Thank You Dan!!! | Signature Gathering Update: Alaskans would like to update Alaska on where we are at in our signature drive. We have collected nearly 20,000 of the required 26,000 signatures so far with more petition books being returned every day. We have 1,000 Petition Books in circulation if all filled out is 150,000 signatures. We have had such incredible success; we have asked all our Alaskan Volunteers to return their books 6 months early. Join today to help us Repeal Ranked Choice Voting, help us get our signatures finished as soon as possible. Supreme Court Decision – Al Gross Should have stayed on the US House Ballot Very concerning development at the Supreme Court regarding Al Gross dropping out of Special Primary in 2022, it appears that the division of elections violated State Law when they removed Al Gross from the ballot. If he was not removed it would have be Begich, Palin, Gross, Peltola on the ballot, which may have had a very different result. We are very troubled by this development and hope all Alaskans take the time to learn more about this Supreme Court ruling. “Al Gross should have stayed on U.S. House ballot, Alaska Supreme Court says Justices concluded that the Alaska Division of Elections mishandled the withdrawal of the independent who sought to replace Don Young” “The Alaska Division of Elections improperly removed Al Gross, an independent candidate for U.S. House, from last year’s special election ballot, the Alaska Supreme Court said in a ruling published Friday.”BY: "Posts by James Brooks" \- APRIL 28, 2023 5:48 PM Alaska Beacon Our work used to ban Ranked Choice Voting We have been working hard with other States to help them learn about Ranked Choice Voting, why it is not a good system and how it does not achieve the goals it sets out to accomplish. Our work is being credited by multiple State Legislatures. We are proud to be a part of the work throughout the country to ban Ranked Choice Voting. More States have banned Rank Choice Voting, than use it (5-2)Florida, Tennessee, Idaho, South Dakota, and Montana have banned ranked Choice Voting, more states are looking at banning ranked choice Voting. | | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 mailto:info@alaskansforhonestgovernment.org?subject=Newsletter | | This Communication Was Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message. I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. name: Lexi Reese for Senate
subject: Thanks for joining the team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lexi Reese for Senate
body:
https://www.lexireese.com/ [https://www.lexireese.com/] Hi,

Thanks so much for signing up to join our campaign! You'll start getting the latest updates from Lexi and our team soon.

Lexi is a mom, a business and non-profit leader, and a pro-choice progressive. She's running for Senate because our economy is a mess – and our elected officials in Washington aren't fixing it.

Lexi is a different sort of candidate – she's never run for office before – and this is a different sort of campaign, so we're going to need your help.

One of the most important ways you can help send Lexi to the Senate is by chipping in. Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you can, it'd mean the world to us if you chipped in a few dollars to fuel Lexi's campaign:

Donate → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4s-email-footer?refcode=email_web-confirmation]Looking for other ways to help, too? Follow Lexi on social media, and share with your friends and followers why you decided to join this team! Follow Lexi on: Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/LexiReeseforSenate] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/lexireeseforsenate/] , LinkedIn [https://www.linkedin.com/in/lexireese/] , Youtube [https://www.youtube.com/@lexireeseforsenate] or Threads [https://www.threads.net/@lexireeseforsenate] !

If you're a music fan like Lexi, don't miss our official Campaign Playlist on Spotify [https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0GxP0fac0qCuxRE2SC60jI?si=d29f2ace57cd4980&nd=1] !

And before you go, stock up on Lexi Reese for Senate gear! There's no better way to show your community you're on Team Lexi than with a bumper sticker or a t-shirt. Check out the latest items in our store here >>

https://www.lexireese.com/store/ [https://www.lexireese.com/store/]Thanks so much! We're excited to have you on the team!

-Team Lexi
Donate → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4s-email-footer?refcode=email-footer]

**So, long story short:** We’re well behind the 8-ball here, Peter.

But that’s OK. Because I truly believe in the ability of _this_ grassroots team to come together and outwork any wealthy millionaire who thinks they can buy their way into the U.S. Senate.

[So, what do you say, Peter? clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hi, Peter, Angela Alsobrooks here! I’m a lifelong Marylander, mom, former elected prosecutor, and County Executive of Prince George’s County, and now I’m running to become Maryland’s next United States Senator! Look, I know you’re busy and you probably don’t have time to read some long, drawn-out explanation for why I’m sending this email about my campaign, Peter. So instead, I’ll just get right to it: July is coming to a close in just 2 days and we’re well off the pace to hit our monthly fundraising goal. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | The truth is, we’re running against a self-funded, multi-millionaire who has invested $10 million of his own money into his campaign and is already up with TV ads across Maryland. So, long story short: We’re well behind the 8-ball here, Peter. But that’s OK. Because I truly believe in the ability of this grassroots team to come together and outwork any wealthy millionaire who thinks they can buy their way into the U.S. Senate. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Angela Alsobrooks and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Hope you have a great day! — Angela The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. **END OF MONTH GOAL
$15,000**
---
With so much at stake in the battle for fair maps, we are turning to grassroots activists like you for immediate support, team!
Our mission to ensure equal representation and protect our democracy is facing unprecedented challenges. But we won't back down. We need your help to stand strong and make a difference.
**[We set an end-of-month fundraising goal of $15,000, and every dollar counts. Our supporters -- including YOU -- have always been the bedrock of our movement, and we are counting on you to help us surge forward in this crucial moment. name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Hope to see you at my birthday celebration on August 9th!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=d9d3665b54&e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | My birthday is coming up, and the gift I really want is to celebrate it with you, my core team of supporters. Can you join us for food, fun and maybe an embarrassing round of “Happy Birthday"? Wednesday, August 9th
5:30 pm Plumbers Union Hall
1519 Rollins Road, Burlingame [](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=3c0c88bd39&e=c0babbc643) Turning another year older is a good reminder of how much I love the job of representing you on the Board of Supervisors, and how much important work we still have to do together:
* Preparing for climate change by making investments to combat wildfires, flooding and sea level rise
* Improving health care, including greater access to mental health services and interventions
* Housing homeless individuals and families and providing intensive wraparound services such as job training

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=6fcb35abd9&e=c0babbc643) I would still very much appreciate anything you can donate – the limit for this race is $2,000 per donor and every dollar helps get our message out! Hope to see you August 9th! Best regards, David Canepa, San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5 P.S. No matter the size of your contribution, donating today is the best birthday present you could give me – I would be so grateful if you could [pitch in](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=9121e62e79&e=c0babbc643) today. **Paid for by David Canepa for Supervisor 2024, ID# 1399463**
---

Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: Working Families Party
subject: A win for the Teamsters is a win for us all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, We have a major update on the 340,000 UPS workers in the Teamsters union fighting for a fair contract: **After seeing the tremendous power that workers have when they stand strong together, UPS executives agreed to the union’s demands this week, allowing them to reach a tentative agreement!** While the agreement still needs to be voted on by union members, if it goes through this will mean that employees have won:
* An end to the two-tier wage system that pays some employees drastically lower wages for the same work,
* Wage increases that bring the minimum wage for part-time workers up to $21 per hour and the average top rate for full-time workers up to $49 per hour,
* The creation of 7,500 new full-time jobs and hiring for 22,500 open full-time positions,
* An end to forced overtime on scheduled days off,
* Martin Luther King Day off for employees to spend with their loved ones, and
* Dozens of workplace protections and improvements — including air conditioning and fans in all trucks, following temperatures reaching as high as 152 degrees inside vehicles and killing workers.1

A win for the Teamsters union is a win for us all. By standing in organized solidarity, union members displayed a power that overpaid executives everywhere can see, from Amazon to Starbucks to the studios and streamers that manage writers’ and actors’ contracts. **If we continue to stick together and exercise our strength, we can win real change for workers in every industry and ensure that everyone can make enough to live in a job that treats them with dignity.** Wins like this are only possible with support from people like you and the thousands of WFP members who joined in solidarity with UPS workers — as well as the elected leaders we work to support every day. **[Help us keep up this incredible momentum and keep organizing everywhere for workers and to elect candidates who will fight for their rights by making a contribution of $10 — or any amount — now.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUUOuJgxkdRiTwLqj7FzXjQ4DbdyLpyU0m7_HNXPNe-uJCjzWdBxFCtLFtH0hJM4TcyFW5p3ARVi-jRlqeG8yAvk--yaN-BnuNQS9MvP9gWL_sM3BrYZoWB-tRTcRzkrFV0-WSyQT0Wy-w9cGRbrbqu_Yd-Hd5tYxQLhs_0U8Wo_76Y3euwuaXZ4-0am0jMvdACAsJzRKtgHiXEAyb7tD0BC2dXzSeFDQ9Q8xXzfJCXsU50CA7Pc-hKb7bD2hQUiSl1H6mgj5r0eHcigE5d1RpetxDeVf--CItGgiFY-C4uY0JvWr5WRpBvhVH_3fhIxnENVH0x6p8E1wfXcqKgJfup5cReaGxMWbDlF0V68-9COg/3ya/QpnWrFsXT9y9nvbFS3DWBQ/h0/CZK9YdFZRd6uWEvbW1DmKEFVATo5Frf4UEzDLY0aFs0)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source:

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1fea3c564b14824831ebf5fbd98f8ff&_e=XyI-LoMcJ73e9HXWkk3bKwMfsVIGDhyUd5uynYssAQpmJUh2ehd3qasNysrWR4VZbeppE-GHfXgxZa14bA4BA2TSxkyHZqrVMux5JteqXRhOdbRItmVngW8LumAk7vKuqyG0Ys5Ke_Imz2S8yLb6r6dB_-tiuGIyxdUSgZhbvWOVZSJ1J7TyQV9m0ynzz8x7hK-Aum7nIdzkZphPfBZ7eDEMPis_qjCpGJ2H6e61BkoUbS_FJE_73ZUi3IIT1NgKj09mMJ_kHyVUlfQsaxWfUJ8eAVtseTao6rgexI8H-NAhdVQQggISThn0ibrI6gIq8mRojmzhBBRlEDRj2tudPD2dNMXBeTu99WCW1NjIk8s%3D)

Friend,

I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what's never going to change.

**__My Upbringing__**
I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1fea3c564b14824831ebf5fbd98f8ff&_e=XyI-LoMcJ73e9HXWkk3bKwMfsVIGDhyUd5uynYssAQpmJUh2ehd3qasNysrWR4VZbeppE-GHfXgxZa14bA4BA2TSxkyHZqrVMux5JteqXRhOdbRItmVngW8LumAk7vKuqyG0Ys5Ke_Imz2S8yLb6r6dB_-tiuGIyxdUSgZhbvWOVZSJ1J7TyQV9m0ynzz8x7hK-Aum7nIdzkZphPfBZ7eIt6KJG_croIyGUi6OIAnVBs7pEamaonDHRl8LFYenF-kjboDiESx4q0JP95_v6sRl4__hNSRhQL47tZQrYnGmbiwKmyL-LjpID6rGwyf8UBxef5JNKBAMzgqYEnEVu2YF6785791yuzYzftBhIoeB4%3D)
After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe.

**__So, what 'd I do after college?__**
I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state's $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer's Cabinet.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1fea3c564b14824831ebf5fbd98f8ff&_e=XyI-LoMcJ73e9HXWkk3bKwMfsVIGDhyUd5uynYssAQpmJUh2ehd3qasNysrWR4VZbeppE-GHfXgxZa14bA4BA2TSxkyHZqrVMux5JteqXRhOdbRItmVngW8LumAk7vKuqyG0Ys5Ke_Imz2S8yLb6r6dB_-tiuGIyxdUSgZhbvWOVZSJ1J7TyQV9m0ynzz8x7hK-Aum7nIdzkZphPfBZ7eIcVECdxhGqYlDvArmQsnt1XkHMjYKZG0HWdakCjpA6I4rEXTaoY4xgI0BuswwoOWVfhJPGP6Fbes1ZpXZxippWZrRi4uUSyMVoc3Bc3iUCiTz7tI1RmV773qKqThkvfZxc0jfTJb_cK9D0gwX7LtCA%3D)
Then, I got my biggest call. **The call to help the people of Louisiana and America.**

**_Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana_**
I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee.

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1fea3c564b14824831ebf5fbd98f8ff&_e=XyI-LoMcJ73e9HXWkk3bKwMfsVIGDhyUd5uynYssAQpmJUh2ehd3qasNysrWR4VZbeppE-GHfXgxZa14bA4BA2TSxkyHZqrVMux5JteqXRhOdbRItmVngW8LumAk7vKuqyG0Ys5Ke_Imz2S8yLb6r6dB_-tiuGIyxdUSgZhbvWOVZSJ1J7TyQV9m0ynzz8x7hK-Aum7nIdzkZphPfBZ7eAmfPh7wcjKKB6WOSrCre9mDy8u0GIU0jvwxKwYDOJX-EgzP80huO8_q4X-tnfNmdE6gx-8392xJzyr4cyuqRU4PNCqAbfxt-a9p3AfVDadF5KRNvRO8IaBdFwH6Zs1N1Hu1U21ZLbA9iPRuzZjnARk%3D)
Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I'm always going to be **100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN****,** and **PRO-FREEDOM**. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama.

**I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. **

That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much.

**[So, now that I've given you my story in a nutshell, I'm going to humbly ask for your support. I need you to rush whatever you're able below to make sure I have the resources necessary to fight for you and defend our nation.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1fea3c564b14824831ebf5fbd98f8ff&_e=XyI-LoMcJ73e9HXWkk3bKwMfsVIGDhyUd5uynYssAQpmJUh2ehd3qasNysrWR4VZbeppE-GHfXgxZa14bA4BA2TSxkyHZqrVMux5JteqXRhOdbRItmVngW8LumAk7vKuqyG0Ys5Ke_Imz2S8yLb6r6dB_-tiuGIyxdUSgZhbvWOVZSJ1J7TyQV9m0ynzz8x7hK-Aum7nIdzkZphPfBZ7eImXh5PjQpJuz_EBXjbGivCWVnW8hDZuA-IjFAZnlPl1tHTdtV0Lv9HqpWsMhdprGX5jV8xFS1vHZt9lOql72bnrnxH6R7J6g3F0ECHoJhd8IGJ_BfKTkEH5TnjfRCzWK9p8mCVPXWafTYHOqXWQ8L8%3D)** | [**DONATE $500**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f1fea3c564b14824831ebf5fbd98f8ff&_e=XyI-LoMcJ73e9HXWkk3bKwMfsVIGDhyUd5uynYssAQpmJUh2ehd3qasNysrWR4VZbeppE-GHfXgxZa14bA4BA2TSxkyHZqrVMux5JteqXRhOdbRItmVngW8LumAk7vKuqyG0Ys5Ke_Imz2S8yLb6r6dB_-tiuGIyxdUSgZhbvWOVZSJ1J7TyQV9m0ynzz8x7W-SfqU2QsNuX8jEupTOjhLLn9to93WrMMwfiw8P_CZNGLZHiW0Jw7VO9K6o2JAK6ZEdCWvzLAAOogeRKuNYy5JoGQA0DW7wzVGZmkl6nTZ2IaoDkDUZopK-gtnZnZLCKtBgkyhIMeqkU8ES5pAT2s5D5mx11z5E4FQlWfX6c3AE%3D)

Friend,
It is hard to believe that nearly 6 years have passed since Hurricane Harvey hit. Many still await a full recovery since this catastrophe and its aftermath. Join us next Saturday, August 5th at 9:30am, for a Block Walk nearly 6 years after the storm.
Let's walk together and provide resources and support to those still impacted by Hurricane Harvey in the Houston Gardens community.

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: CNN just labeled us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It’s a coin toss. Donate $3 and help Ruben win.
#

Peter — this isn’t the news we were hoping to share, but we think you should see it.
_CNN_ just released their list of the **10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024**... and we’re on it. Matter of fact, we’re in the top 5.
But unlike the other races which would flip from one party to another one, Arizona could go either way. **Red** or **Blue**.
Arizona made history when it sent Mark Kelly to the Senate in 2020, and again in 2022. But victory in 2024 is NOT guaranteed. So we’re reaching out for your help to raise $10,000 today in response to this news.
**This is where you come in, Peter:** [**If you are able, will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? Lists like this make us a top target of the GOP and we need your help to be ready for the onslaught of attack ads coming our way.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230729-2-f&t=1&akid=865%2E734936%2ETmd5_4)
You can bet that reports like this will only increase the attacks against us by the GOP because they know if they can flip this seat they can take back the Senate.
However, we know that with your help we can win AGAIN in Arizona and turn both seats Democratic for good.
So thank you in advance for pitching in and for having Ruben’s back.
Ruben Gallego for Arizona
[DONATE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-july23.8cMi4H&refcode=em230729-2-f&t=2&akid=865%2E734936%2ETmd5_4)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: You've always had my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67272601/419156915/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4346-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ZlMzYyYi02MDJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dQ_Hvzh1bs0oNKqKl7Fa74oKl54ab6ZtqnTKH7b3eIY=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years of advocacy, late nights, whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before and I'm counting on you to have my back again. clean_body: | | | Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. = Thank you for having my back when we fought for health care coverage for 9/11 first responders and expanded benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need. Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that empowers survivors of sexual assault in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years of advocacy, late nights, whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York. Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for national paid family leave for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country. My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support. But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat. I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: Missouri is our most competitive + affordable chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Here are three reasons why:
#
Peter,
When you add a donation toward our campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and elect Lucas Kunce, you’re not just helping us build a record-breaking grassroots movement here in Missouri — **you’re investing in the most competitive, affordable race to flip a U.S. Senate seat in the entire country.**
Here are a few quick reasons why:
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6, his approval dropped to just 42%. In Missouri’s last Senate race during a presidential election, the margin was only 2.7%.
2. **Missourians have a history of taking back their power at the ballot box.** Since his last election, voters have broken with Hawley to approve measures that raised the minimum wage, expanded Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalized weed with huge margins of victory.
3. **Every $1 in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida.** Because of our state’s small media markets, we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often — and get a field program up and running, with organizers on the ground, contacting voters earlier than ever before.

**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35287?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs)**
Lucas Kunce is working hard to build the record-breaking, worker-led coalition that can take advantage of this opportunity to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and stand up to the GOP insiders propping up Hawley’s campaign.
**But he needs your help to do it, Peter.**
Missouri’s election-winning labor movement has started to unite behind Lucas and our grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley — along with elected officials, community leaders, and everyday people all across the state. But winning this race will be determined by our ability to keep up this grassroots momentum.
**[So please, will you add a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford toward our $50,000 end-of-month goal before Monday at midnight?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35287?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35288?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35288?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35288?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35288?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35288?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35288?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35287?refcode=em20230729-3472&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs)
---
We have a real shot to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s Senate seat back for real, everyday people next year — and we really can’t afford to waste it.
Thanks for being part of our movement,
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230729-3472-footer&t=10&refcode2=3472_614464_RHavQs&akid=3472%2E614464%2ERHavQs)**

But we have to be honest with you, friend — we fell far short of our quarterly fundraising goal last month. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious $5,000 fundraising goal by the end of July. name: CaucusRoom
subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
What you missed this week. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-avthid-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### **Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared.**
* So many **[crooked families](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-y/)** in D.C.
* Hunter visited his **[sugar brother](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-j/).**
* **[DOJ demanded Texas](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-t/) **remove floating barriers.
* Biden is **[targeting another](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-i/)** household appliance.
* **[Will Trump attend](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-d/)** the first debate in August?
* **[Kamala called out](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-h/)** for her lies.
* Hillary Clinton says **[MAGA controls the weather.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-k/)**
* Idaho churchgoer**[wins big lawsuit](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-u/) **over COVID policy.
* **[Biden cured cancer.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-o/)**
* **[Hunter's plea deal](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-x/) **blew up in his face.
* Climate change is a **[hoax](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-m/).**
* Do you have your**[tinfoil hat](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-c/) **ready?

### **No Pardon for Hunter**
White House press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre was**[forced to rule out Biden handing a pardon to his son Hunter.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-q/)**
### **Poster Child for Term Limits**
California Sen. Dianne Feinstein**[appeared confused and had to be prompted to vote "aye"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-a/) **in an uncomfortable moment during a Senate Appropriations Committee hearing.** ** **Biden's Criminal Activity** Multiple **[banks filed over 170 suspicious activity reports](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-f/)** with the Treasury Department on the Bidens. _Why weren't they investigated?_ [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-e/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-avthid-trhiujldw-w/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

| | Hey y'all, The race to meet the requirements for the first GOP debate is in full swing, but I feel like too many people have taken the easy path. ➡️ The tricks, gimmicks, and giveaways to get a dollar have gotten out of hand. I believe my support should come from my character, my vision, and my message. Don't you think? With that - if you believe our best days are ahead and that we need strong voices taking on Donald Trump & Ron DeSantis...give me a chance to prove to you and America that there's a better option. name: James Carville
subject: Listen here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Defending our Senate majority depends on reelecting Tammy Baldwin and keeping Wisconsin blue.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=747%2E35263%2EVXUy4u)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jul23.xghWlz&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230729_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=747%2E35263%2EVXUy4u) Hey Peter — James Carville here. Let me tell you about the race that’s brewing in Wisconsin. I don’t say this lightly when I tell you Wisconsin is the tipping point state in next year’s elections. **_Defending our Senate majority and the White House depends on reelecting Tammy Baldwin and keeping Wisconsin blue._** And trust me when I tell you: _Wisconsin’s elections are decided by razor-thin margins._ Less than 1 percentage point decided the last two presidential elections, and Republican Ron Johnson won Wisconsin’s other Senate seat by just 1 point last year. Republicans poured $77 MILLION into Wisconsin to squeak out that narrow victory, and god knows what they have in store to flip Tammy’s seat and deliver the Senate majority for Mitch McConnell. Listen here, Peter: If we don’t pick up the pace now, we’ll be playing catch up to the campaign war chest Republicans are amassing to go after Tammy. **[I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t important: Can you chip in a few bucks to Tammy Baldwin’s reelection campaign before her end-of-month deadline? name: Shontel Brown
subject: Defending Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I could use your help.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67272814/419157868/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230730EOM_N_SB_30DO_4_NG_N_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWZiODRhNy02MzJlLWVlMTEtYjhmMC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uzLBdXr0RhoLrWVL_HQlsmg_PHsGEF1WMTFshsiLBa8=) Peter, I’m gearing up for 2024.

In the wake of the 2022 midterms, the Congressional landscape in Ohio is truly remarkable. Despite the GOP’s favorable redistricting and national environment, Democrats exceeded expectations in Ohio’s most competitive districts, defending every incumbent and flipping two seats.

After the recent redistricting rulings by the Supreme Court, the 2024 election is truly a toss-up. Once again, **Ohio will be essential to any potential Democratic House majority,** and we’ll have to recreate our impressive performance in the frontline districts that will decide the balance of power in Washington.

With the road to a majority running through Ohio, we need all hands on deck starting now. The GOP is raising millions from their super PACs for the contest ahead, and we can’t afford to fall behind. Luckily, we have something stronger than big money interests: grassroots donors like you, Peter.

[**_My team just checked the data, and with our July fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow, we’re still $1,321 from our goal. clean_body: I could use your help. = Peter, I’m gearing up for 2024. In the wake of the 2022 midterms, the Congressional landscape in Ohio is truly remarkable. Despite the GOP’s favorable redistricting and national environment, Democrats exceeded expectations in Ohio’s most competitive districts, defending every incumbent and flipping two seats. After the recent redistricting rulings by the Supreme Court, the 2024 election is truly a toss-up. Once again, Ohio will be essential to any potential Democratic House majority, and we’ll have to recreate our impressive performance in the frontline districts that will decide the balance of power in Washington. With the road to a majority running through Ohio, we need all hands on deck starting now. The GOP is raising millions from their super PACs for the contest ahead, and we can’t afford to fall behind. The Biden-appointed Special Counsel has brought NEW BOGUS CHARGES against me in the same witch hunt known as the Documents Hoax.
The Deep State isn't just trying to JAIL ME FOR LIFE as an innocent man. They're trying to jail me for the _**equivalent of 5 LIFETIMES**_.

I know the year ahead until Election Day is going to be a challenge, Fellow American- but that doesn’t scare me. I know that with grassroots patriots like you on my side, we can achieve every goal and meet every milestone. But with the Left doing everything they can to stop us, I need you to step up NOW. During a crisis, you learn who your true allies are.

It’s easy to be loyal and brave when everything is sunshine and roses. _But when the storm hits, you quickly find out who retreats and who truly has your back._

In this case, when the storm came upon our nation and the entire weight of the Department of Justice came down upon me, people who once called themselves “Trump allies” didn’t just fail to have my back – _they outright stabbed me in the back_.

It’s easy to be loyal and brave when everything is sunshine and roses. But when the storm hits, you quickly find out who retreats and who truly has your back. In this case, when the storm came upon our nation and the entire weight of the Department of Justice came down upon me, people who once called themselves “Trump allies” didn’t just fail to have my back – they outright stabbed me in the back. Now, for the SECOND TIME, the puppet candidate propped up by RINO special interest donors has EXCUSED and JUSTIFIED the Deep State’s witch hunt against me. He’s even PARROTING scripted lines straight from DEMOCRATS in CONGRESS! History will remember that when it mattered most, he chose to fall to his knees and surrender... RINOs. Democrats. Globalists. They’re all just one big UNIPARTY that’s united behind a common goal of stopping YOU from having power in your own country. That’s why RINOs are willing to spend MORE THAN GEORGE SOROS – who was identified as the single biggest donor in American politics. While my primary opponents continue to take cheap swipes at me as the Department of Justice plots ways to throw me in JAIL for up to 561 YEARS, I am asking YOU to stand with me at this pivotal moment in the election. The upcoming end-of-month fundraising deadline to conclude July is our chance to show that our movement truly is UNBREAKABLE. RINOs are concocting a $370 MILLION scheme to try and defeat me so that they can install their own nominee who has now PUBLICLY decided to align with the Deep State. body:
| | **URGENT UPDATE: We are only 3 days away from the end of July, and we still need 12 more supporters from your neighborhood.**

As you know, we’ve pledged to provide direct support to school board candidates across the state. Our mission is to donate at least $500 to approximately 100 candidates, but right now we are still short of our $50k fundraising goal.

We know you probably hear about fundraising a lot, but there is no better time to lay the groundwork for victory than right now. Voting starts in mid-September, and candidates need support ASAP if they are going to defeat their right-wing-backed opponents.

[Will you chip in $10 or anything you can right away? Every single dollar we get to school board candidates now is another ballot we can get returned in September, or another voter we can get to the polls this November. The vast majority of Americans have absolutely zero interest in censorship in our public schools – **and now we need to organize and stand together.**

MAGA extremists' siege of our school boards can be stopped this year, but only if we defend our children and the candidates working to protect them. Will you chip in immediately to be one of the last few donors we need from your neighborhood?

clean_body: | | URGENT UPDATE: We are only 3 days away from the end of July, and we still need 12 more supporters from your neighborhood. As you know, we’ve pledged to provide direct support to school board candidates across the state. Our mission is to donate at least $500 to approximately 100 candidates, but right now we are still short of our $50k fundraising goal. We know you probably hear about fundraising a lot, but there is no better time to lay the groundwork for victory than right now. Voting starts in mid-September, and candidates need support ASAP if they are going to defeat their right-wing-backed opponents. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Every single dollar we get to school board candidates now is another ballot we can get returned in September, or another voter we can get to the polls this November. The vast majority of Americans have absolutely zero interest in censorship in our public schools – and now we need to organize and stand together. MAGA extremists' siege of our school boards can be stopped this year, but only if we defend our children and the candidates working to protect them.
